title: Hydrogen solid electrolyte cell
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve a cell performance, by adding a metal with its standard electrode potential higher than that of a standard hydrogen electrode, to the negative electrode material. CONSTITUTION:In order to increase anticorrosion property of a hydrogen impregnated alloy against a solid electrolyte, a metal whose standard electrode potential is higher than that of a hydrogen electrode is mixed to or used to cover the hydrogen impregnated alloy. And, in order to improve polarization property during charging and discharging, a metal with a catalysis of hydrogen dissociation is mixed to or used to cover the hydrogen impregnated alloy. As a metal with an electrode potential higher than that of a hydrogen electrode, copper, silver, mercury, palladium, platinum, gold, and the like are available, while as a metal with catalysis of hydrogen dissociation, iron, cobolt, nickel, copper, palladium, platinum, gold, and the like are available. Therefore, as a metal for both requirements of anticorrosion and catalysis of hydrogen dissociation, copper, palladium, platinum, and gold are satisfactory. Consequently, those metals are used for a part of negative electrode material, to improve anticorrosion and dissociation.

title: Magnesium-yttrium-zinc hydrogen storage magnesium alloy and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a magnesium-yttrium-zinc hydrogen storage magnesium alloy and a preparation method thereof. The magnesium alloy consists of three elements of Mg, Y and Zn, and the chemical formula of the magnesium alloy can be expressed as MgY   x 2 Zn   x   ,0.5≤ x Less than or equal to 1, and provides a preparation method of the alloy and hydrogen storage performance of the alloy in an as-cast state, a homogenized state and an equal channel angular compression state (ECAP). The preparation process route is as follows: the method comprises the following steps of large furnace smelting, semi-continuous casting, homogenizing annealing and equal channel angular extrusion, so that three samples in different states are obtained, and a block sample is crushed into powder for hydrogen storage performance testing. The magnesium alloy has good hydrogen absorption and desorption dynamics, and samples in three different states are completely activated and then are at 360 DEG CThe hydrogen absorption amount can reach about 7wt%, the hydrogen absorption amount can reach about 5wt% at 280 ℃, and the hydrogen can be discharged to different degrees at 360 ℃, 320 ℃ and 280 ℃. The preparation method provided by the invention has a simple process, and can be used for large-scale preparation, and the prepared magnesium alloy has excellent hydrogen storage performance and good application prospect in the aspect of being used as a hydrogen fuel cell.

title: Ciht power system
abstract: An electrochemical power system is provided that generates an electromotive force (EMF) from the catalytic reaction of hydrogen to lower energy (hydrino) states providing direct conversion of the energy released from the hydrino reaction into electricity, the system comprising at least two components chosen from: H 2 O catalyst or a source of H 2 O catalyst; atomic hydrogen or a source of atomic hydrogen; reactants to form the H 2 O catalyst or source of H 2 O catalyst and atomic hydrogen or source of atomic hydrogen; and one or more reactants to initiate the catalysis of atomic hydrogen. The electrochemical power system for forming hydrinos and electricity can further comprise a cathode compartment comprising a cathode, an anode compartment comprising an anode, optionally a salt bridge, reactants that constitute hydrino reactants during cell operation with separate electron flow and ion mass transport, a source of oxygen, and a source of hydrogen. Due to oxidation-reduction cell half reactions, the hydrino-producing reaction mixture is constituted with the migration of electrons through an external circuit and ion mass transport through a separate path such as the electrolyte to complete an electrical circuit. A power source and hydride reactor is further provided that powers a power system comprising (i) a reaction cell for the catalysis of atomic hydrogen to form hydrinos, (ii) a chemical fuel mixture comprising at least two components chosen from: a source of H 2 O catalyst or H 2 O catalyst; a source of atomic hydrogen or atomic hydrogen; reactants to form the source of H 2 O catalyst or H 2 O catalyst and a source of atomic hydrogen or atomic hydrogen; one or more reactants to initiate the catalysis of atomic hydrogen; and a support to enable the catalysis, (iii) thermal systems for reversing an exchange reaction to thermally regenerate the fuel from the reaction products, (iv) a heat sink that accepts the heat from the power-producing reactions, and (v) a power conversion system.

title: Hydrogen station
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen station that can cope with any hydrogen specifications of a fixed-type fuel cell and a fuel cell automobile while securing an economical efficiency and technical stability, and can feed hydrogen to both the cell and the automobile.  <P>SOLUTION: The hydrogen station 1 comprises: a hydrogen production device 2 that produces hydrogen B of the fixed-type fuel cell specification by using a reformed raw material A; a hydrogen storage tank 3 that stores the hydrogen B; and hydrogen feeding lines 4, 5 that feed the hydrogen to both the fixed-type fuel cells in a home and an office and the fuel cell automobile from the hydrogen storage tank 3. title: Direct synthesis and methods of using hydrogen storage materials
abstract: A method is described for the direct synthesis of reversible hydride materials by hydrogenating a mixture of aluminum, an alkali-metal hydride, and one or more of an alkali-metal amide or an alkali-metal imide, an alkaline-earth-metal or alkaline-earth-metal hydride, and a transition metal catalyst. In one embodiment, the mixture includes aluminum, LiH, LiNH 2 , magnesium, and TiF 3  in the molar ratio of 1:1:2:1:0.05. The material is capable of being repeatedly hydrogenated and dehydrogenated. The method is likely capable of forming a variety of hydrogen storage materials that includes alanates and amides or imides, and which have high hydrogen storage capabilities without the use of ammonia. A method is also described of using two component hydrogen storage materials by segregating the material components.

title: On-vehicle fuel hydrogen manages system
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of on-vehicle fuel hydrogen to manage system, including fuel cell pack, hydrogen gas pipe and hydrogen purge pipe；Hydrogen temperature is equipped on hydrogen gas pipe successively and adjusts unit, hydrogen temperature sensor and hydrogen gas pressure sensor, hydrogen temperature sensor is located at hydrogen temperature and adjusts between unit and hydrogen gas pressure sensor, and hydrogen gas pressure sensor is located at the hydrogen inlet of fuel cell pack；It includes heater, cooling water pipe and water feeding tank that hydrogen temperature, which adjusts unit, hydrogen gas pipe runs through the inside of heater, cooling water pipe is wound in the periphery of heater, and one end of cooling water pipe is connected to the water outlet of water feeding tank, and the other end of cooling water pipe is connected to the water inlet of water feeding tank；Hydrogen purge pipe is equipped with concentration of hydrogen sulfide sensor；Further include processor and alarm unit.The utility model is monitored the pressure and temperature for entering the hydrogen of fuel cell pack, is conducive to the efficiency of combustion for improving fuel cell pack, and then improve its generating efficiency.

title: Portable fuel cell
abstract: PURPOSE:To produce a small-size, light-weight fuel cell by using hydrogen generated by the reaction of hydride on water as fuel and by using hydrogen peroxide as oxidizer. CONSTITUTION:The water in a reaction-generated water storage 9 is sent to a hydride reactor 4 via a water supply line 14 by a water supply pump 13, and reacts on hydride to generate hydrogen gas of high purity. This hydrogen gas is supplied to the anode side of a fuel cell main body 1 via a hydrogen lead-in line 2 by an H2 circulating pump 3. To the cathode side of the fuel cell main body 1, the low concentration hydrogen peroxide water in a low concentration H2O2 water circulating tank 17 is sent by an H2O2 water circulating pump 18. The hydrogen peroxide water, which has been consumed by the cell reaction, is supplied from a high concentration H2O2 water storage 11 by a high concentration H2O2 water supply pump 20. In order to make the equipment volume compact, for example, a single module construction is adopted, and a storage tank 8 is partitioned by a isolating movable plate 10.

title: Wind power generation hydrogen production energy storage hydrogen supply and backup power generation device
abstract: A wind power generation hydrogen production energy storage hydrogen supply and backup power generation device comprises a wind driven generator, a power source transformation hydrogen production controller, a middle-high pressure water-electrolytic hydrogen manufacturing machine, a hydrogen storage tank, a hydrogen power generating device and a pressure reducing valve. An output end of the wind driven generator is connected with an input end of the power source transformation hydrogen production controller, an output end of the power source transformation hydrogen production controller is connected with a power source input end of the middle-high pressure water-electrolytic hydrogen manufacturing machine, and hydrogen produced by the middle-high pressure water-electrolytic hydrogen manufacturing machine is directly filled in the hydrogen storage tank capable of bearing an identical pressure. An outlet of the hydrogen storage tank is connected with the hydrogen power generating device through a pipeline and supplies power to electrical equipment of a user, the wind driven generator can directly transmit electricity through a contactor to the electrical equipment of the user, and the hydrogen storage tank can be used for being connected with a gas appliance through the pressure reducing valve. The power source transformation hydrogen production controller automatically adjust the electric current and the power of the water-electrolytic hydrogen manufacturing machine according to the power of the wind driven generator and the actual power of the user, and therefore the wind power generation hydrogen production energy storage hydrogen supply and backup power generation device is enabled to make full use of wind energy capable of generating power.

title: Hydrogen Maker and Method by Sodium
abstract:
The present invention relates to a hydrogen generator based on sodium which allows sodium and water to react and generate hydrogen without fear of explosion in a high pressure tank, thereby using the hydrogen as a clean fuel for automobile engines. 
     The high pressure tank and water tank are separated and connected by a water supply pipe so that the water is supplied by the pump, and the sodium hook network is mounted in the reaction tank. By constructing a water reciprocating pipe with a hydrogen gas outlet, a gas leakage prevention valve and a liquid caustic soda outlet that fits the filter and the liquid leakage prevention valve, 
     Hydrogen with excellent explosive power is generated as needed at the place of use, and it is used as a fuel for internal combustion engines with safe production, so that high efficiency clean fuel can be used at low cost.

title: Manufacture of hydrogen storage alloy and electrode
abstract: PURPOSE:To manufacture the alloy which is homogeneous and has good characteristics such as the amt. of hydrogen to be stored with good reproducibility by utilizing at least zircalloy as a starting material. CONSTITUTION:At least zircalloy (Zn-Sn alloy) is used as a starting material, which is melted by a high frequency furnace, an arc furnace or the like to manufacture the hydrogen storage alloy. Preferably, the alloy expressed by general formula ABalpha or its hydride is manufactured. In the formula, A denotes Zr, Ti, Hf, Ta, Y, etc., B denotes Sn or a mixture of Sn and Fe, V, Ni, Cr, Mn or the like, alpha=1.5 to 2.5 and A and B are regulated as different kinds of elements. The alloy phase substantially belongs to a Laves phase of intermetallic compounds and its crystal structure is regulated as the C14 type of hexagonal symmetry or the C15 type of cubic symmetry. The alloy is used to the storage, holding and transportation of hydrogen, a heat pump, material for the negative electrode of an alkali storage battery, etc.

title: Method of operating a fuel cell
abstract: A fuel cell which is operated at a temperature which is not greater than substantially 250°C, has an electrolyte which can be a solid polymer electrolyte, a liquid phosphoric acid electrolyte, or a liquid alkaline electrolyte, and a cathode and an anode each comprising a platinum catalyst.  Hydrogen fuel gas is supplied to the anode and a gaseous oxidant, for example oxygen is supplied to the cathode.  The cathode and anode are both connected to first and second circuits in parallel.  The first circuit includes a load to be powered by the fuel cell and a first switch.  The second circuit includes a battery and a second switch.  The switches are operated by a control.  When the first switch is closed the cell powers the load and second switch is open.  When the first switch is open the second switch is closed so the battery applies a reverse D.C. potential to the anode and cathode.  The first switch is closed and the second switch is open for a time period T1 which is substantially at least ten times greater than time period T2 for which first switch is open and the second switch is closed.  The time period T2 does not exceed substantially 0.25 seconds.  The switches can be relays or solid state electronic switch arrangements.

title: Device and method for heating hydrogen storage canister
abstract: A device for heating hydrogen storage canister includes a canister containing chamber for accommodation of at least one hydrogen storage canister, a catalyst bed arranged in the canister containing chamber for catalysis. A blowing device provides an air flow through an air flow leading pipe to a nozzle section which is connected with a heating gas drawing pipe to the catalyst bed. A heating fuel storage tank supplies heating fuel which is conveyed to the nozzle section through a heating fuel supplying pipeline, a coiled pipe and a heating fuel conveying pipe in sequence. When the air flow flows through the nozzle section, the heating fuel is drawn into the nozzle section to mix with the air flow, forming a heating gas. The heating gas is atomized by the nozzle section and flows to the catalyst bed where the heating gas is catalyzed to burn to generate a hot gas to heat the hydrogen storage canister.

title: Method for filling gaseous hydrogen into hydrogen storage alloy container and the container
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent the formation of a part excessively packed with hydrogen storage alloy powder in a hydrogen storage alloy container and to obviate the deformation and breakage of the container by limiting the maximum flow velocity of the gaseous hydrogen in the axial direction of the container at the time of filling gaseous hydrogen into the container.  
     CONSTITUTION: The cylindrical hydrogen storage alloy container 1 is packed with a hydrogen storage alloy 2, the filling port 3 and discharge port 4 for hydrogen are provided at its one end, and the other end is closed. When gaseous hydrogen is filled into the container 1, the maximum flow velocity (e.g. V 2 ) of the hydrogen in the axial direction of the container 1 is controlled to ≤2.0m/sec. In this method for filling hydrogen, a porous baffle 6 having three- dimensional communicating pores is provided at the filling port 3. Even when the port 3 is connected to a high-pressure hydrogen source at 20 atm, the flow velocity in the container 1 can be easily controlled to ≤2.0m/sec at all times.

text: Powdery material, electrode member, method for manufacturing same and secondary cell There are disclosed a powdery material comprising a hydrogen-storing compound comprising a core layer of a hydrogen-storing alloy coated with a transition metal oxide layer and having a transition metal dispersed and carried on the outermost surface thereof, an electrode member for alkali secondary cells using the powdery material comprising a hydrogen-storing compound, and a secondary cell using the electrode member as an electrode. title: Hydrogen storage alloys having reduced pct hysteresis
abstract: A modified A 2 B 7  type hydrogen storage alloy having reduced hysteresis. The alloy consists of a base A x B y  hydrogen storage alloy, where A includes at least one rare earth element and also includes magnesium, B includes at least nickel, and the atomic ratio of x to y is between 1:2 and 1:5. The base alloy is modified by addition of a modifier element having a relatively small atomic volume such that degree of disorder of the A 2 B 7  alloy is increased, and the absorption/desorption hysteresis of the modified alloy is reduced by at least 10% as compared to the base alloy.

title: Solid-state high-pressure mixing hydrogen storage tank
abstract: The invention belongs to a hydrogen storage technology of the hydrogen energy field, and especially relates to a solid-state high-pressure mixing hydrogen storage tank based on solid hydrogen storage and high-pressure hydrogen storage. A main body of the solid-state high-pressure mixing hydrogen storage tank is a metal liner, and a fiber wound reinforced layer is wound and laid on the outer surface of the metal liner; the metal liner is internally provided with a plurality of close-contact metal square pipes which are fixed by a plurality of supporting rings; both ends of each metal square pipe are respectively welded with supporting and positioning stoppers, each supporting and positioning stopper is provided with a through hole and is provided with a filter sheet, and the metal square pipes are internally filled with hydrogen storage materials; both ends of the metal liner are each provided with an end plug, the end plug at one side is provided with a hydrogen valve, and the end plug at the other side is supplied for a plurality of heat exchange pipes to pass through; main bodies of the heat exchange pipes are uniformly distributed in an array formed by the metal square pipes. The metal hydride hydrogen storage device has the advantages of simple structure, easy fabrication and processing, and the nominal working pressure is not less than 35 MPa, and the hydrogen storage capacity is improved by 50% or more compared with that of a pure high-pressure hydrogen storage tank with the same specification.

title: Fuel cell system
abstract: The object is to provide a simplified but highly efficient fuel cell system, permitting to perform the flame off detection and so on without supplying the burner with additional raw fuel, even if a flame rod system flame detection means is adopted as burner for reformer. The invention concerns a fuel cell system, comprising a reformer for reforming a hydrocarbon base fuel such as natural gas into hydrogen, a CO transformer, a CO eliminator, a fuel cell for generating electricity from hydrogen, and a burner for reformer for burning hydrogen gas discharged from the fuel cell and supply the reformer with heat necessary for reforming reaction, wherein the burner for reformer is provided with a flame rod system flame detection means and, at the same time, supplied with hydrogen gas containing a flame detectable amount of fuel gas.

title: Method and apparatus for generating hydrogen
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a method and an apparatus for generating only hydrogen through a low-temperature reaction.  <P>SOLUTION: In a hydrogen-generating reactor 10, iron carbide 18 is brought into contact with steam or a steam-containing gas (reactant gas) to oxidize and/or hydroxylate the iron carbide and reduce the steam to generate a hydrogen gas, and the hydrogen gas is taken out of an exhaust-gas outlet conduit 22. Here, the thermochemical regeneration effect of iron carbide is enhanced by lowering the reaction temperature to ≤600°C, preferably to 200-500°C, more preferably to 200-400°C, by reducing the steam pressure to the atmospheric pressure or lower, preferably to ≤0.3 atm, more preferably to ≤0.1 atm.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2004,JPO&NCIPI

title: A hydrogen stores device for hydrogen kinetic energy unmanned aerial vehicle
abstract: The invention discloses a hydrogen storage device for a hydrogen kinetic energy unmanned aerial vehicle, which comprises a rectangular box body, wherein one end of the rectangular box body is provided with a gas cylinder storage mechanism, the other end of the rectangular box body is provided with a gas cylinder moving mechanism, and the middle position of the rectangular box body is provided with an inflation fixing mechanism. The invention has the advantages that the safety hidden danger when the hydrogen cylinder is supplied can be reduced while the supply efficiency is improved, the hydrogen cylinder can be orderly placed under the action of the gas cylinder storage mechanism, the storage effect is realized, the use is convenient, the leakage during the inflation can be effectively prevented under the action of the inflation fixing mechanism, the stability of the device is improved, and the device can serve as a small-sized mobile supply station.

title: Hydrogen storage alloy electrode and sealed nickel hydrogen storage battery using this electrode
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [PROBLEMS] To provide a hydrogen storage alloy electrode having a large discharge capacity, an excellent charge-discharge cycle life, and an excessive increase in the battery internal pressure during rapid charging. A mixture containing a hydrogen storage alloy powder, a styrene-butadiene copolymer in which the weight ratio of styrene and butadiene is 100: 30 to 100, a polymer substance that imparts hydrophilicity to the electrode, and carbon black. A hydrogen storage alloy electrode comprising a punching metal of a conductive support that supports the mixture, and a water repellent that imparts water repellency to the electrode surface. Punching metal is perforated in a perforation pattern in which the apex angle of a triangle formed by connecting the centers of three adjacent holes is an isosceles triangle smaller than both base angles, and at least one pair of relative holes is formed at the end of the perforation part. It has a plain part facing.

title: Method for preparing hydrogen from water and water fuel cell
abstract: The invention relates to a method for preparing hydrogen from water and NaxS2O4-5 (wherein X is in a range of 2 to 4) or SO2 through a chemical circular reaction, and a water fuel cell used for hydrogen production and power generation. Compared with a traditional method for preparing hydrogen from water, the method provided by the invention has the following advantages: energy consumption is reduced by more than 90%, exhaust gas, waste water and waste residue are not discharged during the preparation process, the method does not involve problems in storage and transportation of hydrogen or problems in establishment of a corresponding hydrogenation station, and the method is combined with a conventional hydrogen internal combustion engine, hydrogen fuel boiler or oxyhydrogen fuel cell for development and application of a hydrogen motor vehicle or hydrogen energy power generation station.

title: hydride reactor using device detecting a charging height of hydrogen storage alloy
abstract: PURPOSE: A reactor charged with a hydrogen storage alloy is provided to achieve improved reliability for the product adopting the reactor, by accurately displaying the replacement timing of the reactor. CONSTITUTION: A reactor comprises a reaction container(51) connected to a distribution pipe serving as a hydrogen passage; a hydrogen flow pipe(52) arranged within the reaction container in such a manner that a hydrogen flow channel(52a) is formed and the hydrogen flowing along the hydrogen flow channel is introduced/discharged into/from the internal space of the reaction container; a hydrogen storage alloy(53) filling the internal space formed between the reaction container and the hydrogen flow pipe, which performs an exothermic reaction during absorption of hydrogen and an endothermic reaction during discharge of hydrogen; and a level detection unit(54) mounted to the reaction container, which detects the level of the hydrogen storage alloy and transmits the signal obtained from the result of detection to a control unit so as to permits the control unit to recognize the replacement timing of the reactor.

title: Hydrogen generator and fuel cell using the same
abstract: A hydrogen generator using a chemical hydride includes a reactor which stores an aqueous solution of chemical hydride, a catalyst which catalyzes the reaction of the aqueous solution of chemical hydride and water to generate hydrogen, a transferring device for transferring the catalyst into the aqueous solution of chemical hydride and after bring the catalyst into contact with the aqueous solution of chemical hydride within a predetermined time, separating them, and a temperature controller to maintain temperature of the aqueous solution of chemical hydride at a predetermined temperature.

title: Method and apparatus for hydrogen storage and retrieval
abstract: A method is provided for delivering gaseous hydrogen to end users, the hydrogen being delivered in reusable storage tanks containing a plurality of carbon nanotubes. Liquid hydrogen is introduced into the tank, and the nanotubes absorb the hydrogen. The tanks are then warmed to normal temperatures and distributed to end users. The tanks are connected to the end-user system and are preferably installed within an air-tight enclosure, which may have an inert atmosphere. Alternatively, an inerting system monitors the air within the enclosure for free hydrogen and can release an inerting gas if free hydrogen is detected. The hydrogen is selectively released by heating the storage tank or by injecting a catalyst into the tank. When the usable hydrogen is depleted, the tank is retrieved from the end user for refurbishment and refilling.
text: Method and apparatus for hydrogen storage and retrieval A method is provided for delivering gaseous hydrogen to end users, the hydrogen being delivered in reusable storage tanks containing a plurality of carbon nanotubes. Liquid hydrogen is introduced into the tank, and the nanotubes absorb the hydrogen. The tanks are then warmed to normal temperatures and distributed to end users. The tanks are connected to the end-user system and are preferably installed within an air-tight enclosure, which may have an inert atmosphere. Alternatively, an inerting system monitors the air within the enclosure for free hydrogen and can release an inerting gas if free hydrogen is detected. The hydrogen is selectively released by heating the storage tank or by injecting a catalyst into the tank. When the usable hydrogen is depleted, the tank is retrieved from the end user for refurbishment and refilling.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR GENERATING HYDROGEN GAS
abstract: A system for producing gaseous hydrogen (100) comprises an enclosure (110) formed of a side wall (111), a front bottom (112) and a rear bottom (113), the enclosure enclosing a or multiple unit loads (200) of a material capable of generating hydrogen gas under thermal stress. Each unit load (200) comprises a cylindrical body (210) comprising a closed rear bottom (211) and a front bottom (212) having an opening (2130). Blocks (220) of material capable of generating hydrogen gas under thermal stress are present inside the cylindrical body (210), each block having an annular shape defining a central channel (201) opening at the level of the opening (2130) of the front end (212) of the cylindrical body (210). Each unit load also includes an initiator (230) present in the vicinity of the rear bottom (211) of the cylindrical body (210).

title: Compound hydrogen storage alloy, hydrogen storage tank for fuel battery, multilayer structure, and method of producing compound hydrogen storage alloy
abstract: A composite hydrogen storage alloy, a hydrogen storage tank for a fuel cell, a multi-layer structure, and a composite hydrogen, which are relatively low in temperature, have a large amount of hydrogen storage per unit weight, can prevent pulverization, and are both lightweight and compact. Provided is a method for manufacturing an occlusion alloy.   A Mg alloy / Ti alloy / Ni alloy multilayer structure is formed by stacking a total of three Mg alloy sheets, a Ti alloy sheet, and a Ni alloy sheet, and winding the Mg alloy core rod on an Mg alloy core rod. After forming the sheet No. 1 and performing a drawing process or a rolling process to reduce the thickness of each sheet to a submicron level or less, a heat treatment is performed at 500 to 650 ° C. title: Hydrogen production method, energy production method in a hybrid vehicle, energy production system in a hybrid vehicle, and hybrid vehicle
abstract: The present invention pertains to the electric energy industry, more specifically to an ethanol dehydrogenation system which converts ethanol into a more energy-rich fuel for use in combustion engines, at the same time as producing hydrogen without carbon monoxide, which is led to a fuel cell for producing electric energy for the subsequent electric and/or hybrid propulsion of motor vehicles. The present invention preferably relates to a method for producing energy in a hybrid vehicle, comprising the following steps: (a) providing a catalytic reactor (5); (b) feeding the catalytic reactor (5) with a stream of evaporated fuel; (c) leading the evaporated reagents to the catalytic reactor (5); (d) performing liquid fuel dehydrogenation reactions in the catalytic reactor (5); (e) cooling the output stream so as to separate the gaseous stream (9) from the liquid fuel stream; (f) supplying the liquid stream to an internal combustion engine (8) to generate energy, or returning the liquid stream to the catalytic reactor (5); (g) capturing an air stream (11); and (h) leading the gaseous stream (9) to the anode of the fuel cell (10) and the air stream (11) to the cathode of the fuel cell (10) to generate electric energy. In addition, the present invention describes a system for producing energy in a hybrid vehicle and a hybrid vehicle which use this method.

title: High-pressure hydrogen producing device
abstract: A high-pressure hydrogen production apparatus that can easily recover and use dissolved hydrogen contained in moisture separated from high-pressure hydrogen gas generated by a hydrogen generator.   A hydrogen generating device that generates hydrogen containing water and discharges it at a predetermined pressure; a first gas-liquid separating device that separates water from the generated hydrogen and recovers hydrogen; and a gas-liquid And a decompression device 4 for decompressing and discharging the water separated from the separation device 3. A second gas-liquid separation device 5 that separates dissolved hydrogen from water discharged from the decompression device 4 and recovers hydrogen is provided. A hydrogen compression device 11 is provided that compresses the hydrogen recovered by the gas-liquid separator 5 and adds it to the hydrogen recovered by the gas-liquid separator 3. The hydrogen compression device 11 is a solid polymer type hydrogen compression device 41. The hydrogen generator 2 is a solid polymer water electrolyzer 21. The polymer electrolyte water electrolyzer 21 is connected in series and integrally with a polymer electrolyte hydrogen compressor 41.   [Selection] Figure 1

abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of hydrogen fuel cells, and discloses a hydrogen fuel cell assembly system, which comprises the following devices: fuel cell module, hydrogen supply module, oxygen suppliment module and cooling module, the fuel cell module is fuel cell system host computer, and the inside of fuel cell system host computer contains KW fuel cell module, the hydrogen supply module includes nozzle valve, ejector pump, condenser, pile nitrogen discharging valve and drain valve, and the nozzle valve is connected with the ejector pump, and the ejector pump is connected with the condenser, and the condenser is connected with pile nitrogen discharging valve and drain valve respectively, the oxygen suppliment module is including mixing row device, throttle valve, humidifier, intercooler, air compressor machine, air flowmeter and filter. title: Alternating system for reformer of hydrogen station
abstract: A system for substituting a reformer of a hydrogen station is provided to ensure smooth hydrogen supply to a compressor when a reformer does not supply hydrogen sufficiently. A system for substituting a reformer of a hydrogen station that provides hydrogen generated in the reformer(20) to a compressor, comprises: a hydrogen cartridge(10) connected at one side of a reformer to a compressor and a second line; and a controller that allows a first solenoid valve to be closed to interrupt hydrogen supply from the reformer when the hydrogen pressure at the outlet of the reformer is lower than a predetermined pressure, and a second solenoid valve in the second line to be opened to supply hydrogen to the hydrogen cartridge.

title: Hydrogen storage ni-zr series alloy and closed-type ni-hydrogen storage battery
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain the hydrogen storage Ni-Zr series alloy having high hydrogen occluding and discharging capacity, low dissociation pressure of equilibrium hydrogen and excellent alkali resistance at a low cost by specifying the compsn. constituted of Ti, Zr, Mn, W, Fe, Cu and Ni.  
     CONSTITUTION: The hydrogen storage Ni-Zr series alloy has the compsn. contg., by weight, 5 to 20% Ti, 10 to 37% Zr, 5 to 30% Mn, 0.01 to 15% W, 1 to 30% Fe and 0.1 to 16% Cu, furthermore contg., at need, one or both of 0.05 to 6% Cr and 0.01 to 5% Al and the balance Ni with inevitable impurities and has an MgZn 2 -type crystal structure, which has corrosion resistance and durability in an alkaline electrolytic soln., has high hydrogen occluding and discharging capacity and low dissociation pressure of equilibrium hydrogen in the region of room temp., is hard to pulverize, causes no pollution and is low-cost. Thus, by using the alloy as the active material in the negative electrode, the closed type Ni-hydrogen storage battery having high discharging capacity and showing preferable capacity such as prolonged charging-discharging cycle life, excellent rapid chargingdischarging properties and low self-discharging can be obtd.

title: Hydrogen gas supplier for hydrogen-cooled electrical rotary machine
abstract:
PURPOSE: To reduce consumption of hydrogen gas and to eliminate troublesome operation of automatic discharge valve by opening an automatic control valve when the temperature in the machine is higher than a predetermined level and the pressure in the machine is lower than a predetermined level.  
     CONSTITUTION: An automatic control valve 10 is fixed in parallel with a manual sealing valve 6 in a hydrogen gas encapsulated tube 4. The automatic control valve 10 is connected electrically with a pressure sensor 9 for detecting the gas pressure in the machine and a temperature sensor 11 for detecting the temperature of gas. When the value fed from the temperature sensor 11 is higher than a predetermined level and the value fed from the pressure sensor 9 is lower than a predetermined level, the automatic control valve 10 opens. By such arrangement, consumption of hydrogen gas can be reduced and troublesome operation of the automatic discharge valve 6 can be eliminated. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1990,JPO&Japio

title: Fuel cell system
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a fuel cell system in which power generation can be started at an early stage, and in which hydrogen gas is not consumed wastefully.  <P>SOLUTION: In requesting starting of the fuel cell, hydrogen and air are supplied, and by opening a hydrogen discharge valve, it is determined whether hydrogen gas is discharged in a prescribed amount or not. When the minimum cell voltage reaches a first prescribed value, before the prescribed amount of fuel gas is discharged, power generation is started at that time point. Furthermore, in case the minimum cell voltage does not reach the first prescribed value even if the hydrogen gas is discharged in the prescribed amount, it is reduced to a second prescribed value, and when it reaches the second prescribed value, the power generation is started.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2005,JPO&NCIPI

title: Method for selective concentration and separative purification of hydrogen gas
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain concentrated hydrogen gas or high-purity hydrogen gas economically, in high efficiency, by treating a hydrogen-containing mixed gas by a pressure-cycle process using a composite of zeolite and activated carbon.  
     CONSTITUTION: A calcined composite of zeolite and activated carbon is used for refining crude hydrogen gas containing various kinds of hydrocarbon vapors and inorganic gases to high-purity hydrogen gas. Fine powder of A type synthetic zeolite is mixed with equal amount of the powder of activated carbon, added with bentonite as an inorganic binder, kneaded under wet condition with water and methyl cellulose, dried, and calcined to obtain an activated composite wherein the ratio of bentonite to activated carbon is 0.25W8.0. A gaseous mixture 53 containing about 50% of H 2  is supplied to a plurality of adsorption columns 46W 50 packed with the composite as adsorbent, and the adsorption and desorption of the impurities are repeated by repeating the increase, retention and decrease of the pressure of the supplied gas in the course of passing through the columns. A concentrated high-purity H 2  gas 55 is obtained as the product. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1984,JPO&Japio

title: Aluminum-based alloy for generation of hydrogen, method of production of such alloy and hydrogen gas generator
abstract:
FIELD: alloys for generation of hydrogen. 
     SUBSTANCE: alloy may be used in internal combustion engines working on hydrogen fuel and electric motor cars using hydrogen electrochemical generators. Aluminum-based alloy contains aluminum and dehydrated hydroxide of alkali metal up to 10% by weight or dehydrated hydroxide of alkali metal and copper up to 5%; total amount of these additives shall not exceed 10%. Method of production of such alloy includes placing the dehydrated hydroxide of alkali metal on crucible bottom with layer of aluminum laid over it; copper may be also added if necessary; melting is performed in induction furnace in vacuum at 0.2-0.5 atm and inert gas-shielded atmosphere. First hydroxide of alkali metal is molten and aluminum (and copper, if necessary) is molten in this melt at temperature of 660 C. Hydrogen gas generator includes reactor made in form of heat exchanger whose plates or tubes are filled with water. 
     EFFECT: low cost of process; increased productivity. 
     5 cl, 1 dwg
text: Aluminum-based alloy for generation of hydrogen, method of production of such alloy and hydrogen gas generator FIELD: alloys for generation of hydrogen. SUBSTANCE: alloy may be used in internal combustion engines working on hydrogen fuel and electric motor cars using hydrogen electrochemical generators. Aluminum-based alloy contains aluminum and dehydrated hydroxide of alkali metal up to 10% by weight or dehydrated hydroxide of alkali metal and copper up to 5%; total amount of these additives shall not exceed 10%. Method of production of such alloy includes placing the dehydrated hydroxide of alkali metal on crucible bottom with layer of aluminum laid over it; copper may be also added if necessary; melting is performed in induction furnace in vacuum at 0.2-0.5 atm and inert gas-shielded atmosphere. First hydroxide of alkali metal is molten and aluminum (and copper, if necessary) is molten in this melt at temperature of 660 C. Hydrogen gas generator includes reactor made in form of heat exchanger whose plates or tubes are filled with water. EFFECT: low cost of process; increased productivity. 5 cl, 1 dwg

title: Hydrogen gas generation system
abstract: A system for generating hydrogen gas utilizes a volume exchange housing for the storage of a fuel material that reacts to generate hydrogen gas and a hydrogen separation chamber. The system includes a gas permeable membrane or membranes that allow hydrogen gas to pass through the membrane while preventing aqueous solutions from passing therethrough. The system is orientation independent. A throttle valve is also used to self regulate the reaction generating the hydrogen gas.

title: Electrolysis system for generating hydrogen gas
abstract: An electrolysis system which comprises a generator adapted to hold water and gases with a first and second electrode, a bubbler reservoir connected to the generator via hoses adapted to dispense water from the bubbler reservoir into the generator and adapted to allow oxygen and hydrogen gas from the generator to rise into the bubbler reservoir with dryers adapted to hold water and gases fluidly, deliver oxygen and hydrogen gas, to hold acetic add and gases, and adapted to connect to an engine, allowing hydrogen gas to pass to the engine, and a controller connected with electrodes to provide an electric current so that water in the generator is converted to oxygen and hydrogen gas via standard electrolysis.

title: Energy conversion system
abstract: This invention relates to a method and apparatus for converting energy to hydrogen gas using an electrolyzer and a metal alloy hydride tank for hydrogen storage, wherein a passive load matching device between the energy source and the electrolyzer maximizes hydrogen output, and the electrolyzer and the metal alloy hydride tank operate at mutually low pressure, near ambient, such that pressurization of the system is not required.

title: Fuel cell system comprises a fuel cell and a gas producing system for producing a hydrogen-containing gas for the fuel cell
abstract: Fuel cell system comprises a fuel cell (3) and a gas producing system (2) for producing a hydrogen-containing gas for the fuel cell. The gas producing system has a device (19) for introducing a gaseous fuel. The gaseous fuel is introduced into the gas producing system in a region before the reformer stage (8). An Independent claim is also included for a process for starting up a fuel cell system comprising initially introducing a gaseous fuel into the gas producing system and controlling the combustion in a catalytic burner (15, 16). Preferred Features: The gaseous fuel is produced from a liquid starting material methanol (CH3OH) or a mixture of water and CH3OH. The device for introducing the gaseous fuel is formed as a pyrolysis stage or a partial oxidation stage.

title: Tank for high pressure hydrogen gas, and piping
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a high-pressure hydrogen gas tank for storing high-pressure hydrogen gas at a pressure of 0.1-80 MPa for a long time, repeating to be filled with high-pressure hydrogen gas to the maximum 80 MPa and to discharge hydrogen gas to the minimum 0.1 MPa, and to restrict intrusion of hydrogen into high-pressure hydrogen gas piping for transproting high-pressure hydrogen gas, of which the pressure fluctuates within a range at 0.1-80 MPa.  <P>SOLUTION: As a material for this high-pressure hydrogen gas tank and the high-pressure hydrogen gas piping, a stainless steel containing an appropriate quantity of C, Si, P, S, Mn, Ni, Cr and N is used, and this stainless steel has an aluminum layer formed from aluminum or an aluminum alloy and having a thickness of 100 nm to 10 mm in a surface to be brought in contact with hydrogen gas. This stainless steel can, furthermore, contain one or two kinds or more of Mo, Nb, Ti and B. The high-pressure hydrogen gas tank or outside of the high-pressure hydrogen gas piping is desirably formed with a reinforced layer of carbon fibers.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2005,JPO&NCIPI

title: System and method for storing and discharging hydrogen
abstract: A hydrogen fuel system comprises an open gas circuit that includes a source of hydrogen. The hydrogen fuel system also includes a compressor that forces a flow of hydrogen from the source of hydrogen through the open gas circuit, and a hydrogen storage vessel comprising an inlet and an outlet. The hydrogen fuel system may also include a hydrogen storage bed being disposed within the hydrogen storage vessel between the inlet and the outlet, the hydrogen storage vessel being adapted to form a portion of the open gas circuit so that the hydrogen storage bed is cooled by convection while hydrogen flows through the open gas circuit.

title: Hydrogen storage alloy and preparation method thereof and cathode and battery using same
abstract: The invention discloses a hydrogen storage alloy for a nickel-hydrogen battery cathode. The hydrogen storage alloy comprises the following components: La1-XMXNiaAlbNc, wherein X is more than or equal to 0.01 and less than or equal to 0.5; a is more than or equal to 2.0 and less than or equal to 3.0; b is more than or equal to 0.2 and less than or equal to 0.6; c is more than or equal to 0.1 and less than or equal to 0.3; a+b+c is more than or equal to 2.5 and less than or equal to 3.2; M is one or more than two elements of Si, Cr, V, Ti and Li; and N is one or more than two elements of Co, Mn, Cu, Fe and Sn. La in the alloy is replaced by adding a metal M part, so that the hydrogen storage alloy for the nickel-hydrogen battery cathode which has the advantages of easy smelting, high discharge capacity and long cycle life is obtained.

abstract: The invention discloses a kind of device for making of the hydrogen storage material of graphene doping, structure includes controller, radiating groove, fixed lower margin, charge platform, produces mouth, produces tank, control host, doping tank.It is by scraping hopper when the graphene raw material that the present invention adulterates in tank enters, and hopper and discharge ring are scraped as fixed setting, pulverization process is carried out by dialling to draw in the region that raw material was guided to discharge ring and ground union thimble cooperation by block when grinding mechanism rotation, then enter in dispersed components thereof and carries out dispersion blanking, can be avoided blanking in heaps causes hydrogen permeability to decline, and gas pressure mechanism can generate gas under the drive of built-in drive shaft and carry out pneumatic control to dispersed components thereof, the case where avoiding the occurrence of graphene raw material blocking, after whole use high-precision crushing can be carried out to crystalline flake graphite, and it effectively prevent raw material to agglomerate in blanking operation, form the state of powdery whereabouts, substantially increase the permeability of hydrogen doping, hydrogen storage effect is higher.

title: Synthesize hydrogen fuel and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of synthesis hydrogen fuel and preparation method thereof, the preparation method of the synthesis hydrogen fuel includes the following steps：(1) reactor will be entered after carbon dioxide pressurization to react under the effect of the catalyst with the methane after pressurization, the mass ratio of carbon dioxide and methane is (1 3)：(1 3), reaction temperature are 640 1340 DEG C, and reaction pressure is 5 80kg/cm 2 , mixed gas is obtained after reaction；(2) synthesis hydrogen fuel is obtained after mixing mixed gas and hydrogen stabilizer.The present invention is using methane and carbon dioxide as primary raw material, the mixed gas containing hydrogen, carbon monoxide, methane is synthesized by catalyst, hydrogen molecule stabilizer can be made by adding, and the long-distance synthesis hydrogen fuel transported safely can be satisfied the use demand and carry out by being made.The fuel gas has many advantages, such as that fuel value is high, nontoxic, safety non-pollution.

title: Refining method of gaseous hydrogen
abstract:
PURPOSE: To refine inexpensively gaseous hydrogen to high purity with a simple installation by joining at least a set of gaseous hydrogen storage tanks contg. a hydrogen occluding alloy in series, connecting heat-exchangeably the same to each other and occluding and releasing successively gaseous hydrogen.  
     CONSTITUTION: A gaseous hydrogen storage tank 4 in a front stage contg. a hydrogen occluding alloy 5 such as a Ti-Mn alloy or the like having a high equil. hydrogen pressure and a gaseous hydrogen storage tank 7 in a rear stage contg. a hydrogen occluding alloy 8 such as an Mn-Ni alloy having the equil. hydrogen pressure lower than said pressure are joined in series by means of a connecting pipe 10, and both storage tanks 4, 7 are connected heat exchangeably to each other by means of a heat exchanging pipe 19 through a circulation pump 18. The high pressure gaseous hydrogen in a bomb 1 is introduced through a gaseous hydrogen supply pipe 3 into the tank 4 where the gaseous hydrogen is occluded in the alloy in the above-mentioned constitution; at the same time, the hydrogen occluded in the tank 7 is released from a refined gas supply pipe 14. The release in the tank 4 and the occlusion in the tank 7 are accomplished in the succeeding stage. The heat generated by the occlusion is utilized by a heat exchange for the absorption of the heat required for the release. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1984,JPO&Japio

abstract: The present invention relates to the method that the alcoholysis/hydrolysis of a kind of utilization boron hydride and bio-ethanol produces hydrogen.The invention belongs to hydrogen storage and hydrogen producing technology field.It is characterized in：Boron hydride is dissolved in bio-ethanol feed liquid, in the presence of catalyst, hydrogen is produced by alcoholysis/hydrolysis.Raw material bio-ethanol can be prepared by biomass by fermentation technique, belong to renewable resource, environment-friendly.Bio-ethanol feed liquid (concentration of alcohol is 5~15vol%), without purification, can be used directly.Below 0 DEG C, reaction possesses Acclimation temperature scope wider to bio-ethanol feed liquid freezing point.Product is harmless, by recyclable ethanol after hydrolysis and separation.The inventive method process is simple, environment-friendly, Applicable temperature scope are wide, are had a extensive future in portable hydrogen field.

title: Fuel cell system and fuel cell system control method
abstract: A fuel cell system includes a fuel cell containing a unit cell with an anode and a cathode included therein, a hydrogen supply unit that supplies hydrogen gas to the anode, a circulation pump that supplies an anode exhaust gas containing hydrogen that has not been used for power generation by the fuel cell and is discharged from the anode, once again to the anode to circulate the anode exhaust gas, and a controller that controls supply quantity of the hydrogen gas by the hydrogen supply unit as well as rotating speed of the circulation pump. The controller drives the circulation pump so that the rotating speed of the circulation pump approaches an optimum rotating speed of the circulation pump at which a total hydrogen loss quantity becomes a minimum under a specified current value, the total hydrogen loss quantity being a sum of a hydrogen quantity corresponding to an electric power necessary for driving the circulation pump and a hydrogen quantity passing from anode side to cathode side of the fuel cell.

The controller drives the circulation pump so that the rotating speed of the circulation pump approaches an optimum rotating speed of the circulation pump at which a total hydrogen loss quantity becomes a minimum under a specified current value, the total hydrogen loss quantity being a sum of a hydrogen quantity corresponding to an electric power necessary for driving the circulation pump and a hydrogen quantity passing from anode side to cathode side of the fuel cell.

title: Hydrogen fuel power tramcar
abstract: The invention provides a hydrogen fuel powered tramcar, comprising: a hydrogen fuel cell, a vehicle operating device, a conductive device, and a control device; the hydrogen fuel cell is used for providing electric energy for the vehicle working device, and the vehicle working device can at least drive the hydrogen fuel power tramcar to run when receiving the electric energy; the conductive device has a conductive property; and when receiving the closing instruction, the control device controls the hydrogen fuel cell to stop supplying electric energy to the vehicle working device and closes the hydrogen energy source cell, and controls the electric conduction device to receive the electric energy generated by the hydrogen energy source cell. In summary, the conductive device receives the electrical energy generated by the hydrogen energy cell, so that the electrical energy generated by the hydrogen fuel cell flows through the conductive device and is consumed by the conductive device, thereby effectively protecting the hydrogen fuel cell.

title: Driver interactive system for reducing the possibility of a static discharge during the refill of high pressure storage tanks in hydrogen fuel cell powered vehicles
abstract: A driver interactive system to indirectly monitor hydrogen fuel cell vehicle electrical charge potential through vehicle to ground resistance measurements, and to permit refueling only when vehicle to ground resistance does not exceed a predetermined safe level thereby reducing the possibility of a static discharge during the refill of high pressure storage tanks in hydrogen powered vehicles.

title: Method for producing hydrogen storage alloy particles and sealed-type nickel-metal hydride storage battery using the same
abstract: A method for manufacturing hydrogen storage alloy particles comprises steps of obtaining a melt of the hydrogen storage alloy and pulverizing the hydrogen storage alloy by water atomizing process, whereby the melt is pulverized by contacting or colliding with high-speed jetting thereto to be dispersed in the form of solidified fine particles. By employing an aqueous solution of hypophosphorous acid or an alkali aqueous solution in place of water during the water atomizing process, or by etching the oxide films once formed on the surface of the hydrogen storage alloy particles with an aqueous solution of a strong acid, the thickness of the oxide film can be made thinner, and thus a high discharge capacity of a battery configured with a negative electrode comprising the alloy particles can be realized.

title: Hydrogen production catalyst
abstract: The purpose of present invention is to provide a hydrogen production catalyst to continuously decompose water for a long period of time to produce hydrogen by using only a small amount of thereof. Disclosed solving means is that the hydrogen production catalyst decomposes water to produce hydrogen by contacting with water under non-oxidative environment and the temperature of greater than 300 DEG C, and contains: a metal combination of Ni and one metal selected from the group consisting of free Pt, Pd and Cr, or a pair of metals selected from the combination of Cr and Pd; and an alkali capable of maintaining surface activity of the metal. By means of preparing said hydrogen production catalyst (3) in the reaction container (2) under non-oxidative environment and temperature of 300 DEG C-650 DEG C, the hydrogen production catalyst (3) contacts with water to decompose it to produce hydrogen.

title: Hydrogen fuel cell monofilm electrode test apparatus
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of hydrogen fuel cell monofilm electrode test apparatus comprising air supply unit, heating unit, reaction member and power measurement unit；Reaction member includes the anode fixed plate stacked gradually, anode insulating layer, anode current collector plate, anode plate, cathode plate, cathode collector plate, cathode insulation layer and cathode fixed plate, and tested membrane electrode is clipped between anode plate and cathode plate；Air inlet and air outlet are designed in anode plate and cathode plate；Serpentine flow path slot, two connection air inlet and air outlet of serpentine flow path slot are provided in the one side that anode plate and cathode plate are contacted with membrane electrode；Two air inlets all pass through conduit and connect air supply unit.Air supply unit provides fuel gas, heating unit heats anode plate and cathode plate.Two kinds of gases enter substrate from two air inlets respectively, react under the catalysis of membrane electrode, generate electric current, power measurement unit detects the output power of reaction member, to obtain test result.

title: High Purity Hydrogen and Electric Power Co-Generation Apparatus and Method
abstract: An apparatus to produce high purity hydrogen and electricity is disclosed in one embodiment of the invention as including a fuel cell configured to convert the chemical energy of a fuel to electricity and heat. An electrolyzer cell is placed in electrical and thermal communication with the fuel cell and is configured to electrolyze an oxygen-containing compound, such as steam or carbon dioxide, using the electricity and heat generated by the fuel cell. In selected embodiments, the fuel cell and electrolyzer cell are physically integrated into a single electrochemical cell stack.

title: High storage capacity alloys enabling a hydrogen-based ecosystem
abstract: Hydrogen propelled vehicles and fundamentally new magnesium-based hydrogen storage alloy materials which for the first time make it feasible and practical to use solid state storage and delivery of hydrogen to power internal combustion engine or fuel cell vehicles. These exceptional alloys have remarkable hydrogen storage capacity of well over 6 weight % coupled with extraordinary absorption kinetics such that the alloy powder absorbs 80 % of its total capacity within 2 minutes at 300 °C.

title: Hydrogen storage apparatus
abstract: PURPOSE:To get up speeds for absorbing and discharging hydrogen in such a way that plural independent chambers are provided in a vessel capable of hermetically enclosing, metal hydride is incorporated in each chamber, and hydrogen inlet bores are provided. CONSTITUTION:A hydrogen inlet chamber 6 is provided between the vessel 1 and the internal bulkhead of the vessel 1 by arranging a cylindrical body 5 in the vessel 1 which is made of metal in bottomed cylindrical shape capable of hermetically enclosing. A hydrogen inlet port 7 to each independent chamber is provided in this cylindrical body 5, metal hydride 10 is incorporated in each chamber 12 by forming independent chambers 12 with use of plural partition plates 11, porous interval materials 15 are inserted in the metal hydride 10. Thus, even though cycles of hydrogen absorption and discharge are repeated for a long period, absorbing and discharging hydrogen can get up speeds by uniformly dispersing all the metal hydride in each chamber.

title: Hydrogen generating device and feul cell system comprising it
abstract: A hydrogen generating device is provided to generate a large amount of hydrogen using a hydrogen storage solution and facilitate a controlling process of generating hydrogen. A hydrogen generating device comprises a micro channel(124), a gas liquid isolation film(127), a fuel inlet(128) and a fuel outlet(129). The micro channel whose one side is open has a circulated hydrogen storage solution such as a NaBH4 solution inside. The gas liquid isolation film covers the open side of the micro channel. The fuel inlet supplies the hydrogen storage solution to the micro channel. The fuel outlet discharges the hydrogen storage solution which is used for a hydrogen separation reaction to the micro channel.

title: Honeycomb hydrogen storage structure
abstract: Heat transfer management/compartmentalization system for a metal hydride hydrogen storage containment unit. The hydrogen storage alloy is preferably divided into compartments having a honeycomb configuration. Mass transfer hydrogen diffusion channels formed after repeated hydrogen absorption/desorption located in the compartments aid in transfer of hydrogen throughout the hydrogen storage containment unit. Heat exchanger tubing is placed through the compartments to promote heat transfer between the hydrogen storage alloy and the exterior environment.

title: Hydrogen filling system, hydrogen filling method, movable body, and hydrogen filling device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To enhance the reliability of operation for inhibiting a temperature rise in a hydrogen tank during filling of hydrogen.SOLUTION: A hydrogen filling system for supplementing hydrogen gas from the hydrogen filling device to the hydrogen tank includes: a hydrogen filling path bringing a hydrogen filling device side in communication with the hydrogen tank and supplying hydrogen gas to the hydrogen tank; a hydrogen gas return flow path bringing the hydrogen tank into communication with the hydrogen filling device side and leading hydrogen gas in the hydrogen tank to the hydrogen filling device side; an opening and closing valve provided in the hydrogen gas return flow path; and a return state switching control part switching the opening and closing valve from a valve close state to a valve open state while continuing supply of hydrogen gas through the hydrogen filling path if the interior of the hydrogen tank corresponds to a predetermined high-temperature state when hydrogen is filled from the hydrogen filling device to the hydrogen tank.

title: (ti,zr)-cr-v alloy with hydrogen storaging capacity
abstract: PURPOSE: A hydrogen storage alloy capable of storing hydrogen in high density and effectively absorbing and releasing hydrogen in the vicinity of ordinary temperature by a reversible reaction with hydrogen is provided, which can be effectively used for storage and transportation of hydrogen. CONSTITUTION: The hydrogen storage alloy of a general formula: Tia-xCr(1-a-b)+(x-y)Vb+y is obtained by heat treatment of a Ti-Cr-V alloy and a Ti-Zr-Cr-V alloy controlled by a composition ratio(Ti/Cr) of Ti and Cr. In formula, a, b, x and y are each 0.32≤a≤0.36, 0.14≤b≤0.18, a+b=0.50, 0≤x≤0.18, y=2.67x.

title: Activated magnesium boride materials for hydrogen storage
abstract: Some embodiments described herein provide for methods for synthesizing magnesium borohydride from hydrogenation of magnesium boride at moderate temperature and pressure in the presence of a modifier. The modifier may be in form of hydrides, liquid hydrogen carriers, ammonia borane, metallic species, croconate anion based materials, ethers, amines or imines, metal carbides, borides, graphene, arenes, magnesium, aluminum, calcium or ionic liquids. Some embodiments provide for charging magnesium boride in presence of a modifier at high pressure hydrogen while simultaneously heating the material. The modification in some instances may lead to an improved magnesium boride product with enhanced properties for application in other hydrogen storage systems.

title: Fuel cell vehicle and control method for fuel cell vehicle
abstract: A fuel cell vehicle includes a lid, a switch, a sensor, and circuitry. The lid opens and closes a fuel inlet through which fuel gas is to be supplied to a tank. The switch takes an opening position to open the lid and a closing position to close the lid. The sensor detects whether the lid opens or closes the fuel inlet. The circuitry is configured to prohibit the fuel cell vehicle from travelling when the sensor detects that the lid opens the fuel inlet while the switch takes the opening position.
text: Fuel cell vehicle and control method for fuel cell vehicle A fuel cell vehicle includes a lid, a switch, a sensor, and circuitry. The lid opens and closes a fuel inlet through which fuel gas is to be supplied to a tank. The switch takes an opening position to open the lid and a closing position to close the lid. The sensor detects whether the lid opens or closes the fuel inlet. The circuitry is configured to prohibit the fuel cell vehicle from travelling when the sensor detects that the lid opens the fuel inlet while the switch takes the opening position.

title: Hydrogen production catalyst as well as preparation method thereof and catalytic hydrogen production method using same
abstract: The invention provides a hydrogen production catalyst as well as a preparation method thereof and a catalytic hydrogen production method using the same. The catalyst comprises a carrier and an active component coated on the carrier. The preparation method of the catalyst comprises the following steps of: (1) coating the active component on the carrier; (2) sintering the carrier at a high temperature to form an alloy; and (3) carrying out chemical surface activation treatment. The prepared catalyst can be used for hydrolyzing hydroboron to produce hydrogen. The preparation method provided by the invention is simple in molding and the prepared catalyst has the advantages of fixed shape, good responsiveness, high specific surface area and high strength; when being used for catalyzing, the catalyst is easy to control and can be continuously used for a long period of time; and the catalysis rate of the catalyst in a hydrogen production process is high.

title: Piping system for ciculation of hydrogen
abstract:
The present invention uses a hydrogen storage alloy to form a cooling / heating air conditioning system, a refrigeration system, a refrigeration system, a warming and insulating system, and the like. The present invention relates to a piping system for hydrogen circulation in which hydrogen is conveyed by a compressor or a pump to alternately transfer two heat exchangers to a compressed and vacuum state so as to obtain a predetermined cold or hot air. 
     In particular, in the present invention, by installing a four-way valve (by-pass valve) and a bypass (by-pass) at the proper position of the hydrogen transfer pipe to maximize the thermal efficiency by the efficient transfer of hydrogen, and also of the compressor Even if the capacity is small, the load that acts is small, so the compressor's lifespan and power consumption are greatly reduced, and it provides a stable hydrogen circulation piping system without the concern of environmental pollution.

title: Hydrogen Gas Compressor
abstract: The present invention relates to a hydrogen gas compression device for compressing hydrogen gas. The hydrogen gas compression device according to an embodiment of the present invention, the hydrogen gas compression device according to an embodiment of the present invention, a compression space for compressing hydrogen gas is formed inside, and as the compression space expands and contracts, hydrogen gas is compressed into the compression space A compression casing comprising a variable compression tube for introducing or compressing and discharging the introduced hydrogen gas, a tube installation space in which the variable compression tube is installed, and an outlet through which hydrogen gas flows in and out of the variable compression tube, of the hydrogen gas. In order to increase the compression ratio, the variable compression tube is generated by generating hydraulic pressure in the core part protruding from the compression casing and inserted into the compression space so that the compression space is minimized in the state where the variable compression tube is fully compressed, and the variable compression tube is generated. It includes a pressurized fluid supply to supply the pressurized fluid to the tube installation space to be contracted. Therefore, hydrogen gas can be compressed with a relatively simple structure, and damage due to hydrogen embrittlement can be minimized.

title: Control of fuel cell power generating plant
abstract: PURPOSE:To facilitate quick follow-up control by controlling exhaust hydrogen gas pressure, exhaust air pressure, reforming outlet hydrogen gas pressure, and air supply outlet air pressure in response to the deviation of a setting value and a detecting value by detecting load power. CONSTITUTION:Fuel 11 and steam 12 are supplied to a reformer 1 to reform to a hydrogen rich gas 13 and this gas 13 is introduced into a fuel cell 3 with the air 21 supplied from an air supplier 4. By installing control circuits 100 and 200 which input the detecting value D of the load power, a flow rate control valve 7 is controlled with an exhaust hydrogen gas pressure detector 26, and a flow rate control valve 8 is controlled with an exhaust air pressure detector 27. By installing a reformer control circuit 300 and an air control circuit 400, control valves 5 and 6, and a by-pass control valve 10 are controlled with a hydrogen pressure detector 28 and an air pressure detector 29. Therefore, operation of each device is balanced, the follow-up and stabilization to a quick load change are increased.

abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen generating apparatus in which a liquid discharged together with hydrogen gas from a reactor can be reused without discarding.  <P>SOLUTION: The hydrogen generating apparatus comprises: a gas storage vessel 1 in which compressed air for applying pressure to water is stored; a liquid storage vessel 2 in which the water is stored; a liquid discharge passage 17 for discharging the water which receives pressure from the liquid storage vessel 2; a reactor 3 containing a hydrogen generating agent A which reacts with water discharged from the liquid discharge passage 17 to generate hydrogen gas; hydrogen discharge passages 19, 20 for discharging hydrogen gas generated in the reactor 3; an accumulation vessel 4 which is disposed on the course of the hydrogen discharge passages 19, 20 and in which water discharged with the hydrogen gas is accumulated; a water replenishment passage 24 for feeding the water in the accumulation vessel 4 into the liquid storage vessel 2; a check valve 25 put on the course of the water replenishment passage 24; and a degassing part 15 for discharging the compressed air to the outside of the vessel, wherein since the compressed air is discharged from the degassing part 15, it is made possible to feed the water in the accumulation vessel 4 into the liquid storage vessel 2 via the check valve 25.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2009,JPO&INPIT

abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen storage alloy for batteries.  <P>SOLUTION: The hydrogen storage alloy is an alloy which is expressed by a formula (Mm)B<SB>5</SB>, where the Mm is La, Ce, Pr, Nd metal and/or an alloy containing these and in which the molar ratio of La is 0.45 to 0.47, the molar ratio of Ce is 0.36 to 0.40, the molar ratio of Pr is 0.03 to 0.04 and the molar ratio of Nd is 0.10 to 0.12. title: Aluminum alloy/hydroboron hydrolysis-based miniature hydrogen production system
abstract: The utility model relates to an aluminum alloy/hydroboron hydrolysis-based miniature hydrogen production system, and belongs to the technical field of hydrogen preparation. The aluminum alloy/hydroboron hydrolysis-based miniature hydrogen production system comprises a hydrogen production generator, a liquid storage tank, a liquid transfer pump and a liquid transfer pipeline, wherein the hydrogen production generator comprises a tank body and a cover body, and the tank body comprises a reaction chamber and a hydrogen storage chamber; a rectangular liquid storage tank is coated on the periphery of the hydrogen production generator; an outlet at the bottom end of the liquid storage tank is connected with the inlet liquid transfer pipe of the hydrogen production generator; the top end of the inlet liquid transfer pipe of the hydrogen production generator is sealed, and a foamed nickel separation film is arranged on a position which is 0 to 0.5cm from the top end and connected with the hydrogen storage chamber; a liquid transfer control valve is arranged on the inlet liquid transfer pipe of the hydrogen production generator; a pore is formed in the edge of the liquid transfer control valve and enters the reaction zone of the hydrogen production generator through a stainless steel pipe; the tank body is divided into a reaction chamber and a hydrogen storage chamber by the separation membrane; an upright post is fixed between the inner walls of the hydrogen storage chamber and the reaction chamber; and a symmetric circular truncated cone with an upward opening is arranged in the reaction zone. The aluminum alloy/hydroboron hydrolysis-based miniature hydrogen production system has the characteristics of simple structure, safety and reliability, good control property, wide practicality and the like, and is applicable to hydrogen supply of a portable fuel battery or internal combustion engine.

title: Integrated fuel processor, fuel cell stack and tail gas oxidizer with carbon dioxide removal
abstract: An illustrative method for converting hydrocarbon fuel to hydrogen rich gas, includes the steps of: reacting the hydrocarbon fuel with steam in the presence of reforming catalyst and a carbon dioxide fixing material to produce a first hydrogen gas; and removing carbon monoxide from the first hydrogen gas to produce the hydrogen rich gas, wherein the removing step utilizes a process selected from methanation or selective oxidation. In one illustrative embodiment the carbon dioxide fixing material is selected from calcium oxide, calcium hydroxide, strontium oxide, strontium hydroxide, allanite, andralite, ankerite, anorthite, aragoniter, calcite, dolomite, clinozoisite, huntite, hydrotalcite, lawsonite, meionite, strontianite, vaterite, jutnohorite, minrecordite, benstonite, olekminskite, nyerereite, natrofairchildite, farichildite, zemkorite, butschlite, shrtite, remondite, petersenite, calcioburbankite, khanneshite, carboncernaite, brinkite, pryrauite, strontio dressenite, and similar such materials and any combinatio of these. The reforming catalyst in one preferred and illustrative embodiment is selected from nickel, platinum, rhodium, palladium, ruthenium, or similar supported reforming catalyst or combinations of these. In such instances the reforming catalyst is preferably supported on a high surface area support thus promoting the reforming reaction and more preferably is selected from alumina, titania, zirconia, or similar such compounds or combinations of these. It is preferred that in one illustrative embodiment that the temperature of the reacting step is from about 400 °C to about 800 °C.

title: Fuel cell system and hydrogen leak judgment method in the system
abstract: While the operation of a fuel cell is stopped, a pressure decrease caused by a current sweep is suppressed from being misjudged as being the occurrence of a hydrogen leak or a cross leak, and the judgment accuracy of the hydrogen leak, etc.  is improved. In order to realize this feature, during an intermittent operation, in which, when a load on the fuel cell system is low, electrical power is supplied from a power storage unit in the fuel cell system to a power-consuming apparatus and power generation of a fuel cell is temporarily stopped, in the situation where a current sweep for suppressing a degradation of the fuel cell is performed, a hydrogen pressure in an anode of the fuel cell is corrected based on hydrogen consumed by the current sweep, and a hydrogen leak judgment based on a pressure decrease or a cross leak judgment based on a pressure decrease is performed on the basis of the corrected hydrogen pressure. For example, a pressure decrease speed of the hydrogen pressure in the anode which decreases due to power generation in the current sweep is integrated to obtain the amount of hydrogen pressure decrease caused by the power generation; and the amount of hydrogen pressure decrease can be reflected.

title: Fast preparation method for hydrogen storage material synchrotron radiation X ray sample
abstract: Fast preparation method for hydrogen storage material synchrotron radiation X ray test sample, it is related to synchrotron radiation X ray technical field of measurement and test, capillary is inserted in in sponge, cover in transparent organic glass fixed mount by foam seal, transparent organic glass is supported on metal holder, the powder sample of grinding is filled in capillary by weighing paper hopper, encapsulated in the openend of capillary with vacuum grease；Grinding, filling and the encapsulation process of above powder sample are carried out in argon gas glove box.This method can reduce amount of samples, realize rapidly and efficiently preparing for test sample, avoid hydrogen storage material from being oxidized, to obtain the synchrotron radiation X-ray of material high accuracy spectrum itself, and then according to the microstructure situation of these X-ray spectrum Knowing materials.

title: Hydrogen leakage sensor and hydrogen leakage sensing method
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen leakage sensing method for efficiently, appropriately and accurately sensing a leaked hydrogen gas.  <P>SOLUTION: A hydrogen leakage sensor includes: a first temperature measuring means for measuring a temperature of a hydrogen absorption section disposed on an outer face of a hydrogen supplying pipe or an outer face of a hydrogen storage container and comprising a hydrogen absorption metal alloy; and a determination means for determining the existence of the leaked hydrogen from the measured temperature rise. The hydrogen leakage sensing method includes: a first temperature measuring process for measuring the temperature of the hydrogen absorption section disposed on the outer face of the hydrogen supplying pipe or the outer face of the hydrogen storage container and comprising the hydrogen absorption metal alloy; and a determination process for determining the existence of the leaked hydrogen from the measured temperature rise.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2008,JPO&INPIT

title: Method for measuring fluid level in liquid hydrogen tank and liquid hydrogen storage system
abstract: An amount Y of liquid hydrogen that has passed through a first valve and has been volatilized during a predetermined time after first and second valves are opened is calculated by using a pressure P0 in an internal space of a liquid hydrogen tank measured before the two valves are opened, a pressure P1 in the internal space measured after the lapse of the predetermined time since the two valves are opened, and an amount X of the gaseous hydrogen that has passed through the second valve during the predetermined time. A fluid level H of the liquid hydrogen in the liquid hydrogen tank after the lapse of the predetermined time since the two valves are opened is calculated by using a expression showing a relationship between the H and an amount Y1 of the liquid hydrogen that passes through the first valve and drops therefrom, and the Y.
