title: Hydrogen fuel cell automobile exhaust device
abstract: The invention provides a hydrogen fuel cell automobile exhaust device, which comprises a cylinder body and a connecting pipe fixed in the middle of the left end of the cylinder body, wherein the right end of the cylinder body is provided with a conical cover which is arranged in a large left and small right manner, the annular outer side of the cylinder body is provided with a fixing ring, the left end of the conical cover is in threaded connection with the fixing ring, at least two fixing plates are fixed between the fixing ring and the left part of the cylinder body at equal intervals, the middle of the inner part of the cylinder body is rotatably connected with a main shaft which is arranged in a left and right manner, the left end and the right end of the main shaft are respectively provided with a fixing cover, the two fixing covers are respectively arranged in the cylinder body and the conical cover, and the: carry out the homogeneous mixing through hydrogen and vapor in the flabellum with waste gas, also mix waste gas and outside air, reduce hydrogen concentration in the waste gas, prevent to produce high concentration hydrogen at the discharge port, promote the security.

title: A kind of wind power hydrogen production control device of vertical shaft wind electric generator
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of wind power hydrogen production control devices of vertical shaft wind electric generator, including wind power generating set, electric power distribution system, energy storage monitor system, wind power hydrogen production electrolysis water electrolytic cell, hydrogen container；The wind power hydrogen production electrolysis water electrolytic cell, left end are connected with energy storage monitor system, and right end is connected by hydrogen ingress pipe with hydrogen container, complete hydrogen manufacturing and the hydrogen storage of wind power hydrogen production electrolysis water；The electric power distribution system, left end are connected with wind power generating set, and right end energy storage monitor system is connected, and complete electrification energy storage and the monitoring of wind power generating set；The wind power generating set, axis are fixed on ground, the bottom installation frame of axis, and installation gear-box, generator, complete the wind-power electricity generation of vertical axis in rack.The present invention fully achieves quick, the efficient hydrogen manufacturing of wind-power electricity generation, hydrogen storage, saves manpower, improves production efficiency, can generate good economic benefit and social benefit.

title: Hydrogen system for internal combustion engine
abstract: A hydrogen system for diesel and gas engines, comprising a housing assembly containing an aqueous solution. A heating assembly comprises a first inlet, a first outlet, and tubing connecting the first inlet to the first outlet. A hydrogen generator is contained within the housing assembly. It comprises a second inlet and a second outlet, and at least a top wall and a base wall. The top wall is at a predetermined angle to allow the aqueous solution to flow and circulate into a connecting tube. The hydrogen generator comprises negative charged rods and positive charged rods. The hydrogen generator generates hydrogen and oxygen gas for use in an internal combustion engine to improve combustion efficiency and to decrease emissions. The hydrogen generator serves as an electrolysis cell to generate the oxygen and hydrogen gas with electric current from a power source being passed through the aqueous solution.

title: Energy supply system
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] To provide an energy supply system that does not burden the environment in various fields. An energy supply system is constituted by an electrolytic hydrogen generator, a gas storage for extracting hydrogen and oxygen from water by the electrolytic hydrogen generator and storing the hydrogen and oxygen, and a fuel cell receiving supply of fuel from the gas storage. . Hydrogen and oxygen taken out by the electrolytic hydrogen generator are brown gas having a ratio of 2: 1 and a hydrogen storage alloy for storing hydrogen is used. In addition, a circulating device for reusing wastewater or waste heat or surplus brown gas that is discharged in the process of generating electricity by the fuel cell is connected to the fuel cell and provided to perform effective use of resources. .

title: Method for producing hydrogen storage alloy
abstract: In a method for producing a multi-component hydrogen storage alloy including metals of zirconium or vanadium, oxides of these metals is used to produce an alloy having characteristics equivalent to that produced with pure metals. It comprises steps of calcining the raw material, wherein at least one selected from the group consisting of zirconium and vanadium is included in its oxide form, at a temperature ranging from 900° C. to 1300° C., mixing metal calcium with said calcined raw material, and treating the mixture with heat at a temperature ranging from the melting point of metal calcium to 1300° C., under inert gas atmosphere.

title: Easy-to-activate high-plateau pressure hydrogen storage alloy and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a hydrogen storage alloy, and discloses an easy-to-activate high-plateau pressure hydrogen storage alloy. Chemical general formula of the hydrogen storage alloy is Ti[0.85-1.15]Cr[0.85-1.35]Fe[0.4-0.7]Mn[0.2-0.45]Rex, wherein, RE is any one or more of La, Ce, Pr, Sm, Nd and Ho, x is more than 0 and not more than 0.1; a preparation method of the hydrogen storage alloy is also disclosed. The invention is advantaged in that the hydrogen storage alloy has good activation performance and can be activated quickly, and also has the characteristics, such as higher hydrogen desorption high-plateau pressure, low heat enthalpy and higher hydrogen capacity, moreover, the preparation method of the hydrogen storage alloy is simple in process, less in preparation steps and low in cost, is suitable for industrial large-scale preparation and has good application prospect.

title: Hydrogen generation system and method using sodium silicide and sodium silica gel materials
abstract: Systems, devices, and methods combine reactants and aqueous solutions to produce hydrogen. The reactant can be sodium silicide or sodium silica gel. Hydrogen generating devices are used in fuel cells and other industrial applications. One system combines cooling, pumping, water storage, and other devices to sense and control the reaction between the reactant and the aqueous solution to produce hydrogen. Multiple inlets with different stationary arrangements deliver aqueous solutions to the reactants. The reactants and aqueous solution are agitated to control the reaction state. The aqueous solution can be regenerated and returned to the reaction. One system operates over a range of temperatures and pressures and includes a hydrogen separator, a heat removal mechanism, and a reaction state control device. Systems, devices, and methods for generating hydrogen provide thermally stable solids, near instantaneous reaction with aqueous solutions, and non-toxic liquid byproducts.   [Selection] Figure 3

title: Hydrogen storage alloy excellent in initial activity
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen storage alloy having high hydrogen absorbing and releasing velocities, excellent in practical use, and having a superior initial activity. SOLUTION: This hydrogen storage alloy has a composition containing, by atom, 19-30% Ti, 0.5-10% Zr, 0.02-0.4% Hf, 30-42% Mn, 4-13% Cr, 7-17% V, 2-9% Ni, 0.1-3.5% La and/or Ce, and 1-10% oxygen and satisfying Ti(%)+Zr(%)+Hf(%)+Mn(%)+Cr(%)+V(%)+Ni(%)+(La and/or Ce) (%) + oxygen (%)+(inevitable impurities) (%)=100%. Moreover, this hydrogen storage alloy has a structure where hydrogenation and oxidation treatment product phases are dispersedly distributed in matrix phases of Ti-Mn alloy and the hydrogenation and oxidation treatment product phases are constituted essentially of oxides of La(Ce) and La(Ce)-Ni alloy and further has a structure where numerous cracks developing at the time of hydrogenation treatment are present and the hydrogenation and oxidation treatment product phases are exposed in the inner surface of the cracks.

title: Low alloy steel for high-pressure hydrogen gas environment and container for high-pressure hydrogen
abstract: Provided is a low alloy steel for high-pressure hydrogen gas environments, which contains, by mass percent, C: 0.15 to 0.60%, Si: 0.05 to 0.5%, Mn: 0.05 to 3.0%, P: not more than 0.025%, S: not more than 0.010%, Al:  0.005 to 0.10%, Mo: 0.5 to 3.0%, V. 0.05 to 0.30%, O(oxygen): not more than 0.01%, N: not more than 0.03%, and the balance Fe and impurities, and has tensile strength of not less than 900 MPa. This low alloy steel desirably contains B of 0.0003 to 0.003%, but in this case, N is limited to not more than 0.010%. It is desirable to contain at least one among Cr, Nb, Ti, Zr, and Ca.  The contents of Mo and V desirably satisfy the following formula (1):  [Mo(%)].cndot.[V(%)]0.2>=0.32 (1).

title: Method for producing and transporting hydrogen
abstract: A method for the production and storage of hydrogen. The hydrogen is produced via electrolysis and as the hydrogen is formed it is absorbed into a hydrogen storing cathode. Once the hydrogen storing cathode has become completely hydrided, it is shipped to end users as a metal hydride supply of hydrogen.

title: Hydrogen storage alloy electrode
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] A hydrogen storage alloy electrode having a low charge / discharge cycle life and a low charge / discharge cycle with low electric resistance of the electrode and excellent charge / discharge performance at a large current, especially at a low temperature. The purpose is to provide. The present invention relates to a hydrogen storage alloy electrode obtained by coating a current collector with a mixture of a hydrogen storage alloy powder and a binder and a synthetic resin, wherein the binder is a carboxy resin having a glass transition temperature of -18 ° C or lower. The above object can be achieved by using a hydrogen storage alloy electrode which is a modified styrene / butadiene copolymer and the synthetic resin is a fluororesin having an average molecular weight of 3,000,000 or more.

title: Hydrogen Production System and Reformer
abstract: Hydrogen production system X1 of this invention is equipped with reforming apparatus Y1 and PAS apparatus 5 which have the vaporizer | carburetor 1 and the reforming reactor 2. As shown in FIG. In the vaporizer | carburetor 1, mixed raw materials (hydrocarbon-type raw material, water, oxygen) are heated, and it will be in a vaporized state. In the reforming reactor 2, steam reforming reaction and partial oxidation reforming reaction of a hydrocarbon-based raw material are combined, and reformed gas (including hydrogen) is generated from the mixed raw material in a vaporized state. In the PAS device 5, the reformed gas is introduced into the adsorption tower filled with the adsorbent, the unnecessary components in the gas are adsorbed by the adsorbent, the hydrogen-enriched gas is led out of the tower, and the unnecessary components are desorbed from the adsorbent. The hydrogen-containing desorption gas containing unnecessary components and remaining hydrogen in the tower is discharged to the outside of the tower. This desorption gas is combusted in the vaporizer 1, and the mixed raw material is heated using a combustion gas generated by combustion as a heat source.

title: Li-Mg-based composite hydrogen storage material and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a Li-Mg-based composite hydrogen storage material and a preparation method thereof. A general formula of the composite hydrogen storage material is A(100-x)Bx, wherein A is a uniform mixture formed by LiNH2 and MgH2 according to a molar ratio of 2: 1, B is element Bi, In, Sb, Ge, Sn and the like of an intermetallic compound, which is formed by reacting with an element Li or/and Mg in LiNH2 and/or MgH2, and x is equal to 3 wt% to 30 wt%. The reversible hydrogen releasing amount of the composite hydrogen storage material is more than 3.5 wt% at 180 degrees centigrade, and the composite hydrogen storage material has good hydrogen absorbing and releasing dynamics performance.

title: Production of hydrogen occlusion alloy powder and negative electrode for nickel-hydr0gen battery formed by using this powder
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To significantly improve the hydrogen storage rate of a hydrogen storage alloy powder, to improve the electrochemical characteristics when the powder is used for a battery, and to prevent the powder from deteriorating the battery characteristics for a long time. Disclosed is a method for producing a hydrogen storage alloy powder that enables storage, and a negative electrode for a Ni hydrogen battery using the powder. SOLUTION: The powder produced by using the gas atomization method is heat-treated, immersed in water or an alkali solution without being exposed to the atmosphere, and then subjected to surface treatment with an acid solution, thereby producing a hydrogen storage alloy powder. A method and a negative electrode for a nickel-metal hydride battery manufactured by wrapping a paste obtained by mixing a powder and a binder according to the present invention with a nickel mesh and then pressing the paste.

title: Gas storage cylinder with pressure acquisition and transmission device and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: A hydrogen storage cylinder with a pressure acquisition and transmission device, comprising: the device comprises a hydrogen storage bottle, a gas storage bottle valve, a pressure sensor and a data acquisition output chip, wherein the hydrogen storage bottle is provided with the gas storage bottle valve, the gas storage bottle valve is provided with the pressure sensor, a gas storage valve hole is communicated with gas in the gas storage bottle, the pressure sensor acquires gas pressure in the gas storage bottle through the gas storage valve hole, the pressure sensor transmits gas pressure data to the pressure data acquisition output chip, and the pressure data acquisition output chip is transmitted to a gas pressure display device through a wireless network.

title: Hydrogen refueling station network facility and hydrogen distribution type energy resource composed of same
abstract: A hydrogen refueling station network facility can inject hydrogen for hydrogen cell hydrogen storage cylinders in an area and forms a hydrogen distribution type energy resource together with hydrogen cells. The energy resources around a city are used for producing hydrogen through various hydrogen making methods. Energy resource conversion is realized through the procedures of pressurization, conveying, storage, air-entrapping and the like. A circular process including the procedures of hydrogen production, conveying with a gas storage cylinder set trailer, consumption of hydrogen cells, conveying with the gas storage cylinder set trailer and hydrogen production goes on all the time. The energy resource provided in the scheme does not use circuits of a power grid and is independent from the power grid, and the gas storage cylinder set trailer is used for supplying gas to the hydrogen cells as a movable pipeline. By means of the scheme, the greatest effect is that the city is changed into a hydrogen energy society, and zero emission is realized. If every city in China implements the scheme, China can develop into the hydrogen energy society soon, and great significance is achieved.

title: Online hydrogenation system of hydrogen energy power generation device
abstract: The invention relates to an online hydrogenation system of a hydrogen energy power generation device, and relates to the technical field of hydrogen energy equipment. The utility model provides an online hydrogenation system of hydrogen energy power generation facility includes hydrogenation unit, at least two sets ofly carry out the hydrogen supply unit of hydrogen supply, at least two ways and the hydrogen storage unit that supplies hydrogen unit to power generation facility and to hydrogenation unit, hydrogen supply unit, the control unit that hydrogen storage unit carries out hydrogen business turn over control, hydrogenation unit and hydrogen storage unit be linked together, the outside hydrogen equipment of hydrogenation unit connection is to storing hydrogen unit hydrogenation, hydrogen storage unit and hydrogen supply unit be linked together, the outside power generation facility of hydrogen supply unit connection, hydrogen storage unit supplies hydrogen to power generation facility through the hydrogen supply unit. title: Energy storage system and method for storing and supplying energy
abstract: The invention discloses an energy storage system and a method for storing and supplying energy. The energy storage system is provided which includes an electrolyser used for generating hydrogen, a hydrogen gas storage used for storing hydrogen and a power plant with a turbine motor. The turbine motor is used for generating hydrogen, wherein the electrolyser is connected to the hydrogen gas storage and the hydrogen gas storage is connected to the power plant.

title: Hydrogen energy supplying unit
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen energy supplying unit capable of generating hydrogen by electrolyzing water, and capable of pressurizing the hydrogen without using a gas compressor to safely and efficiently store the hydrogen in gas storage facilities comprising small containers. SOLUTION: This hydrogen energy supplying unit has a water electrolysis cell for electrolyzing water to generate hydrogen gas and oxygen gas, a pressure vessel for enclosing the water electrolysis cell in water or an electrical instating liquid, the hydrogen gas storage facilities, a hydrogen gas delivery pathway for delivering the hydrogen gas from the water electrolysis cell to the hydrogen gas storage facilities, an oxygen gas delivery pathway for delivering the oxygen gas from the water electrolysis cell, a delivery shut-off valve stationed on the hydrogen gas delivery pathway, a delivery shut-off valve stationed on the oxygen gas delivery pathway, a supply shut-off valve used for opening and shutting a pathway for supplying the hydrogen gas to users of the hydrogen gas from the hydrogen gas storage facilities,  wherein the hydrogen generated by the water electrolysis cell is stored in the hydrogen gas storage facilities, and the stored hydrogen is supplied with the users through the supply shut-off valve.

title: High-Capacity Complex Hydrogen Storage Materials and a Process of Releasing Hydrogen
abstract: Disclosed herein provide compositions and hydrogen release methods for a high-capacity complex hydrogen storage material. The hydrogen storage material is mainly composed of metal borohydride and NH 3 . The invention advantageously adopt ammonia, one cheap and easily supplied material with high hydrogen content (17.6 wt %), as one of the hydrogen source, offering a safe and efficient way to store hydrogen and release hydrogen. Furthermore, the hydrogen storage material can be further catalyzed by a transition metal catalyst to improve the dehydrogenation kinetics. With the addition of catalyst, 0.2-10 equiv. H 2  could be evolved at −100˜600° C., which might be applied on vehicles which are fueled by hybrid or fuel cell.

title: A process for generating electricity with a hydrogen fuel cell
abstract: The object of the invention is the coupling of a hydrogen fuel cell to an enzymatic process for the production of electricity and the transformation and sequestration of CO2. Gaseous CO2 emissions from processes such as hydrocarbon reforming are transformed into carbonate or bicarbonate ions and hydrogen ions by the enzymatic system in order to prevent their contribution to the greenhouse effect.      The hydrogen ions resulting from the enzymatic process are recovered and combined in order to supply the hydrogen fuel cell. Finally, water, a by-product of the oxidizing reaction of the hydrogen fuel cell, is recovered and recycled back into the aqueous enzymatic system.

title: High efficiency, compact reformer for generating hydrogen from gaseous hydrocarbons in the low power range
abstract: The present invention relates to a small steam reforming apparatus for producing a product gas containing a large amount of hydrogen from hydrocarbons or hydrocarbon derivatives comprising water to be supplied and a method for producing the hydrogen-containing product gas. The product gas can be used, for example, in fuel cells capable of generating current and heat.

title: Method of manufacturing a metal-hydride hydrogen storage reservoir
abstract: A method of manufacturing a hydrogen storage tank in a metal hydride powder, comprising a closed chamber divided into closed elementary cells (1) defined by walls (2, 3, 4, 5), each cell ( 1) containing metal hydride powder (6), characterized in that each of the cells (1) is successively manufactured by carrying out the following steps: some of the walls defining it are assembled to form an open cavity or cell, then placing one or more piece (s) solid (s) (7) of a material capable of forming a metal hydride in said cavity, and then assembles the last walls of the cell (1) to close it; the aforementioned steps are repeated to manufacture all the cells (1) of the enclosure, then the enclosure is closed, hydrogen is introduced into the chamber to transform the solid piece (s) (7). ) to the metal hydride powder (6).

title: A kind of pressure regulating system of hydrogen pipe network
abstract: The utility model is a kind of pressure regulating system of hydrogen pipe network, and native system trunk pipeline connects knock out drum.Trunk pipeline respectively through hydrogen supply, connect hydrogen supply device with hydrogen pressure control valve and use hydrogen pipe network, two valves connect hydrogen supply respectively, use hydrogen pressure controller.Trunk pipeline also connects fuel gas pipe network and torch pipe network through two emptying control valves respectively, and two valves all connect emptying pressure controller.During use, hydrogen supply Stress control control valve device sends Hydrogen Vapor Pressure outside, and with hydrogen pressure control valve adjustment hydrogen ductwork pressure, when being slightly elevated by hydrogen amount, knock out drum release or storage of hydrogen, maintain hydrogen gas pressure stabilization, avoid hydrogen supply device frequently to put forward the amount of falling.In normal production, two emptying control valves are all closed, and reduce material consumption energy consumption.Emptying pressure controller is opened emptying control valve in time according to the pressure of trunk pipeline and is ensured safety.When increasing severely by hydrogen amount, the guarantee of knock out drum release hydrogen produces minimum pressure at least 20 minutes, for hydrogen volume increase and troubleshooting gain time.

title: Hydrogen gas filling device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen gas filling device which adjusts a temperature of a hydrogen gas supplied to a filled tank to a proper temperature and enables reduction of power consumption.SOLUTION: A coupling 5 for filling a fuel tank 28 with a hydrogen gas is stored in a coupling storage part 6 including a coupling detection part 6A when the coupling 5 does not fill the fuel tank 28 with the hydrogen gas. A supply line 3, in which the hydrogen gas flows, is provided with: a cooler 11 which cools the hydrogen gas; a shutoff valve 9 positioned at a downstream side of the cooler 11; and a fuel temperature sensor 17 which is positioned at a downstream side of the shutoff valve 9 and detects a temperature of the hydrogen gas. A cooling ability adjustment part 25, which adjusts the hydrogen gas cooling ability of the cooler 11 on the basis of the temperature detected by the fuel temperature sensor 17 before the coupling detection part 6A is operated and the shutoff valve 9 is brought into an open state, is provided at a control device 24 for controlling hydrogen gas supply.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

title: Hydrogen generator
abstract: A hydrogen gas generator generates hydrogen gas by mixing two reactants. The generator has a reaction chamber for receiving a solid reactant. The chamber has a reaction product separator impermeable to the solid reactant and a biasing means for biasing reactant products against the separator. The generator also has a liquid reactant dispenser for storing a liquid reactant and is fluidly coupled to the reaction chamber, such that dispensed liquid reactant reacts with the solid reactant in the reaction chamber to produce hydrogen gas and a waste product that are substantially permeable through the separator. The generator also has a product collector coupled to the reaction chamber for collecting hydrogen gas and waste product that have passed through the separator.

title: Method for purification and storage of hydrogen useful for electrical devices and vehicles operated by fuel cell, comprises circulating a filter unit with hydrogen in storage device under simultaneous adsorption of pollutants from hydrogen
abstract: The method for purification and storage of hydrogen (H 2) useful for electrical devices and vehicles operated by fuel cell, comprises circulating a filter unit (1) with hydrogen in storage device (S) under simultaneous adsorption of pollutants from hydrogen in the filter unit, storing the purified hydrogen in a solid storage device (2) and circulating the filter unit with purified hydrogen in a withdrawal device (E) during withdrawing the purified hydrogen (H 2 g) from the solid storage device and desorption of the pollutants in the cleaned hydrogen deposited in the filter unit. The method for purification and storage of hydrogen (H 2) useful for electrical devices and vehicles operated by fuel cell, comprises circulating a filter unit (1) with hydrogen in storage device (S) under simultaneous adsorption of pollutants from hydrogen in the filter unit, storing the purified hydrogen in a solid storage device (2) and circulating the filter unit with purified hydrogen in a withdrawal device (E) during withdrawing the purified hydrogen (H 2 g) from the solid storage device and desorption of the pollutants in the cleaned hydrogen deposited in the filter unit. Oxygen, ammonia, methane, nitrogen, sulfur compounds, water, carbon monoxide, hydrocarbons and/or carbon dioxide are adsorbed from the hydrogen as pollutants. The adsorption and desorption of the pollutants are carried out in several steps. The fuel cell (3) for the propulsion of vehicle is impinged with the hydrogen extracted from the solid storage device and guided through the filter unit. An independent claim is included for a device for the purification and storage of hydrogen.

title: Fuel cell system
abstract: A means for heating a fuel cell and a fuel container using heat generated in an electronic device is realized with a simple configuration.   A fuel cell system is supplied with a fuel cell, a fuel storage part that stores a hydrogen storage alloy that stores hydrogen supplied to the fuel cell, and power generated by the fuel cell. A heat transfer mechanism that transfers heat generated in the electronic device to the fuel cell 12 and the fuel storage unit 14 and a moving mechanism 46 that moves the heat transfer mechanism 40 by the heat of the fuel cell 12 or the fuel storage unit 14 are provided. The heat transfer mechanism 40 is configured such that the amount of heat transferred to the fuel cell 12 and the fuel storage unit 14 changes according to the movement by the moving mechanism 46. title: Hydrogen transport vehicle based on hydrogen fuel cell is power supply
abstract: The utility model relates to a hydrogen transport vechicle based on hydrogen fuel cell is the power supply, including trailer and container. title: Storage device for hydrogen absorbing alloy
abstract: PURPOSE:To enable hydrogen gas to exchange heat with hydrogen absorbing alloy directly for shortening a time required for absorbing and exhausting hydrogen by sending hydrogen gas whose temperature is raised up to the prescribed level in a hydrogen gas heat exchanger into a storage vessel of hydrogen. CONSTITUTION:Hydrogen absorbing alloy 1 is filled up in about a half of a chamber 13 in a vessel 11 and it is arranged that when hydrogen gas is taken in or exhausted, the hydrogen absorbing alloy 1 is fluidized by hydrogen gas blowing up through a bottom filter 12a for making contact with hydrogen gas directly to be able to exchange heat with the gas efficiently. Hydrogen gas, not absorbed in the hydrogen absorbing alloy 1, is pressurized by a blower 3 after flowing out from the vessel 11 and mixed with feed hydrogen gas sent through a valve 7, and after passing through a valve 6, cooled in a hydrogen gas heat exchanger 2 by the third medium, for instance, from 30 deg.C to 20 deg.C and then sent into the vessel 11.

title: Preparation method of hydrogen storage alloy/graphene composite material for nickel-metal hydride battery cathode
abstract: A preparation method of a hydrogen storage alloy/graphene composite material for a nickel-metal hydride battery cathode belongs to the technical field of electrode materials of nickel-metal hydride batteries. The preparation method is characterized by comprising the following preparation steps: reducing graphene oxide by using epoxy hydrazine ether as a reducing agent to prepare graphene, and modifying the prepared graphene modified hydrogen storage alloy to form a graphene coating film on the surface of the graphene modified hydrogen storage alloy; the method for preparing the graphene by reducing the graphene oxide comprises the following specific steps: adding graphene oxide into deionized water to obtain a graphene oxide water dispersion, then carrying out epoxy hydrazine ether reflux at the temperature of 94-97 ℃ for 9-11 h, washing with absolute ethyl alcohol and deionized water to be neutral, and carrying out freeze drying to obtain graphene. The cycling stability and the dynamic performance of the hydrogen storage alloy negative electrode material are improved; improves the hydrogen storage capacity and high-rate discharge performance of the cathode material.

title: Hydrogen supply device
abstract: To provide a hydrogen supply device capable of performing a self-diagnosis operation for judging whether or not any foreign materials are mixed in hydrogen gas that is supplied by its own machine.SOLUTION: A hydrogen supply device 10 comprises a compressor 11, a pressure accumulator 12, and a pressure-reducing valve 13. There are provided an opening or closing valve A and a nozzle 15 on a downstream side of the pressure-reducing valve 13. In addition, the hydrogen supply device 10 is provided with a receptacle 16 that can be connected to the nozzle 15. There are provided a sinter filter 18 and an opening or closing valve B on a downstream side of the receptacle 16. The downstream side of the valve B is connected to an exhaust passage 19 communicated with surrounding air. A control unit 21 keeps the valve A in an open state and after the valve B is kept in a closed state, the control unit keeps the valve A in a closed state and subsequently when the valve B is set to an open state, the control unit judges whether or not any foreign materials are mixed in hydrogen gas in reference to a pressure reduced amount ΔP of hydrogen gas per predetermined time detected by a pressure sensor 20.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

title: Method for filling up the tank of a vehicle equipped with a hydrogen-hydride reservoir
abstract: The quantity of heat released when a hydrogen-hydride reservoir of a hydrogen-operated vehicle is being filled up is utilised to heat the hydrogen from the supply tank. This heating prevents hydrogen at a temperature of below 0 DEG C from being conveyed through the filling assemblies and thus prevents these from becoming iced up. Furthermore, as a result of the heating, the pressure in the supply tank can be increased and, in the case of a liquid-hydrogen tank, the liquid hydrogen evaporated.

title: Rare earth-magnesium-nickel system heterogeneous hydrogen storage alloys used for nickel-hydrogen batteries and preparing method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses rare earth-magnesium-nickel system heterogeneous hydrogen storage alloys used for nickel-hydrogen batteries and a preparing method thereof. The alloys are characterized in that: the general structure formula of the alloys is Ln<a>Mg<b>Ni<x>Y<y>Z<z>, wherein the Ln is at least one element selected from rare earth elements; the Y is at least one element selected from a group comprising Co, Mn, Al, Cu, Nb, V, Fe, Zn, Ti, Cr, As, Ga, Mo, Sn, In, W, Si, B and P; the Z is at least one element selected from a group comprising Ag, Sr, Ge and Au; the a is less than 1 and not less than 0.5; the b is less than 0.5 and more than 0; the x is more than 2.5 and less than 4.5; the y is more than 0 and less than 2; the z is more than 0 and not more than 1; an AB5 phase accounts for 10-90%; an A2B7 phase accounts for 10-90%; and the ratio of other impurity phases is not more than 30%. B side elements are replaced by the Ag, the Sr, the Ge, the Au, and the like, alloy components and an annealing process are optimized, and the ratio of the AB5 phase to the A2B7 phase in the product is adjusted, thus increasing the discharge capacity of the hydrogen storage alloy, prolonging the cycle lifetime of the hydrogen storage alloy, and improving self-discharge and low-temperature properties.

title: Hydrogen storage materials and method of making by dry homogenation
abstract: Dry homogenized metal hydrides, in particular aluminum hydride compounds, as a material for reversible hydrogen storage is provided. The reversible hydrogen storage material comprises a dry homogenized material having transition metal catalytic sites on a metal aluminum hydride compound, or mixtures of metal aluminum hydride compounds. A method of making such reversible hydrogen storage materials by dry doping is also provided and comprises the steps of dry homogenizing metal hydrides by mechanical mixing, such as be crushing or ball milling a powder, of a metal aluminum hydride with a transition metal catalyst. In another aspect of the invention, a method of powering a vehicle apparatus with the reversible hydrogen storage material is provided.

title: Catalyst for manufacturing hydrogen, and hydrogen manufacturing method
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a catalyst for efficiently promoting a dehydrogenation reaction at a high conversion rate even at a low reaction temperature, and a highly efficient method for producing hydrogen using the catalyst.   SOLUTION: At least one metal selected from the group consisting of platinum, ruthenium, palladium, rhodium, tin, rhenium, and germanium is supported on a porous carrier, and hydrogen having an average pore diameter of 40 to 80 mm is obtained. title: Hydrogen generation cartridge and portable hydrogen generator

title: Hydrogen storage alloy and its production
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydrogen storage alloy having high reaction velocity without causing restriction on an alloy composition and deterioration in reversibility of reaction and characteristic of hydrogen absorbing and releasing cycle life. SOLUTION: The hydrogen storage alloy contains a phase of an intermetallic compound having a composition of A5 T19 [where 'A' means one or >=2 elements selected from the group consisting of La, Ce, Pr, Sm, Nd, Mm (misch metal), Y, Gd, Ca, Mg, Ti, Zr, and Hf and 'T' means one or >=2 elements selected from the group consisting of B, Bi, Al, Si, Cr, V, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Sn, and Sb]. In the case of a hydrogen storage alloy containing AT5 phase, an alloy containing AT3 phase and an alloy containing AT4 phase are mixed and alloyed mechanically to form a phase of an intermetallic campound having a composition of A5 T19 , other than AT3 and AT4 . Then, the resultant alloy and an alloy containing AT5 phase are mixed or mechanically alloyed.

title: Fuel cell electric power generating plant
abstract: PURPOSE:To make self-supply of raw material gases possible by connecting current terminals of an anode and a cathode with water electrolysis apparatus, electrolyzing water by excess electric charge generated in a storing generated hydrogen and oxygen gases in respective containers, and supplying them to the reformer burners at the time of cell operation. CONSTITUTION:Current terminals 2a, 3a of an anode 2 and a cathode 3 are connected with a water electrolysis apparatus 14 through out load switches 17, 18 and condensed water from an anode outlet condenser 8 and a cathode outlet condenser 9 is supplied to the apparatus 14 through a condensed water supplying line 15. A condensed water supplying valve 16 which opens and closed corresponding to the signal of a water level sensor not shown in the figure but installed in the apparatus 14 is installed in the line 15. A hydrogen storage container 19 and an oxygen storage container 20 are connected with the discharging side of the apparatus 14 and gases here are supplied to a reformer burner 10 through a hydrogen supplying valve 21 and an oxygen supplying valve 22. Electric power generating plant is thus composed and at the time of transition to the waiting and stopping of a cell 1, the switches 17, 18 are opened and the terminals 2a, 3a are connected with the apparatus 14.

title: Catalytic hydrogen storage electrode materials for use in electrochemical cells and electrochemical cells incorporating the materials
abstract:
Disclosed is a reversible, electrochemical cell having a high electrochemical activity, hydrogen storage negative electrode. The negative electrode is formed of a reversible, multicomponent, multiphase, electrochemical hydrogen storage alloy. The hydrogen storage alloy is capable of electrochemically charging and discharging hydrogen in alkaline aqueous media. In one preferred exemplification the hydrogen storage alloy is a member of the family of hydrogen storage alloys, derived from the V-Ti-Zr-Ni and V-Ti-Zr-Ni-Cr alloys in which the V, Ti, Zr, Ni and Cr are partially replaced by one or more modifiers, and the alloy has the composition:

title: Cooling and Heating Device Using Hydrogen Storage Alloys
abstract: PURPOSE: A cooling and heating apparatus using hydrogen storage alloys is provided to prevent heat exchange through a switch plate in the middle of cooling and heating operations, thereby preventing heat loss of air and preventing the efficiency of heat exchange from lowering. CONSTITUTION: A housing(10) includes air intake passages(11,12) for sucking air from the outside, an indoor side exhaust passage(13) guiding heat-exchanged air into a room, and an outdoor side exhaust passage(14) guiding heat-exchanged air into the outside. A pair of reactors(20,25) are installed opposite to the air intake passage, being filled with a hydrogen storage alloy inside. A switch plate(43) is rotatively installed between the reactors for dividing air passing through the reactors into the indoor side exhaust passage and the outdoor side exhaust passage. The switch plate has a vacuum heat insulation layer(44) inside. A rotating element(41) rotates the switch plate within a predetermined angle range. Indoor side and outdoor side ventilating fans forcibly absorb the external air for forcibly sending the air to the indoor side exhaust passage and the outdoor side exhaust passage through the reactors. A plurality of hydrogen passage pipes(50) are connected with the reactors, wherein hydrogen flows inside. A pumping unit is connected with the hydrogen passage pipes for generating sending power forcibly sending hydrogen from one reactor to the other reactor. A direction control(70) is installed in each hydrogen passage pipe for controlling a sending direction of the hydrogen.

title: White cement and its manufacturing method
abstract: The present invention relates to white cement made of pencatite and-its manufacturing method. The present invention provides white cement manufactured through creating active MgO, which has strong ability of hydration, by burning pencatite which contains Mg(OH)2, at low temperature. The present invention provides manufacturing method for 5 kinds of white cement of different usage. White cement described in the present invention can be effectively used for finish plastering of buildings, producing various kinds of building materials, putty, etc.

title: Method and apparatus for placement of slurry
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent the separation of a slurry by a method in which while a slurry flows out of a placing tube, the valve mechanism of the placing tube is controlled so that the amount of slurry to be supplied to the placing tube is equalized with the amount of the slurry to be flowed out of the placing tube.  
     CONSTITUTION: While concrete 12 is supplied into the tube 14 of a placer 10, the concrete 12 in the tube 14 is allowed to flow out by opening the outlet of a valve mechanism 18. The opening degree of the valve 26 of the mechanism 18 is controlled, while the concrete 12 is placed, by a controller 22 for the mechanism 18 in such a way that the amount of concrete 12 to be discharged from the tube 14 is equalized with the amount of the concrete 12 to be supplied to the tube 14. The tube 14 can thus be kept filled with the concrete 12 to prevent the outflow of the concrete 12 with high speed under its own weight. The separation of the concrete 12 can therefore be avoided. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1986,JPO&Japio

title: DEVICE FOR EJECTING A GOOD FROM A PACK
abstract: The tablet ejector consists of a container (10) and having a horizontal roller (18) driven through a spindle (15) on one side. A second roller (14) is fitted with a number of ribs (19), one at each end and others distributed along the length. The space between the ribs and the rollers allows the tablet through the ejector without damage. The packet is fed through the slot (23) and the empty wrapper is ejected through the slot at the rear while the tablet is collected from the chute (28) at the bottom of the ejector.

title: Quick assemble and disassemble slag welding head
abstract: The utility model relates to a quick assembling and disassembling slag welding head which is an improvement to an existing slag welding head. The utility model is mainly composed of a cylinder body, a clamping head, a cartridge case, a lever, etc., wherein, a pressure lever (12), a pressure lever sleeve (14) of an external sleeve spring (11), and a cam (15) with a handle are arranged in the clamping head. The cam with a handle is carried to push the pressure lever sleeve. Scilicet, the matching of the pressure lever and a bent-up end of the clamping head can rapidly assemble and disassemble steel bars, so the efficiency of welding procedure increases two to three times. A lower clamping head (6) is fixed on the lower part of the cylinder body by a pressing cap (13) through an insulating pad (10), and a bracket (17) of an upper clamping head is provided with an offset screw (16). The cylinder body is also provided with an elastic clamp (8) to cause the cartridge case (5) with a hook (3) to be used as a stationary type and a separate type.

title: Cover forming apparatus having pivoting forming members
abstract: A cover forming apparatus for forming a flower pot or flower pot cover from a sheet of material by engaging a sheet of material about the outer surface of a mold, die or pot. The cover forming apparatus includes a plurality of pivotable forming members resting in a surface which supports a sheet of material upon which is positioned a flower pot mold or flower pot. When the forming members are pivotally moved from the storage position to an extended position, the forming members cause the sheet of material to be appressed to or engaged with the mold or pot. The article formed in accordance with the present invention may be separable from the mold or pot and usable as a flower pot or flower pot cover or may be more or less securely attached to the pot by adhesive, cohesive, barbs, friction pinches or other securing means thereby forming a decorative cover connected to a flower pot. The cover forming apparatus may be incorporated within a mobile platform enabling the cover forming apparatus to be moved from one location to another.

title: Super gyroresonance oxygen aeration integrated machine
abstract: The utility model provides a super-rotary-magnetic-oxygen aeration integrative machine. The upper portion and the lower portion of a sealed barrel are respectively connected with a buoyancy pontoon and a host machine, the upper port is provided inside with an axial fan, the air charging pipe of which is arranged inside the sealed barrel. The lower portion of the air charging pipe is connected with a main motor connected with the host machine. The host machine is provided below with a magnetizer, an air inlet pipe is communicated with a centrifuge by the magnetizer, the magnetizer is provided inside with the centrifuge communicated with a hollow shaft which is communicated with an ejector by a spiral organ. The air charging pipe is connected with a rainproof cover. The machine applies the rotary-magnetic-oxygen technology to send the oxygen in air accumulated and activated by the centrifuge underwater and quickly completes synthesis of water and air by the host machine. The utility model is simple in structure, practical, highly effective, stable and reliable in operation and convenient to maintain.

title: High-voltage indoor air compressed load switch
abstract: The utility model relates to a high-voltage indoor air compressed load switch, which is characterized in that a moveable tactile rod is a hollow cylinder structure; the top end of the moveable tactile rod is provide with a spout; the internal of the moveable tactile rod is provided with a fixed piston; when a switch is divided, the moveable tactile rod is made relative movement with the fixed piston which is arranged in the moveable tactile rod to generate compressed gas to be spouted and blow out an arc. A static contact piece and the moveable tactile rod which are taken as the electric conduction components of the switch and a generating arc rod and a generating arc ring which are taken as arc burning components are dividually arranged; the generating arc rod is positioned on the center of the static contact piece; the generating arc ring is positioned under the spout of the moveable tactile rod; when the switch is divided, the generating arc rod is disengaged from the generating arc ring after the moveable tactile rod is disengaged from the static contact piece. The utility model can overcome the defect that aerogenesis type switches need to be frequently replaced arc-extinguishing tubes, and the utility model has the advantages of no oil, innocuity, no fire, no explosion danger, easy assembly and reliability of on-off action.

A static contact piece and the moveable tactile rod which are taken as the electric conduction components of the switch and a generating arc rod and a generating arc ring which are taken as arc burning components are dividually arranged; the generating arc rod is positioned on the center of the static contact piece; the generating arc ring is positioned under the spout of the moveable tactile rod; when the switch is divided, the generating arc rod is disengaged from the generating arc ring after the moveable tactile rod is disengaged from the static contact piece. The utility model can overcome the defect that aerogenesis type switches need to be frequently replaced arc-extinguishing tubes, and the utility model has the advantages of no oil, innocuity, no fire, no explosion danger, easy assembly and reliability of on-off action.

title: Floating arrangement,particularly multiple hull boat with sail propulsion
abstract: In a sail multiple hull boat, the strains from aerodynamic and hydrodynamic forces must, preferably, be separated from each other. Preferably, the connection between the hulls (2) is achieved by a membrane coupling which features a high elasticity within different planes. Further, the sail and all elements required for its control are fixed exclusively to the carrier girder (1) and are independent of the hulls (2); preferably, a hinged bowsprit is provided. Further, a height adjustable center board, arranged in the middle and on the lower side of the carrier girder, improves the stability of the floating arrangement.

title: Video signal processor
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Object] To provide a high-performance video signal processing device capable of reliably removing residual chroma components in a luminance signal. The inputted luminance signal is delayed by 1H time in a delay circuit 2, amplified in an amplifier 3, and then subtracted from an original signal in a subtractor 4 to extract a residual chroma component. The extracted residual chroma component is supplied to the comparator 5 and the switch 6, respectively, and the comparator 5 detects the signal level of the residual chroma component and outputs a control signal for switching the switch 6 when the level exceeds a certain value. The switch 6 is turned on when the residual chroma component is present, and is turned off when the residual chroma component is not present.   When the switch 6 is ON, the subtractor 7 removes the residual chroma component from the original luminance signal and outputs it.

title: Motorized wheel accessory for a stroller
abstract: The motorized wheel accessory for a stroller is an after-market device that is configured to interface with a stroller in order to mobilize the stroller without the need for an end user to actually push said stroller. The motorized wheel accessory includes a frame that is configured to attach onto a rear axle of a stroller. The frame includes a power member that is wired to a motor. The motor is in mechanical connection with a pair of wheels. The pair of wheels propel the stroller. The frame may be adjustable to accommodate differently-sized strollers.

title: Built-in mechanical quick coupling device for prestressed concrete tubular pile
abstract: The invention relates to a built-in mechanical quick coupling device for a prestressed concrete tubular pile, comprising butt plates of an upper stake and a lower stake. The device is characterized by comprising an internal gear rotary table with a circle of inner gears, which is located at an intermediate layer of the coupling device after being connected; the bottom surface of the internal gear rotary table is in approach connection to an upper end plate of the lower stake, the upper surface of the internal gear rotary table is in contact with a lower end plate of the upper stake; in addition, the device is provided with a plurality of gear locking eccentric shafts, each gear locking eccentric shaft is composed of a gear shaft, a locking eccentric wheel or an eccentric block; the device is further provided with a discal support for positioning and mounting the gear locking eccentric shafts and two end plate reinforcing rings respectively in firm joint with the inner surface of the upper end plate and the lower end plate; and a circle of reserved locking space is formed between the end plate reinforcing rings and the inner surface of the end plates. The internal gear rotary table can be turned to drive the gear shaft of the gear locking eccentric shaft to turn synchronously and cause the locking eccentric wheel or the eccentric block to rotate to the preset reserved locking space to clamp and lock the end plates of the upper tubular pile and the lower tubular pile to complete connection. The device of the invention features in simple structure, convenient construction, high operation efficiency, high tensile strength and lower construction cost compared with like products, and the cost can be saved by nearly 50% of reduced.

title: Sucker rod centering device
abstract: The utility model relates to a sucker rod centering device, which comprises an upper connector, a lower connector, a connecting rod and a centering body. The upper connector and the lower connector are in threaded connection with the connecting rod, the centering body is sleeved on the connecting rod provided with a clamp hoop, and the centering body is located on the upper portion of the clamp hoop. The centering body comprises an inner sleeve and an outer sleeve, the inner sleeve is vertically installed in the outer sleeve, and a roll ball is arranged between the inner sleeve and the outer sleeve. Rolling wheels are evenly inlayed on the circumference of the outer side of the outer sleeve and connected with an outer sleeve shaft. When a sucker rod moves vertically in an oil pipe, the rolling wheels are contacted with the inside of the oil pipe, thereby greatly reducing frictional force and preventing the centering device from being damaged due to the friction between the centering device and the oil pipe. When the sucker rod moves in the oil pipe in rotary mode, the sucker rod is always located at the central position of the oil pipe. Therefore, the sucker rod centering device can be suitable for moving of the sucker rod in the oil pipe in vertical mode and the rotary mode, and the application range is wide.

title: Self-rising type closestool cover
abstract: The utility model discloses a self-raised toilet seat cover, which comprises a seat colar and a cover. The seat colar and the cover are combined together through the base; iron sheets are provided on the cover to attract with magnets; position housings are symmetrically provided on both ends of the connecting base; a rotary shaft is installed inside the position housings to connect the seat colar and the cover; a torsion spring is sleeved on external diameter of one end of the rotary shaft; one end of the torsion spring is connected with an adjusting block; the adjusting blocks touch each other through springs and pins. Because the torsion springs and the adjusting blocks are added onto the rotary shaft inside the position housing, the force from the torsion spring can make the seat colar be ejected automatically from the toilet seat, so that the product can be maintained with the prior functions, and meanwhile, when the seat colar is pressed for operation, the seat colar can also be automatically ejected after humans leave. The utility model is characterized in low cost, high practicability, easy maintenance and etc, and is particularly applicable in such public places as hotels, restaurants, office buildings, stations, airports, exhibition centers and etc, as well as restrooms in ogranizations, units, enterprises and families.

title: Gas cooling appliance
abstract: The utility model provides a gas cooking appliance and relates to the gas cooking appliance utilizing an upper air inlet type furnace end. The gas cooking appliance comprises a face plate, a bottom shell containing a gas adjusting valve and a gas pipeline, an upper air inlet type furnace end and a boiler holder, wherein the bottom shell is arranged below the face plate; the gas pipeline is communicated with the furnace end through the gas adjusting valve; a supporting frame is arranged in the bottom shell; the furnace end is arranged on the supporting frame; a window is formed in the face plate and corresponds to the furnace end and a water receiving plate which extends downwards is arranged on the face plate; a through hole is formed in the bottom part of the water receiving plate and the upper part of the furnace end penetrates through the through hole; a fire cover at the upper end of the furnace end is lower than the upper end face of the face plate; the boiler holder is a flat frame, and the boiler holder is detachably arranged on the window of the face plate and covers the water receiving plate. The use stability, safety and reliability of the gas cooking appliance are significantly improved; the cleaning property and using comfort are very` outstanding, and the appearance is more beautiful.

title: Frame connector drilling tooling of light-weight trunnion base
abstract: The utility model discloses a frame connector drilling tooling of a light-weight trunnion base. The frame connector drilling tooling is characterized in that the frame connector drilling tooling comprises a base, a support which is used for supporting a frame connector of a trunnion shaft, and a bracket which is used for supporting an upper support of the trunnion shaft. The support and the bracket are fixedly arranged on the base. During use, one surface of a shaft support of the light-weight trunnion base is placed upwards, then the frame connector of the trunnion shaft is placed on the support, the upper support of the trunnion shaft is placed on the bracket, the light-weight trunnion base can be well fixed on the tooling, the frame connector of the trunnion shaft can be directly drilled and processed, the problem that the trunnion shaft is difficult to process is solved, the operation is simple to conduct and the working efficiency is improved.

title: Multiprocessor system having distributed shared resources and deadlock prevention
abstract: In a data processing multiprocessor system having distributed shared resources where each system processor (7) is provided with at least a local memory (8) to which it get access through a local bus (11), and with an interface unit (10) for connection of the local bus (11) to a system bus (5) and wherein each of the system processors may have access the local memory of another processor through its own local bus, its own interface unit, the system bus and the local bus of the other processor, deadlock is prevented by providing a bypass unit (40) of the interface unit (10) for enabling access from the system bus to the local bus through the bypass unit, a block (9) connected between the local bus and the interface unit (10) for latching system bus access requests received from an agent processor on the local bus, and a block (12) for isolation of the agent processor outputs from local bus, so that each agent processor may post read/write operations in the related latching block(9) for latching bus access requests and thereafter release its own local bus without waiting completion of the operation, whereby the local bus is available to receive access requests received from the system bus through the bypass unit (40), the operation pending in the latching block (9) being completed, if a read operation, by reconnection of the agent processor (7) and the latching block (9) to the local bus.

title: Runner
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent separation of a flow that takes place on the negative pressure surface of a vane or in the vicinity of a side plate so as to increase the surging point of runner speed in a centrifugal type runner by providing a notch and holes in the vicinity of a side plate located at the outlet part of a vane.  
     CONSTITUTION: By providing a notch 8 in the vicinity of a side plate located at an outlet part of a runner consisting of a plurality of vanes 14, a side plate 2, and a core plate 3, fluid containing the energy on the positive pressure side flows into a negative pressure side, thereby preventing separation that takes place in the vicinity of either the vane 1A or the side plate 2. By providing holes 10 in the vicinity of the side plate at the outlet part of the vane 1B, energy stored on the positive pressure side can be shifted to the negative pressure side. As a result, fluid on the negative pressure side can be activated, thereby preventing a separation phenomenon. With this contrivance, separation occurring in the negative pressure surface of the vane or in the vicinity of the side plate can be prevented. Thus, surging point of the runner speed can be increased, thereby widening the range of vane operation.

title: Anti Keylog method of ActiveX base and equipment thereof
abstract:
The present invention is a security program that prevents keyboard data leakage, has the form of ActiveX (integrated platform technology that connects the PC platform and the Internet developed by Microsoft) used in a web browser or general application, and uses additional hardware. It is a software-based secure input window that does not leak keyboard data using an existing keyboard.
   
   
    Security incidents such as spyware or hacking through viruses in performing important tasks such as financial transactions, securities transactions, e-commerce, e-mail transmissions, chats, and games on the Internet by individuals, companies, and public institutions that are currently users of open networks. Because of such an anxiety to the user or operator to inhibit the activation of the Internet, a security technology that can safely use the Internet is necessary.
   
   
    In such an Internet environment, Internet security companies are vulnerable. It introduces security technologies such as network surveillance. It has the function of screening out the intrusion of hacking program on computer or network and treating (modifying and deleting) when intrusion.
   
   
    However, they have not yet provided the technology to directly protect keyboard data by infecting or defending against known viruses. Currently, only H / W-based products have been introduced in terms of technology for directly protecting keyboard data. However, even though keyboard data security is essential for Internet work, it is not developed.
   
   
    Accordingly, an object of the present invention is to protect keyboard data on a web browser or a general application program on the Internet.

title: Tree delimber
abstract: A portable support structure defines a generally horizontal path along which an elongated log may be longitudinally shifted and mounts an upwardly opening tree trunk supporting and guiding crotch structure therefrom as well as a pair of curvilinear limb stripping blades mounted for movement toward and away from each other and defining a tree trunk encircling cutting opening therebetween generally coaxial with the aforementioned path. Log presence sensing structure is spaced along the path from the blades and mounted from the support structure for movement between upper and lower limit positions and resiliently yieldable motion transmitting structure is operatively connected between the log pressure sensing structure and the blades for swinging the latter toward and away from each other responsive to down and up movement, respectively, of the log pressure sensing structure.

title: Inline scrubber with dual water system
abstract: A method for dual water scrubbing and an in-line dual water scrubber for gas cleaning onboard a vessel are disclosed. The in-line dual water scrubber includes a vertical extended body, a gas inlet, and a gas outlet. The gas inlet is underlying in the lower section of the extended body and the gas outlet is overlying in the upper section of the extended body. A first underlying scrubbing section, and a second scrubbing section in an upper section of the extended body are provided. One or more liquid collectors are arranged above one or more first scrubbing liquid sprayers. The liquid collector is arranged for collecting one or more second scrubbing liquid and for flow through of a vertical upwards flowing gas-flow from the inlet to the outlet.

title: Film delivery device
abstract: (57) [Summary] Provided is a film delivery device that can smoothly deliver a film having a small thickness and a weak waist. A film (1) from a wound body (10) is rolled (1).   It is sent out onto the guide plate 4 while being sandwiched between 2 and 13,   Further, the guide plate 4 is fed forward from the front end.   The air blown from the nozzle 17 is supplied onto the guide plate 4 via the groove 14, and a thin air layer is formed between the guide plate 4 and the film 1. As a result, even when the film 1 has a very small thickness, the film 1 can be smoothly fed forward with almost no frictional resistance from the guide plate 4. The film 1 that has reached the front of the guide plate 4 extends horizontally so as to flutter forward by air blown forward from between the guide plate 4 and the film 1.

title: Engine speed control method
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent the occurrence of an engine stop, by a method wherein an ignition timing, where a lag in response to production of torque during idle running is low, is corrected according to a fluctuation in the engine speed, and when an engine speed has a tendency for lowering, its correction amount is increased over that available during rise.  
     CONSTITUTION: An air control valve 30 located between air conduits 18 and 19 situated in a intake air passage in a manner to run around a throttle valve 16 is opened and closed by displacing a diaphragm 33 by means of difference in a pressure between a diaphragm chamber 37 and an atmosphere pressure chamber 38. Further, the opening of a vale body 35 is controlled by regulating a pressure in a diaphragm chamber 37 through control of a solenoid valve 51 in an atmosphere conduit 47. The solenoid valve 51 is controlled together with an ignition deice 60 by means of a control device 20, and the control is effected so that an ignition timing is corrected according to the degree of a decrease and an increase in the engine speed during idle running. The correction amount is set so that an engine speed, having a tendency for lowering, is increased over that available when it has a tendency for a rise. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Cantilever type two-stage parking system
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] To provide a two-stage parking device that can be obtained at a low price with a simpler mechanism. [Structure] A pallet with pulleys attached to both sides of the plate is provided, and the rear end of the pallet is rotatably supported on the upper surface of the support frame that is erected at the rear of the base, and both sides of the front of the base are supported. The drive-side strut and the driven-side strut are erected so as to face each other, one end of the transmission rope is fixed to the upper part of the driven-side strut, the other end of the transmission rope is fixed near the lower part of the drive-side strut, and the transmission rope on the upper fixed side. To the lower surface of the pulley located below it, the lower fixed side transmission rope to the upper surface of the pulley located above it, by the drive source provided on the upper side of the drive side support,   It is characterized in that the driving rope fixed to a proper position on the pallet is moved up and down, and the front portion of the pallet is moved up and down about the pivotal support portion at the rear end of the pallet.

title: Outrigger fishing rod holder
abstract: An outrigger fishing rod holder for mounting in or on the hull of a fishing vessel for holding a fishing rod in a fixed position until a catch is made. The device comprises a tubular member for fixedly holding the fishing rod and the tubular member in turn is pivotedly mounted in a generally U shaped holding bracket. The U shaped member in turn has a tapered mounting bracket attached to it for securing same to a mounting plate on or in the hull of the fishing vessel. The U shaped supporting bracket has a semicircular cut out portion which allows the tubular member to pivot after a catch has been made.

title: Generator powered bicycle headlamp and electrical circuit
abstract: A bicycle headlamp including: a rotor having a plurality of magnet plates attached to spokes of a bicycle wheel, each magnet plate including a plurality of magnets disposed at regular circumferential spacings with alternating south and north poles; and a stator including a power-generating coil disposed in a fixed position to face the magnetic pole faces of the magnet plates. A case includes at least a headlamp electrical circuit for establishing resonance with a certain relative speed of the magnets by means of the power-generating coil and a capacitor connected in series, and for rectifying, smoothing out, and outputting electric power obtained from the power-generating coil. Also included are a light-emitting diode and a condenser lens for focusing light emitted from the light emitting diode in front of the bicycle and for illuminating the roadway.

title: Mobile device including a flexible display device and method of operating the same
abstract: A mobile device includes a touch-screen having an external touch-screen region, an internal foldable touch-screen region, and a curved-surface touch-screen region that couples the external touch-screen region and the internal foldable touch-screen region, and a body to which the touch-screen is attached, wherein the device is configured to move at least one icon corresponding to at least one executing application program to the curved-surface touch-screen region in response to a folding angle of the internal foldable touch-screen region when a folding operation of the internal foldable touch-screen region is performed.

title: Bromination of unsaturated acids and derivatives thereof
abstract: Ethylene-a ,b -dicarboxylic acids, anhydrides or esters are reacted with bromine in a single stage at an elevated temperature to give a ,b -dibromoethylene-a ,b -dicarboxylic acids, anhydrides or esters. The reaction may be conducted in the presence of a Lewis acid as catalyst. The quantity of bromine used is preferably the stoichiometric amount but less than this amount may be used, particularly if the deficiency of bromine is made good by an equivalent amount of chlorine.  Examples are given.

title: Semiconductor memory
abstract: A bit line is connected to a charge storing circuit through a charge transferring circuit. A control circuit controls charge transferability of the charge transferring circuit according to a change in the voltage of the bit line resulting from a charge read out from a memory cell. A leakage controlling circuit lowers the charge transferability of the charge transferring circuit in a read operation temporarily before the charge is read out to the bit line. The leakage controlling circuit makes it possible to avoid charge transfer between the charge storing circuit and the bit line before data is read from the memory cell. The charge storing circuit can thus generate a read voltage sufficient for a read circuit to operate with, in accordance with the logical value of the data stored in the memory cell.

title: Fingerprint inducing method, device, mobile terminal and storage medium
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of fingerprint inducing method, the fingerprint inducing method comprises the following steps：The current operating state of fingerprint induction installation is obtained, wherein, working condition includes treating fingerprint input state and treats at least one of touch input state；When the current operating state is whne fingerprint input state, the finger print information on the induction region is obtained；When the current operating state is whne touch input state, the touch behavioural information on the induction region is obtained；According to the touch behavioural information, the corresponding touching instruction of the touch behavioural information is determined.The present invention also provides a kind of fingerprint induction installation of correspondence fingerprint inducing method including the mobile terminal of fingerprint induction installation and storage fingerprint senses the computer-readable storage medium of program.The present invention makes virtual key and fingerprint adapter more adapt to shield mobile terminal comprehensively.

title: Network system
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] To provide a network system capable of easily and accurately reserving the capacity of a communication line of a carrier network through which a plurality of communication paths pass, in accordance with the state of network traffic. [Structure] A network including a public network connecting a local area network, a LAN management system managing the local area network, a network operation system managing the public network, and a network performance management system managing the performance of the entire network system. In the system, the network performance management system retains history information regarding past traffic characteristics, and derives the traffic characteristics from the history information to determine the capacity of the communication line to be used and the actual communication of the communication line of the carrier network. The capacity of the communication line of the carrier network is reserved with a value close to the traffic capacity transmitted and received on the path.

title: A kind of assembled side slope protection flexible net and its construction method
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of assembled side slope protection flexible nets, including lateral tension rope, longitudinal tension rope, anchor pole and spud pile；The transverse direction tension rope is more, and the both ends of the transverse direction tension rope are connect with anchor pole respectively；The upper end of the longitudinal direction tension rope is connect with spud pile；The longitudinal direction tension rope is orthogonal with lateral tension rope, and the intersection of the two links together, and forms support dictyosome；Further include several flexible protective units, the flexible protective unit is in the tubular spiral bar material of helical；Adjacent two flexible protectives unit is placed above and below along slope surface, and the lower part for the flexible protective unit being located above is Chong Die with the underlying top of flexible protective unit, forms overlay region；The transverse direction tension rope passes through the overlay region.Its construction method is that bolthole-anchor pole is beaten in preparation of construction-point is put in measurement-and the paving of spud pile installation-assembled side slope protection flexible net is hung and spliced.

title: Coin-type cell
abstract: A coin-type cell is provided with a cell case, a sealing plate, and a power generation element that is sealed by the cell case and the sealing plate. The cell case and/or the sealing plate are/is formed of a cladding having a surface layer provided on the outer surface side, an intermediate layer provided further to the inner surface side than the surface layer, and a base material layer provided further to the inner surface side than the intermediate layer. The surface layer comprises nickel, and the intermediate layer contains titanium.

title: Liquid crystal composition
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prepare a liquid crystal composition which can be driven over a wide temperature range by two-frequency driving with high rate of response, by using a mixture of several kinds of specific ester compounds as active component.  
     CONSTITUTION: A liquid crystal composition composed mainly of, or containing at least one of the compounds of the group of (A) a liquid crystal compound or liquid crystal mixture containing at least one of the compounds of formulas IWIII (R and R' are 1W8C straight-chain alkyl), (B) a liquid crystal compound having terminal cyano group and having a large positive dielectric anisotropy (Δε), (C) a liquid crystal compound having a large negative dielectric anisotropy (i.e. large |Δε|) or a rodlike nonliquid crystal compound, and (D) a liquid crystal compound or a rodlike nonliquid-crystal compound which satisfies at least two of the following conditions [conditions; (a) low fc; (b) small temperature dependency of fc; (c) low viscosity; and (d) wide liquid crystal temperature range and low melting point].

title: Oil smoke purifier with honeycomb structure
abstract: The invention discloses an oil smoke purifier with a honeycomb structure. The oil smoke purifier comprises an insulating box body, wherein a positive electrode lead screw and a negative electrode lead screw are erected between the side walls of the insulating box body, a positive electrode plate and a negative electrode plate are respectively arranged on the positive electrode lead screw and the negative electrode lead screw and are in alternate arrangement, a position under the positive electrode plate and the negative electrode plate on the insulating box body is provided with a positive electrode tube, a negative electrode rod penetrates through the positive electrode tube, the positive electrode tube is an orthohexagonal tube body, one end of the side surface near the edge side, of the positive electrode tube is provided with a bulge, the other end of the positive electrode tube is provided with a clamp groove matched with the bulge, and the positive electrode tube is buckled through the bulge and the clamp groove. The generated polarization electric field is extremely uniform, the full polarization of oil smoke particles is ensured, meanwhile, the time for allowing the oil smoke particles to completely pass through the polarization electric field is prolonged, no gap and no dead corner exist, the oil smoke is enabled to completely pass through the positive electrode tube, the polarization rate of the oil smoke particles is improved, and the oil smoke purifier has the characteristics that the structure is simple and compact, the stability and the reliability are good, the installation is convenient, and the cost is low.

title: Analyzing hack attempts of E-cards
abstract: Transactions using a bank customer's electronic debit or credit card (“e-card”) are monitored by the card owner's consumer electronic (CE) device and reported to a server associated with the financial institution maintaining the e-card records for analysis of aggregated hack attempts.

title: Electric string instrument
abstract: The guitar has a novel feedback arrangement for sustaining the sound generated from the strings and including a pickup associated with each string and a corresponding driver intercoupled with the pickup in a feedback loop that also includes a gain-controlled amplifier. The amplifiers are controlled in common from a variable control means. The pickups, drivers and associated electronics are all commonly mounted from the bridge. In an alternate embodiment of the invention there is provided an improved sustain technique that provides a more natural sustain characteristic, employing a parametric type of excitation. This embodiment may comprise a pickup, amplifier and tensioning member responsive to the output of the amplifier for sustaining string vibration by causing longitudinal string displacement by means of the tensioning member. In a similar embodiment the string tension may be held constant and the string length varied instead.
