title: Brake disk
abstract: A disk brake assembly having a friction disk mounted on the hub of a motorcycle wheel, the friction disk having an inner hub and an outer ring interengaged by a plurality of equally spaced offset arms connecting the outer ring to the inner hub. The angle of each arm being such that the heat generated in the outer ring causes the outer end of the arms to expand in relation to the expansion of the outer ring and to contract on cooling to return the outer ring to its original position.

title: Method and apparatus for awarding individual or group point multiplication
abstract: In use, the player would insert his or her player card at the EGM ( 10 ). The system checks to see if any multiplier currently applies to the machine and player. The multiplier is available as a token and can communicate to the guest via display on the EGM ( 10 ). The multiplier would be displayed using a conditional message feature of the display. Session points would accumulate at the “multiplied” rate and are displayed as such on the EGM display. Alternately, an assurance message is available to be displayed frequently that shows the-current multiplier. When the player removes his or her card, the session is posted to the patron management system. Casino personal can then review the session detail by accession the history of the player at a workstation capable of querying the player tracking system ( 40 ). The session multiplier and points earned by the multiplier are listed within the record.

title: Bunker for sizing link joint
abstract: The utility model relates to a chain processing device, which comprises a bunker body, a motor and a crank driving mechanism. A guide slice groove 3 and a guide rail 2 parallel with the guide slice groove 3 are arranged at the bottom of the bunker body. The guide rail 2 is provided with a sliding block 1 which is provided with a shifting fork 4, the lower edge of the shifting fork is close to an inlet of the guide slice groove 3, and the sliding block 1 is connected with the crank driving mechanism. The utility model has the advantages that the utility model can automatically partition, array and connect in series desultory chain slices, and thus, the utility model raises production efficiency and improves working conditions. The utility model is suitable for the chain processing industry.

title: Electro-optical device, method of driving electro-optical device, and electronic apparatus
abstract: An electro-optical device includes pixels that are provided to correspond to intersections of a plurality of rows of scanning lines and a plurality of columns of first data lines, each pixel having an pixel electrode, a common electrode that faces the pixel electrode, a first transistor that is turned on when a corresponding scanning line is selected to supply a data signal from a first data line to the pixel electrode, and a second transistor that is turned on when another scanning line than the corresponding scanning line is selected prior to the corresponding scanning line to supply a data signal from the first data line or a data line different from the first data line to the pixel electrode, a scanning line driving circuit that selects the plurality of rows of scanning lines according to a predetermined sequence, when one scanning line is selected, applies a first voltage so as to turn on the first or second transistor, when the selection ends, applies a second voltage so as to turn off the first and second transistors, and, when a scanning line next to the scanning line is selected, applies a third voltage between the first voltage and the second voltage so as to turn off the first and second transistors, and a data line driving circuit that supplies a data signal according to a grayscale level of a pixel of the selected scanning line through the first data line.

title: Method for manufacturing the Perfect Fully Depletion Smart-Cut wafer
abstract: The present invention provides a method for manufacturing a perfect pulley deflation smart cut wafer suitable for forming an ultra-high density semiconductor device because of maintaining the thickness of a thin and uniform silicon surface layer and having no large potential with COP. The present invention provides a method of implanting hydrogen ions into a predetermined depth of a first substrate in which a defect-free single crystal silicon wafer manufactured without vacancy and interstitial agglomeration is introduced into a substrate, and a predetermined upper portion of the same second substrate as the first substrate. Growing an oxide film having a thickness; stacking the first substrate on the oxide film and performing annealing in a nitrogen atmosphere at 400 to 600 ° C. to form silicon oxide at an interface between the oxide film, the first substrate, the oxide film, and the second substrate. Bonding the layers as they are grown, splitting the upper end of the first substrate to cut the first substrate at a location where hydrogen ions are injected therein, and cutting the resultant at the ion implantation location at 1200 ° C Performing annealing in an H  2  or Ar atmosphere at a temperature higher than or above, wet or at a temperature of 1000 ° C. or higher on the first substrate of the annealed resultant And thermal oxidation by a dry oxidation method to form a surface oxide film on the first substrate.

title: Rapid restart using traditional starter in after-running of engine
abstract: * The invention relates to a method for determining engaging time (86, 90, 92) of a starter in an internal combustion engine (2), comprising: determining a revolution number (40) of a crankshaft (8) of the internal combustion engine (2), particularly depending on an oscillation stroke of a piston (6) of the internal combustion engine (2), and qualifying the engaging time (86, 90, 92) before or at state time of the crankshaft (8), wherein the revolution number (40) has a symbol which shows that a rotating direction of the crankshaft (8) is identical to a working direction of the internal combustion engine (2).

title: A kind of method for desalting seawater
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of method for desalting seawater, it is characterised in that：Comprise the following steps：Step 1, seawater is incorporated into reverse osmosis membrane apparatus；Step 2, is transported in deep-sea reverse osmosis membrane apparatus by cargo ship；Step 3, reverse osmosis membrane apparatus are put into deep-sea, and the depth being put into is 100~150m；Step 4, after being put into deep-sea 48~56 hours, reverse osmosis membrane apparatus is sling onto cargo ship, discharges fresh water；The reverse osmosis membrane apparatus include shell, pressure plare, reverse osmosis membrane frame and reverse osmosis membrane, pressure plare is movably arranged on shell, can be slided up and down on shell, reverse osmosis membrane frame is fixed in shell, reverse osmosis membrane is arranged on reverse osmosis membrane frame, reverse osmosis membrane frame and pressure plare are by shell divide into seawater room and freshwater room, seawater is incorporated into seawater room in step 1, in step 3, reverse osmosis membrane apparatus are when deep-sea is put into, seawater room is located at the top of freshwater room, in step 4, fresh water is discharged from freshwater room.The present invention utilizes seawater pressure, reduces energy consumption, has reached the purpose of energy-saving and emission-reduction.

title: Sub-scanning method of high-speed facsimile
abstract:
PURPOSE: To perform data read/write under a uniform velocity state to make facsimile high-speed by providing a function generator, which suits to the response characteristic of a step motor, and a means which converts the output voltage of the generator above to a pulse frequency.  
     CONSTITUTION: When write command WO is inputted, a voltage approximating the transfer function of a motor is generated by function generator circuit 11, and this voltae is converted to a pluse generation frequency by voltage frequency converter circuit 7, and a step motor is controlled through counter 8 and decoder 9 to flow the current to motor coil LM. Circuit 11 inputs a high voltage to circuit 7 when the delay quantity of motor response is large; and circuit 11 inputs a low voltage to circuit 7 when the delay quantity of motor response is small. Then, since high frequency or low frequency pulses are generated in circuit 7 to drive the motor, the speed can be controlled to be high or low according to the load of the motor. After command WO is confirmed by start confirming circuit 1, clock CL is inputted to transmit main scanning signal MS through gate 10 at the time when the motor has been rotated by a one-line write dot interval, and main scanning signal MS is separated from a sub-scanning signal and is made independent of it, thereby controlling mutually. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1979,JPO&Japio

title: Cylinder lock
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] To obtain a structure in which a cylinder lock can be operated by both keys and remote control. [Structure] The cylinder lock according to the present invention includes a case 10.   A key cylinder 20 rotatably mounted in the case 10, and a tumbler 22 slidably provided in the key cylinder 20 and engageable with the tumbler groove 12 of the case 10.   And a lever 37 operatively connected to the key cylinder 20 with a play angle and connected to a solenoid 41. When the regular key 30 is inserted into the key cylinder 20 and rotated, the lever 37 is rotated and the lock device can be operated to the lock position or the unlock position. Also,   The lever 37 can be moved to the locked position or the unlocked position by operating the solenoid 41 through the remote control device.

title: Padlock with deflectable shackle section
abstract: The retractable and extensible shackle of the present padlock is formed with a section, which includes the short leg of the shackle, which section is deflectable relative to the remainder of the shackle when the shackle is released from the padlock body and projected away therefrom, thereby giving the shackle a wide mouth for easy entrance thereinto of a bar or other fixed element of an item to which the padlock is to be applied. Then, when the deflected portion of the shackle is returned to its normal position and the retracted shackle is secured within the padlock body the shackle will so closely encompass the engaged bar or element that there will be no room for the application of a cutting tool by a prospective thief.

title: Hydraulic torque converter and vehicle with same
abstract: The invention provides a hydraulic torque converter. The hydraulic torque converter comprises a pump cover assembly, a pump wheel assembly, a turbine assembly, a guide wheel assembly, a circulation chamber, a locking clutch and a torsional vibration damper assembly, wherein the pump wheel assembly is connected to the pump cover assembly and used to receive power transmitted by the pump cover assembly; the turbine assembly is disposed between the pump cover assembly and the pump wheel assembly; the guide wheel assembly is positioned between the pump wheel assembly and the turbine assembly by a bearing; the circulation chamber is composed through enclosing of the pump wheel assembly, the turbine assembly and the guide wheel assembly; the locking clutch is connected between the turbine assembly and the pump wheel assembly; and the torsional vibration damper assembly is disposed between the turbine assembly and the pump cover assembly. The hydraulic torque converter has the advantages that damping performance is ensured; the axial size of the hydraulic torque converter is greatly reduced; and structural layout in the vehicle is optimized.

title: Method for knowledge based image segmentation using shape models
abstract: A method for segmenting an object of interest from an image of a patient having such object. Each one of a plurality of training shapes is distorted to overlay a reference shape with a parameter Θ i  being a measure of the amount of distortion required to effect the overlay. A vector of the parameters Θ i  is obtained for every one of the training shapes through the minimization of a cost function along with an estimate of uncertainty for every one of the obtained vectors of parameters Θ i , such uncertainty being quantified as a covariance matrix Σ i . A statistical model represented as {circumflex over (f)} H  (Θ,Σ) is generated with the sum of kernels having a mean Θ i  and covariance Σ i . The desired object of interest in the image of the patient is identified by positioning of the reference shape on the image and distorting the reference shape to overlay the obtained image with a parameter Θ being a measure of the amount of distortion required to effect the overlay. An uncertainty is quantified as a covariance matrix Σ and an energy function E=E shape +E image  is computed to obtain the probability of the current shape in the statistical shape model E shape (Θ,Σ)=−log({circumflex over (f)} H ) and the fit in the image E image .

title: Air conveyer
abstract: The pneumatic conveyor of the present invention is an air supply device for continuously generating a flow of air having a predetermined pressure or more, a manifold in which a plurality of restrictors are formed on the upper surface of the air moving above the predetermined pressure generated by the air supply device, An air pocket installed above the manifold and partitioning the upper space of the restrictor into a space having a constant volume such that the air flowing out of the manifold through the respective restrictors has a substantially uniform pressure over the entire cross section; The air pocket is formed to a pressure gradient which gradually decreases as the air pressure formed in the air pocket reaches the edge of the plate member and minimizes the amount of compressed air escaping into the gap between the air pocket and the plate member floating on the air pocket. The plate member from the upper edge of the It is installed on the flange, and the side of the manifold protruding performed and a transfer device for transferring the one side of the plate-shaped member. The pneumatic conveyor can evenly distribute the air pressure at the bottom of the plate member through the air pocket to float the plate member with a small amount of air.

title: Windproof wall reinforcement wing
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To reduce a falling moment generated in a column by a wind pressure applied to a windbreak fence or a windbreak net by using a simple structure using an air flow generated by the wind pressure, to prevent the column from falling, and to further improve a windbreak function. In a windbreak wall provided with a windbreak material provided between struts, a blade is attached to the windbreak wall in the left-right direction and with a gap between the windbreak wall, and the blade is installed in the airflow from below. title: Intracavitary illuminating suture device
abstract: The utility model discloses a cavity-hole illuminating and suture device, relating to a medical appliance, particularly an appliance for treating deep and hidden narrow cavity-hole and carrying out shuye suture. The appliance mainly solves the operation suture problem of the invisible narrow cavity-holes such as five sense organs, vagina, anus, etc., and the suture device is mainly characterized in that the pin hole of a suture needle is on a tip, at the time of suture, complete entering and withdrawing is of no need in needle suturing, the suture needle enters leftward and goes out rightward, or the suture needle enters rightward or goes out leftward, reciprocating to rotate horizontally. The utility model can both carry out interrupted suture and carry out continuous suture. The suture device is not only advantageous to the transfixion and the suture of wound at the deep part of the cavity-hole but also convenient to the suture of superficial wound. The utility model can be extensively applied in various shuye transfixion and suture.

title: Insulation head
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Problem] To provide an insulation head in which the work of changing dies and cords when changing the type of a band-shaped member to be manufactured is performed easily and in a short time. SOLUTION: In an insulation head 1 of an extruder for forming a belt-shaped member p by coating a cord c with a rubber r, an inserter 24 for aligning the cord c and a die 23 for determining the shape of the coating rubber r are used as a common holder. An insulation head which is held by the clamp 20 and the holder 20 is fixed at a fixed position in front of the head portion by the clamp mechanism 10 so that the rubber flow paths 7 and 8 coincide with each other, and the inserter 24 and the die 23 are fixed at a fixed position.

title: Cleaning device, image forming apparatus, and process cartridge
abstract: In a blade type cleaning device, there is provided a cleaning device having high durability and high removal capability by suppressing a deviation in contact pressure in the longitudinal direction of the blade while suppressing cost.   In a cleaning device that removes residual toner on a photosensitive drum by pressing a blade made of a long plate-like elastic member against the photosensitive drum, the magnetic force is exerted over the entire width of the blade. The blade 2 is pressed against the photosensitive drum 4 by the pressurizing means 6 for pressurizing. The pressurizing means 6 is configured by using a pair of magnetic force generating members that attract each other, and a magnet 6b that is one magnetic force generating member is provided inside the photosensitive drum, and a magnet 6a that is the other magnetic force generating member is provided in the blade holder 1. Provided.   [Selection] Figure 3

title: Decrement, resource protection and innocent treatment method for tank bottom oil sludge
abstract: The invention discloses a decrement, resource protection and innocent treatment method for tank bottom oil sludge. The method comprises the following steps of: flushing the tank bottom oil sludge by using hot water of between 60 and 80 DEG C, conveying the flushed mixture into a main container by using a pump to perform settlement separation of oil, water and sludge, reclaiming the separated upper dirty oil, recycling the middle water for flushing the tank bottom oil sludge, separating the bottom oil sludge in a three-phase separator, reclaiming the dirty oil obtained by oil-sludge separation, conveying the sewage to the main container, drying the separated sludge, performing gas-solid separation on the gas mixture and the dried sludge generated in the drying treatment, cooling the separated gas mixture, and separating the dirty oil and the water after cooling. The method can reclaim over 90 percent (weight) of petroleum in the tank bottom oil sludge, the water content of the treated dry sludge is less than 10 percent (weight), the oil content of the dry sludge is less than 1 percent (weight), and the dry sludge can be subjected to innocent landfill treatment under the condition that the heavy metals do not exceed the standards.

title: 3 band tracking filter for ground wave digital television tuner
abstract:
The present invention provides a three-band tracking filter of a terrestrial digital television tuner including an input stage switching unit switched for each band of a channel selected by a band switching signal and an output stage switching unit switched for each band of a channel selected by a band switching signal. A first filter unit connected to an output terminal of the input stage switching unit and configured to pass only a desired high frequency signal according to a first tuning voltage input from the outside, and a second tuning voltage connected to an input terminal of the output stage switching unit and externally input. Therefore, it is characterized by comprising a second filter portion for passing only a desired high frequency signal, and a pattern capacitor for capacitively coupling the first filter portion and the second filter portion.
   
   
    Therefore, according to the present invention, by using a pattern capacitor to increase the coupling of the circuit, and by supplying different tuning voltages from the outside to tune the desired frequency in the tracking filter without the need to adjust the coil according to the component deviation, The distortion property can be improved.

title: The method and apparatus of the isolated safety for CU-CP and CU-UP are supported in wireless communication system

title: Stroller
abstract: The utility model discloses a stroller which comprises a stroller frame with an unfolding state and a folding state, a seat pocket assembly arranged on the stroller frame, a wheel assembly arranged at the bottom of the stroller frame and a locking mechanism used for locking the stroller frame to be in the unfolding state. The stroller frame comprises a plurality of support rods extending in the vertical direction in length in an inclining mode. The seat pocket assembly comprises an enclosing frame and a bracket connected between the enclosing frame and the support rods. The bracket can slide along the length extending direction of the support rods, and bracket lock pieces used for locking the support rods and the brackets are arranged between the support rods and the bracket. The bracket lock pieces and the locking mechanism are arranged in linkage. When the stroller frame is folded, the bracket slides along the support rods. The stroller is convenient to fold and operate, capable of achieving folding with a seat pocket on the stroller, small in occupation space after being folded and simple and convenient to use.

title: Method and apparatus to reduce data lost on personal mobile devices
abstract: Methods and apparatus for providing security for mobile devices are disclosed. In one embodiment, a method includes maintaining responsibility for a first item when the first item is in a first range of a first container. Maintaining responsibility for the first item includes monitoring a locator tag associated with the first item when the locator tag is within the first range. The method also includes determining when the first item is in the first range, determining if the first item is in a second range associated with a second container when the first item is not in the first range, and determining if the second container is trusted with respect to the first container if the first item is in the second range. Additionally, the method includes transferring responsibility for the first item to the second container if the second container is trusted with respect to the first container.

title: Heater
abstract:
PURPOSE: To improve the heat transmission efficiency of the heater by flowing a combustion gas spirally along the inner surface of a cylindrical heat transfer surface.  
     CONSTITUTION: A cylindrical heat transfer surface 2 is formed in the inner part of a can body 1, and a combustion gas generated by a burner 7 is passed through the inner side of the heat transfer surface 2, and other fluid is passed through a gap portion 3 formed between the can body 1 and the heat transmission surface 2. An inlet port 4 is formed on one of the heat transfer surfaces 2 and an exhaust port 5 is formed on another heat transmission surface 2. Means 6 for introducing a combustion gas or a gas is loaded in the inlet port 4 so that the working direction is directed in the tangential direction of the cylinder. When the burner 7 is loaded in the inlet port 4 and flame is sent in the heat transmission surface 1 from the tangential direction, the combustion gas G advances along the inner surface of the cylinder in a spiral flow, and exhausted through the exhaust port 5.

title: Multifunctional composite tripod rest
abstract: The utility model relates to a multifunctional combined a tripod, which comprises a camera seat, a circular cylinder and a supporting foot component, wherein the camera seat and the supporting foot component are independent components, are respectively provided with connecting heads, and are connected with the circular cylinder through the connecting heads. The utility model leads the camera seat and the supporting foot component to be arranged in the circular cylinder according to requirements to be convenient for carrying or mutually connecting to become a usable photographic tripod in the modes that the camera seat and the supporting foot are designed to be the split type, and are respectively and additionally provided with connecting heads with bidirectional connecting structures. The utility model has the advantages of artful design, simple operation, portability, etc.

title: Trimming device with locking function
abstract: The utility model discloses a fine setting device with locking function, at least comprising a dead plate, an active plate, a lens barrel and an adjusting hand wheel which is applied to adjust the opposite displacement of the dead plate and the active plate, wherein, the lens barrel is arranged in the active plate; the dead plate and the active plate are connected through the magnet and particular reed; a nut fitting with the screw of the adjusting hand wheel is fixedly arranged in the dead plate; the screw of the adjusting hand wheel passing through the nut and the dead plate is connected with the active plate; and at least an outlet applied to lock the screw by shrinking the aperture of the nut is arranged in the nut for adjusting the size of the outlet through the adjusting device which is connected with the nut, making the aperture smaller, thereby locking the screw. The utility model can effectively prevent tiny change of the fine setting device caused in the process of carrying; vibration and the variation of temperature, and can adjust the elasticity of the adjusting hand wheel, making the adjusting hand wheel in a comfortable status; the utility model is easy to operate and convenient to adjust.

title: A kind of powerline ice-covering methods of risk assessment
abstract: The invention belongs to powerline ice-covering risk assessment technology fields, more particularly to a kind of powerline ice-covering methods of risk assessment, include: that possible influence degree, coverage and developing state are occurred according to powerline ice-covering event, powerline ice-covering state risk class is divided into five grades according to ice covering thickness range altogether；Final risk assessment index is extracted from three meteorologic factor, environmental factor and line parameter circuit value broad aspects, to establish transmission line icing Risk Assessment Index System；The pretreatment of unification and nondimensionalization is carried out to index；Weighting standard decision matrix is determined using entropy assessment；Plus-minus ideal solutions are determined to weighting standard decision matrix using TOPSIS method；Plus-minus ideal solutions section is divided using matter element extension method and calculates approach degree；Characteristic value is calculated, the grade of each evaluation scheme is divided, judges the grade for assessing object.Risk Management of the present invention for powerline ice-covering risk assessment for administration of power networks department provides support.

title: Electrodeposition film forming method, and double-layer coating film forming method using the same
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an electrodeposition film forming method for achieving both of an improvement in the crosslinking density and layer separability in forming a double-layer separation type electrodeposition film, and imparting excellent corrosion resistance, weather resistance, light resistance, impact resistance, chipping resistance and appearance to the electrodeposition film in the coating of a car body.SOLUTION: In the electrodeposition film forming method including processes in which a coating composition is electro-deposited on a coating object, the layer separation is executed while heating the object, and then, the object is hardened to form a double-layer hardened film composed of at least two layers, the coating composition contains coating film forming resin components (a) and (b), blocked polyisocyanates (c1) and (c2), and pigments. The coating film forming resin components (a) and (b) are incompatible with each other. coating film forming resin components (a) and (b) form emulsion particles A, B containing the blocked polyisocyanates (c1) and (c2). The coating film forming resin component (a) contains (meta) acrylamide as a copolymerization monomer.

title: Processing of three dimensional printed parts
abstract: A system for post-print processing of 3D printed parts includes an automated breakout system for separating 3D printed parts from printing media in a tray and a vibratory media cleaning system for removing printing media from the 3D printed parts. The automated breakout system includes a tray input mechanism, a bed including a first end disposed adjacent the tray input mechanism, the bed including one or more passageways configured to pass printing media through the bed, a vibration generator coupled to the bed and configured to vibrate the bed, and a part terminator disposed adjacent a second end of the bed. The vibratory media cleaning system include a vibratory bin, a vibration generator coupled to the vibratory bin and configured to vibrate the vibratory bin, an automated parts loader configured to introduce 3D printed parts to be cleaned into the bin, and an automated parts removal mechanism.

title: Gynecological capsule
abstract: The invention discloses a gynecological capsule. The gynecological capsule is prepared from the following components in proportion: 8%-15% of a lecithin extract, 10%-16% of a cyperus rotundus extract, 5%-15% of a safflower extract, 5%-15% of a motherwort extract, 8%-15% of a Chinese date extract, 5%-15% of a white gourd extract, 5%-15% of a Chinese angelica extract, 3%-10% of active polypeptide, 2%-7% of a Chinese wolfberry extract, 3%-10% of soybean isoflavone and 3%-10% of a rhizoma coptidis extract. The gynecological capsule disclosed by the invention is suitable for women with some common diseases of low immunity, climacterium, irregular menstruation and dysmenorrhea at present life, and the gynecological capsule has the functions of ageing resistance, breast cancer prevention, cervical cancer prevention, two-way regulation of estrogen of the women and the like.

title: Wind energy edifice
abstract: A pentagonal wind-powered building is provided, which comprises a wind-driven power generator with wind-gathering and wind-releasing gates and arranged in the wind-gathering point in the upper part of a funnel-shaped side wall. The wind is blocked by the wall and flows to the wind-gathering point and is further gathered to increase the wind speed by 3-5 times, thereby moving the turbine of the power generator. When the wind is too strong, the wind-releasing gate is deflected with the action of the spring to release the wind, thereby keeping the balanced pressure on the turbine and ensuring stable performance of the power generator. The energy is gradually exhausted with human progress. Human civilization is traced back to the use of fire but is also destroyed by fire. Energy waste results in a disaster to human beings. The invention is designed on the in-situ energy generation to realize the zero energy consumption of buildings in the city. Based on the existing power network, wind energy is collected and delivered to cities lack of wind, so that the problems of energy storage and power plant construction are overcome and the energy crisis is solved.

title: Manufacture of patterned metallic material
abstract:
PURPOSE: To clearly, beautifully form a pattern of a checked channel, by patterning with a driving roll and a follower roll provided with a tongued-and-grooved pattern in their outer surface, at rolling a patterned metallic material provided with a nonslip projections, etc.  
     CONSTITUTION: A transferring rolling reduction is given to a material 7 to be rolled, by a patterning roll 9 and a follower roll 8. By thus arranging the patterning roll 9 on the driving side and anothr roll 8 on the follower side, a point P 2 , wherein the circumferential speed of the driving roll 9 coincides with the surface speed of the material 7, approaches closely to the material releasing point R of the driving roll 9. As a result, so called rubbing up phenomenon, by which the corners in the cross section of the material 7 are formed into an obtuse projections on the run-out side of the rolls 8, 9, is prevented.

By thus arranging the patterning roll 9 on the driving side and anothr roll 8 on the follower side, a point P 2 , wherein the circumferential speed of the driving roll 9 coincides with the surface speed of the material 7, approaches closely to the material releasing point R of the driving roll 9. As a result, so called rubbing up phenomenon, by which the corners in the cross section of the material 7 are formed into an obtuse projections on the run-out side of the rolls 8, 9, is prevented. title: Voice transmission device and method
abstract: (57) Abstract: A digital communication line in which a voice codec has a plurality of encoding / decoding algorithms and an appropriate encoding / decoding algorithm can be automatically selected based on an external signal obtained from the digital communication line. Provided is an audio transmission device and method for use. In a voice transmission apparatus that performs pulse code modulation of an analog signal such as voice or musical tone and transmits and receives the analog signal via a digital communication line, a voice codec has a plurality of encoding / decoding algorithms. And the clock signal C supplied from the communication line 9   Clock frequency detector 10 for detecting frequencies of d and Cf   And automatically selects a predetermined algorithm corresponding to the clock frequency detected by the clock frequency detection unit 10 from the plurality of encoding / decoding algorithms, and codes the audio codec 4 according to the selected algorithm. And a control circuit 5 for executing a decoding / decoding process.

title: Mass filtering of ions using a rotating field
abstract: Systems and methods for filtering a continuous beam of ions are provided. An acceleration electric field is applied to a continuous beam of ions using an accelerator to produce an accelerated beam of ions. A field is applied to the accelerated beam to separate ions in time and space using a deflector producing a separated beam of ions. The field applied by the deflector is a rotating field or a circulant rastering field. The rotating field can be a rotating magnetic or electric field. Only accept those ions from the separated beam whose m/z values lie within a range centered around a target m/z value using an aperture. The aperture can include a pinhole aperture in a rotating disk or an annular aperture in a first stationary disk, a second deflector, and a pinhole aperture in the center of a second stationary disk.

title: High throughput secure multi-party computation with identifiable abort
abstract: A system for identifying one or more malicious parties participating in a secure multi-party computation (MPC), comprising one of a plurality of computing nodes communicating with the plurality of computing nodes through a network(s). The computing node is adapted for participating in an MPC with the plurality of computing nodes using secure protocol(s) established over the network(s), the secure protocol(s) support transmittal of private messages to each of the other computing nodes and transmittal of broadcast messages to all of the computing nodes, detecting invalid share value(s) of a plurality of share values computed and committed by the computing nodes during the MPC, verifying each of the share values according to a plurality of agreed share values valid for the MPC which are determined through a plurality of broadcast private messages, identifying identity of malicious computing node(s) which committed the invalid share value(s) failing the verification and outputting the identity.

title: Device for the oven protection of cables
abstract: Field of application: Electrical line connections between control technology devices and their line connections. OBJECT OF THE INVENTION: Prevention of failures, which are due to mechanical action on connecting lines. The object of the invention is to provide a device for a local protection of lines, especially flexible lines against rotation, buckling or other mechanical force. The essence of the invention is that a protective tube is pulled over the line and sit on this two ringfoermige individually movable Druckstuecke. The Druckstuecke are connected to each other by means arranged horizontally to the line fastening means, wherein in a cavity formed by recesses in the interior of the Druckstuecke between these and the protective tube cavity are inserted. When the connection between the first and second pressure piece is tight, the balls are pressed into the protective tube. figure

title: Side by side picture display with reduced cropping
abstract: A television apparatus comprises a video display (16) having a first vertical display height and a first format display ratio (e.g. 16:9). A first video processor (56) combines video signals representative of at least two pictures for side by side display of the pictures on the video display, each of the pictures having a second format display ratio (e.g. 8:9) smaller than approximately 4:3. A vertical height control (86, 88) decreases the vertical display height smaller than the first vertical display height during the side by side display of said pictures, each of the side by side pictures thereby having a third format display (e g. 8:7) between the first and second format display ratios. The first, or a second, video processor horizontally compresses each of the pictures to correct for any image aspect ratio distortion due to decreasing the vertical deflection height.

title: Method for the plasma-chemical processing of a raw material and device for implementing same
abstract: The invention relates to a method for the plasma-chemical processing of a raw material of organic and plant origin. The method comprises treating a starting raw material containing hydrocarbons, in which method the raw material being treated is exposed to the action of products of low-temperature plasma from an electrical discharge with a value for the parameter E/N in the range of from 1x10 -16  to 20х10 -16  V х cm 2 , where E is the voltage of the applied electrical field produced over the surface of the raw material being treated, and N is the total concentration of the molecules and atoms in the plasma. Furthermore, the starting raw material is treated in a gaseous medium comprising hydrogen and/or hydrogen-containing compounds or comprising oxygen and/or oxygen-containing compounds at a temperature lower than the ignition point of the raw material. The invention also relates to a device for implementing this method. The invention makes it possible to decrease the costs involved in the processing of organic raw material and to increase the processing efficiency.

title: High-performance low-power-consumption real time clock
abstract: The invention discloses a high-performance low-power-consumption real time clock comprising a temperature-compensation crystal oscillator and/or a micro-star atomic clock. A frequency divider is connected on the temperature-compensation crystal oscillator and/or the micro-star atomic clock. An RTC chip is connected on the frequency divider. Besides, a low-power-consumption CPU is also connected on the temperature-compensation crystal oscillator and/or the micro-star atomic clock. A voltage adjusting device is also arranged between the temperature-compensation crystal oscillator and/or the micro-star atomic clock and the CPU. Furthermore, a calibrating device is also connected on the temperature-compensation crystal oscillator and/or the micro-star atomic clock. The beneficial effects of the high-performance low-power-consumption real time clock are that high stability frequency reference signals are converted via the voltage adjusting device and the low-frequency CPU, the signals are converted into standard brick signals via the frequency divider, and the characteristic of real-time output time is achieved in combination with the RTC chip. Meanwhile, precision of output time is guaranteed and working performance of the clock is enhanced.

title: A kind of cast iron pipe spray zinc machine with quick spray zinc function
abstract: The present invention relates to cast iron pipe paint spraying apparatus technical fields, and disclose a kind of cast iron pipe spray zinc machine with quick spray zinc function, including spraying zinc cabinet, it sprays and offers through-hole on the vertical tank wall in side of zinc cabinet, spray zinc cabinet offers sliding slot on the side wall of bottom, the notch and through-hole of sliding slot are located at the same side of spray zinc cabinet, slide bar is slidably connected in sliding slot, slide bar passes through the notch of sliding slot far from one end of sliding slot slot bottom and extends outwardly and be fixedly connected with support plate, the upper end of support plate is fixedly connected with driving motor by support frame, the output end of driving motor is connected with rotation axis by shaft coupling.There is the cast iron pipe of quickly spray zinc function to spray zinc machine for this, current cast iron pipe is able to solve when spraying receiving spray painting in zinc machine, it is necessary to be fixed to cast iron pipe, but fix using fixture, the problem of cast iron pipe of fixture fixed position is unable to fully be sprayed zinc, reduces spray zinc quality.

title: Ignition energy variable completely-transparent pipeline gas explosion experiment platform and method
abstract: The invention relates to the field of gas explosion safety engineering and in particular relates to an ignition energy variable completely-transparent pipeline gas explosion experiment platform and method. The experiment platform comprises an experiment pipeline, a vacuum meter, a pressure meter, a vacuum pump, an air valve, a circulation pump, a gas valve, two pressure sensors, an ignition control box, a data acquisition instrument and a computer, wherein the experiment pipeline is a completely transparent quartz pipe. The experiment platform is capable of synchronously triggering acquisition and ignition in the completely transparent quartz pipe under the ignition energy variable condition, accurately measuring explosion pressure and recording the flame propagation condition, and is simple to operate, low in cost, convenient to mount, high in safety performance and easy to popularize.

title: Deodorizing device
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [PROBLEMS] A user can deodorize in a relaxed state and at the same time, downsize the overall shape. A seat 2 is provided in a main body 1, and a hood 17 is rotatably supported. Body 1   Are provided with air outlets 6 and 13, and a suction port 7   When the user sits on the seat 2 with the hood 17 closed, fresh air mixed with the deodorant liquid is blown from the outlets 6 and 13 to the body and clothes of the user. Since the attached malodorous components are deodorized and the music is broadcast, the user can deodorize in a relaxed state. Further, since the blown air circulates in the closed space when the hood 17 is closed, it is possible to prevent the blown air from flowing out.

abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of recirculated cooling water cooling tower, belong to cooling tower technical field, this cooling tower comprises tower body, in tower body, top, upper end is provided with air outlet and hangs and is provided with fan, spray equipment and packing layer is provided with below fan, the centre of spray equipment is provided with water inlet pipe, the external pipe of spray equipment connects refrigeration plant, packing layer has gathering ground, the bottom of gathering ground connects the input of refrigeration plant by pipeline, the pipeline at output of refrigeration plant connects spray equipment, the pipeline connected for pipeline comprises pipeline body, this pipeline also comprises ventilation duct and heat dissipating layer, heat dissipating layer is positioned at outside pipeline body, pipeline also comprises lapping layer, pipeline body is simultaneously multiple to be wrapped in lapping layer.This cooling tower improves on the pipeline connected, and in heat radiation when making the recirculated water in cooling tower run in the duct, adds the heat radiation time of recirculated water, solves in cooling tower the problem that have ignored and lower the temperature in cooling water in-service pipeline.

title: Method and apparatus for production of high purity ultrafine silicon nitride
abstract: A process for preparing high-purity ultrafine silicon nitride particles features that the gas-phase reaction between silane and nitrogen takes place in vertical fluidized reactor with dual temp regions, a distribution plate made of stainless steel is arranged at bottom of fluidized bed, the carrier filler is silicon crystals with granularity of 0.1-0.5 mm, a main heater is set up outside the bed layer, the upper space of reactor is reaction region and secondary heater is arranged outside the reaction region. Its advantages are less investment in apparatus, low energy consumption, high output rate. Obtained silicon nitride particles have high uniformity, smooth surface, no inner air holes and not conglomerating.

title: Vacuum belt powder continuous dryer
abstract: The invention discloses a vacuum belt powder continuous dryer. The vacuum belt powder continuous dryer comprises a barrel, a feeding device, a discharging device, a belt drying device and a vacuum pumping device, wherein the belt drying device is arranged in an inner cavity of the barrel, and the vacuum pumping device is arranged outside the barrel. The belt drying device comprises a plurality of conveyer belts which are arrayed in the vertical direction, each conveyer belt is driven by an independent transmission device to move, the lower portion of an uplink belt of each conveyer belt is attached to a heat exchanger, the bottommost heat exchanger serves as a cooling heat exchanger, and the other heat exchangers serve as heating heat exchangers, every two adjacent conveyer belts are staggered, the conveying directions of every two adjacent conveyer belts are opposite, and then materials on the former conveyer belt can drop onto the next conveyer belt. By the adoption of the mode, the vacuum belt powder continuous dryer is simple and reasonable in structure, good in drying effect, suitable for mass and continuous production, high in heat efficiency and low in energy consumption, heat sensitive materials cannot be transformed in the drying process, the gentle drying effect is achieved, and the recovery rate of a solvent is high.

abstract: An apparatus for correcting an image may include a first correction unit measuring movement of a camera module and a position of a lens in the camera module and adjusting the position of the lens in the camera module in accordance with the movement, and a second correction unit calculating error vectors using the measured movement value of the camera module and the position value of the lens and correcting an image from the camera module using the error vectors.

title: Icam-related protein
abstract: DNA sequences encoding a novel human intercellular adhesion molecule polypeptide (designated 'ICAM-R') and variants thereof are disclosed along with methods and materials for production of the same by recombinant procedures. title: High-voltage magnetic saturation type single-phase controllable reactor
abstract: The utility model discloses a high-voltage magnetic saturation type single-phase controllable reactor which comprises an iron core consisting of a main iron core column, a first side column, a second side column, a first side yoke and a second side yoke; the reactor further comprises first control winding groups, second control winding groups, first working windings, second working windings and third working windings, wherein the main iron core column is sleeved with the second working windings; the first side column is concentrically sleeved with the first control windings and the first working windings; the second side column is concentrically sleeved with the second control windings and the third working windings; the cross sectional areas of the first side column and the second side column and the cross sectional areas of the first side yoke and the second side yoke are equal and are smaller than that of the main iron core column. The high-voltage magnetic saturation type single-phase controllable reactor is simple in structure and high in manufacturability; materials can be saved, and the cost is lowered. The high-voltage magnetic saturation type single-phase controllable reactor can be applied to a high-voltage level system.

title: Multifunctional wet protective mask
abstract: The utility model discloses a multifunctional wet protective mask, which comprises a half mask and a filter box, wherein the filter box is inserted into the middle lower part of the front of the half mask, and forms an integral structure with the half mask; the filter box has an integral structure consisting of an upper box and a lower box which are connected in an insertion way; the upper box is provided with an upper cover; the half mask is provided with a one-way expiratory valve and a one-way air inlet; the filter box is provided with an air inlet which is communicated with an air outlet through a plurality of layers of filter materials in the filter box; and the air outlet is communicated with the one-way air inlet on the half mask. The multifunctional wet protective mask integrates germ infection prevention, virus prevention, dust prevention and peculiar smell prevention, and has a small volume; the filter box has a scientific structure, and the filter materials are stored in the filter box, so that the multifunctional wet protective mask has a thorough sterilization effect, better antiviral, dustproof and peculiar smell-preventing effects, is convenient to wear, clean and replace and comfortable in use, and has small inhalation resistance.

title: Game machine
abstract: In a gaming machine, while a loop video is being displayed, a game ball is received at a start winning opening (start port), and the number of effects that are executed according to the background of the loop video is increased. title: Method for producing a motor vehicle component and motor vehicle component
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for producing a motor vehicle component and the motor vehicle component. Particularly, in order to produce the motor vehicle component, steel plate slabs having 10 to 40 mJ/m2 stacking fault energy and 10 to 30% manganese are provided. At room temperature, the steel plate slab material can result in the formation of bicrystal at least partially having a major austenite texture. At + 30 DEG C and -250 DEG C temperature, the steel plate slab is at least partially subject to heat treatment and then cold forming. According to the method provided by the invention, yield point and tensile strength are substantially improved, and high ductility is also achieved.

title: Power core
abstract: ?ower Core Abstract In most electronic or power cores, silicon iron or electrical steel laminations are used. This type of lamination causes hysteresis losses where by heating occurs resulting in losses in power efficiency. In this invention, a highly efficient Iron Oxide core, Iron Oxide is bonded together with any suitable resin or plastic or is compacted and enclosed in a sealed container. The resultant product or products become the core of any electronic or power device. This core displays low hysteresis losses because the material instantly responds to a magnetic field and instantly becomes random when the magnetic field is removed.

title: Isolated operation detection device, distributed power supply device, grid interconnection system, isolated operation detection method, and grid interconnection control method
abstract: Kind Code: A1 Even when a fluctuation cycle of an active signal (reactive power fluctuation signal) of each distributed power supply device connected to a system is not known, mutual interference due to an active signal is avoided, and a single operation of the distributed power supply device is prevented. An isolated operation detection device capable of detecting occurrence is provided.   Focusing on the fact that the reactive power fluctuation system fluctuates the system voltage, this is detected as a system voltage fluctuation ΔV2 by an isolated operation detection device installed in the distributed power supply G2, and this fluctuation signal ΔV2 is detected as a synchronization signal. As a result, the distributed power supply G2 can output an active signal (reactive power fluctuation signal) synchronized with the voltage fluctuation ΔV2 to the system. In addition, the distributed power supply G2 determines the presence / absence of an active signal (reactive power fluctuation signal) of another distributed power supply from the amount of system voltage fluctuation, and appropriately adjusts the level of the active signal to be output by itself, At the same time as ensuring the fluctuation required for islanding detection, it is possible to suppress fluctuations in the grid voltage at all times and to suppress a reduction in power quality.   [Selection] Figure 2

title: Torque calibrator for torque wrench
abstract: The invention relates to a torque calibrator for a torque wrench. The problems of low working efficiency and measuring accuracy of the conventional torque calibrator are solved. The torque calibrator comprises a bottom plate, a mechanical auxiliary force adding mechanism, a measuring and executing mechanism and a data display mechanism, wherein the mechanical auxiliary force adding mechanism and the measuring and executing mechanism are arranged on the bottom plate; and the measuring and executing mechanism is connected with the data display mechanism. The torque calibrator is characterized in that a wrench push rod position adjustment unit is arranged in the mechanical auxiliary force adding mechanism. By the torque calibrator, the defects in the prior art are overcome, calibration time is effectively shortened, the measuring accuracy is enhanced, and the torque of the torque wrench is quickly calibrated.

title: Steering control method and device
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] In a steering lever type articulate type self-propelled vehicle, careless engine start when the lever is tilted or unexpected articulation of the body due to careless lever tilt when the engine is started PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a steering control method and device for automatically preventing the occurrence of an accident based on. In a steering control method for a steering lever type articulated type self-propelled vehicle in which steering is achieved by articulating a vehicle body 40 by an actuator 33 that operates based on an operation of a lever 20, when an engine is started, The state of the lever 20 is detected, and when the lever 20 is neutral, the engine can be started. On the other hand, when the lever 20 is not neutral,   The engine cannot be started. Further, when the engine is started, the state of the lever 20 is detected, and when the initial state of the lever 20 is not neutral, the actuator 33 is disabled, and then the lever 20 is once neutralized and then the lever 2 is again activated.   When 0 is not neutral, the actuator 33 is allowed to operate.

title: Polyester composition and film
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Structure] A polyester containing 90 mol% or more of ethylene terephthalate units and containing one kind of a polymerization catalyst metal compound selected from antimony, germanium and titanium compounds. ,   0.2 mol / ton or more as a metal for the polyester 1   A polyester composition having a mol / ton or less and an ethylene terephthalate cyclic trimer content of less than 0.4% by weight based on the polyester. [Effect] The film formed of this polyester has a very small content in the film of the cyclic trimer. Therefore, when it is used for electrical insulation of a closed motor for a refrigerator, even if the refrigerant comes into contact with the film. The amount of the refrigerant extracted by the refrigerant is small, and it is possible to prevent troubles that occur because the cyclic trimer is deposited in various places of the refrigerator and becomes a plug. Also,   Since it has excellent hydrolysis resistance, heat resistance, and mechanical properties, the life of the refrigerator motor can be further extended, which is very suitable.

title: Information processing system and information processing method
abstract: There is provided an information processing system, which includes measures to address issues regarding the access control and/or session control, capable of transmitting and receiving a control packet from a remote apparatus that is placed on a network in a location where another party resides, with which voice dialog communications is being taken place. Further it is desirable to provide an information processing system and/or an information processing method with. Two personal digital assistants are respectively connected via radio to two connection points, which are called access points, to perform voice communication using VoIP network. In addition, the two personal digital assistants exchange packets of data between two personal computers via the Internet and local radio communication units after establishments of connections with the personal computers are achieved using RFID.

title: Reconfigurable logic signal processor (RLSP) and method of configuring same
abstract: A reconfigurable logic signal processor (RLSP) ( 100 ) and method of configuring same in accordance with the present invention stores a plurality of configuration files ( 262, 264, . . . , 266 ) in a configuration storage memory ( 212 ) in compressed form. A portion of the reconfigurable resources ( 204 ) of the RLSP ( 100 ) are configured as a decompresser to provide for decompression of the compressed configuration files ( 262, 264, . . . , 266 ). The reconfigurable resources ( 204 ) of the RLSP ( 100 ) may be utilized to implement signal processing functions ( 114 ) as well as process control processor instructions and/or configuration data ( 120 ), such as for example decompression of compressed configuration data. When decompression functions are complete, a non-decompression instruction can be executed using the reconfigurable resources allocated to decompression by reallocation of those resources.

title: Visual contrast electromagnetic damping demonstration device
abstract: The utility model discloses a visual contrast electromagnetic damping demonstration device, which comprises a base (1), a left vertical bracket (2) and a right vertical bracket (2') and a crossbar (3). The device is characterized in that two springs (4) with the same spring force are hung on the crossbar (3) by two suspending ropes, iron blocks (5) with the same weight are respectively hung at the lower end of each spring (4), an electromagnetic coil is arranged at one side of one iron block (5), a record plate (7) is arranged at the back side of the springs (4), a piece of record paper (8) is arranged on the record plate (7) and wound on rotating rollers (9) at the two ends of the record plate (7), one of the rotating rollers (9) is connected with the shaft of a miniature low-speed motor (10), and a record pen (12) is fixed on the lower end of the springs (4). The visual contrast electromagnetic damping demonstration device has simple structure, small size and is convenient for contrast observation and record analysis, thus realizing clear demonstration and facilitating institutional understanding for students.

title: Air conditioner refrigerant heating device
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a compact refrigerant heating apparatus for an air conditioner that can continue stable combustion without breaking the pressure balance between supply air and exhaust air even under strong wind. A refrigerant heating device for an air conditioner including a combustion blower 21, a combustion unit 20, a refrigerant heating heat exchanger 22, and an exhaust pipe 24 in order, the front surface of which is covered by an upper front panel 17,   The combustion blower 21 is provided at one end with the intake port 30 facing the front, the exhaust pipe 24 is provided at the other end toward the front, and the combustion air intake is provided at the other end of the upper front panel 17. The entrance 32 is opened, and the air guide plate 33 is provided on the inner surface of the upper front panel 17.   Is provided to form an air supply passage 34, an exhaust pipe outlet 35 is opened at a position facing the combustion air intake 32 of the baffle plate 33, and faces the intake port 30 of the baffle plate 33. The air-supply opening 37 is opened at the position, and the compressible airtight member 38 extends over the opening edge in the gap between the air inlet 30 and the air-supply opening 37.   Was provided.

title: Method for triggering dependent spectra for data acquisition
abstract: Methods and systems are provided for triggering an information dependent mass spectrometry scan in real time. A mass spectrometry scan of a separating sample mixture is performed by a mass spectrometer at each time interval of a time period. The mass spectrometer receives the separating sample mixture from a separation device. It is determined at a certain time interval that a received mass spectrometry scan at the time interval and one or more preceding received mass spectrometry scans include two or more time-varying ion signals that represent two or more fragment ion transitions of a known compound. If a characteristic of the two or more time-varying ion signals meets a selection criterion, the mass spectrometer is instructed to perform a dependent mass spectrometry scan of the separating sample mixture for a precursor ion of the known compound at the time interval.

title: Wig
abstract: PURPOSE: To provide a wig covering the front edge of a base cloth with a hair part by providing a bent loop part fixing the hair material to the thread constituting the base cloth, positioning the bent loop part at the reverse face side of the base cloth and curling the hair part inserted into the bent loop part in a specific curled state. CONSTITUTION: A hair material 1 is fixed to a thread 3 constituting a base cloth 2 with a bent loop part 4 positioned at the reverse face side of the base cloth. The hair part 5 inserted into the bent loop part from the circumferential side toward the top of the head is turned downward and then curled upward. The reversed bent part 6 of the hair part at the base cloth side acts as a spring.

title: Method of cell taking on surface of article with three-dimensional structure
abstract: A method for implanting cells derived from a living body as living cells onto a surface of a three-dimensional structure having a complicated configuration such as teeth, dental implants, artificial bones and artificial vessels, which comprises the steps of: (a) preparing a mold matching a configuration of a surface of the three-dimensional structure, and (b) introducing a suspension of the cells into the mold, and then fitting the three-dimensional structure into the mold for incubation, and a three-dimensional structure having a surface on which cells derived from a living body are implanted as living cells, which is obtainable by the method.

title: In-vehicle projected reality motion correction
abstract: Method and apparatus are disclosed for stabilizing in-vehicle projected reality. An example in-vehicle projected reality system includes headset for displaying a projected reality image. The system also includes a localizer device for determining a headset pose in the vehicle. The system also includes a computing device for receiving the headset pose, receiving vehicle inertial data, determining a stabilized image based on the received headset pose and vehicle inertial data, and providing the stabilized image to the headset.

title: Beam stabilization for wideband phase comparison monopulse angle estimation with electronically steered antennas
abstract: A method for estimating a target angle of a wideband signal received on an electronically steered antenna array includes: generating spatial frequency data from the received wideband signal; stabilizing the spatial frequency data to a beam steering direction; compressing the stabilized spatial frequency data to a plurality of frequency range bins; calculating a monopulse discriminant from the stabilized spatial frequency data; and calculating the target angle using the monopulse discriminant.

title: Package for light emitting element housing, method for manufacturing the same, and light emitting device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a small light emitting element storage package and a light emitting device capable of efficiently reflecting light emitted from a light emitting element and emitting it uniformly and efficiently to the outside of a wide area.   A light emitting element storage package includes an insulating substrate 1 in which a recess 4 for receiving a light emitting element 3 is formed on an upper surface, and a mounting portion 2 of the light emitting element 3 is formed on a bottom surface of the recess 4. In addition, wiring conductors 5a and 5b to which the electrodes of the light emitting element 3 are electrically connected are provided on the bottom surface of the concave portion 4, and the concave portion 4 has a thicker central portion on the inner side than the upper side and a curved surface. title: Method and system for controlling an adaptive, blind, fractionally spaced equalizer
abstract: The present invention includes a method and system for controlling an equalizer equalizing data transmitted a communications channel which is oversampled at an oversampling rate of M. The method of the present invention includes the steps of initializing a plurality of data pointers and a first buffer stored in an input memory (22); generating a buffer full flag in response to filling the first buffer with a pre-determined number of data samples; initializing a counter (28) in response to the buffer full flag, the counter (28) generating an enable signal every M cycles; equalizing a portion of the pre-determined number of data samples in response to the enabling signal using an equalizer (20), where the portion of the pre-determined number of data samples is located using the plurality of data pointers; and adjusting the plurality of data pointers in response to the equalizing step using an FSE controller (24).

title: Superconducting power cable
abstract: (57) 【Abstract】 PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a superconducting power cable capable of reducing the weight of the superconducting power cable and preventing the spacer from damaging the insulating layer and the like even when the cable is cooled. To do. SOLUTION: A superconducting power cable has a core 3 in which a flow path 2 for a coolant is formed in a central portion thereof and a plurality of grooves are formed in grooves on an outer peripheral surface, and a superconducting conductor 4 arranged in the groove. Core 3   Insulating layer 5 laminated on the outer peripheral surface of the, and a plurality of spacers 6 arranged on the outer peripheral surface of the insulating layer 5 and having a spiral shape similar to a spiral used as an oil passage of an OF cable or the like.   An inner metal cover layer 8 that covers the spacers 6, and a heat insulating layer 9, an outer metal cover layer 10, and an anticorrosion layer 11 that are sequentially stacked on the outer peripheral surface of the inner metal cover layer 8. Further, the spacer 6 may cover the peripheral surface of the EPR or rubber insulated wire with a metal braid.

title: Continuous feed shaft retort process and apparatus for recovery of non-ferrous metals
abstract: A method and apparatus for recovering primary metals from pyrometallurgical process dust, in which a vertical shaft retort (10) situated in a furnace or afterburner (12) associated with a pyrometallurgical apparatus, such as an inclined rotary reduction smelter, and preferably having a tapered cross-section with the larger end at the bottom, receives greenball pellets from a pelletizer, vaporizes volatile metal metals therein, and removes them to an associated volatile metal recovery apparatus (24), while reducing and recovering the major metal oxide components in the pellets in metallized form.

title: Magnetic resonance imaging device and method for operating same
abstract: In order to provide a magnetic resonance imaging device that does not use liquid helium and that can stably operate a superconducting magnet operating in driven mode, the present invention is, at a power source unit that supplies current to a superconducting coil, provided with a control unit that controls the current supplied to the superconducting coil on the basis of at least one unit of information among the power supply state from the outside to the power source unit, the operating state of a refrigerator, the temperature of the superconducting coil, the magnetostatic field strength, the current value flowing to the superconducting coil, and the nuclear magnetic resonance signal detected by a detector.

title: Polarization lidar
abstract: The utility model relates to the use of lidar technologies in meteorology and atmospheric optics; it can be used to measure the optical and microphysical parameters of the atmosphere, to control the level of atmospheric pollution, and to recognize crystalline and hail clouds. The device contains a polarizing splitter-analyzer, a half-wave phase plate with the possibility of complete circular rotation of its axis relative to the optical axis of the telescope. This allows the measurement process to calibrate the sensitivity of the photodetectors by spatial changes in the polarization receiving base due to discrete rotation of the half-wave phase plate and registration of photodetector signals at each fixed position of the plate. The technical result consists in reducing the error in measuring the degree of depolarization of the signals of a polarization laser. 1 ill.

title: Dampening of hierarchically tiered structures
abstract: With a hierarchal grading of a structure (X1) with an impedance level (Z1) larger than the impedance (Z2) of a substructure (X2) impedance bridges (X4) are used for transferring vibrations between the structure and substructure and preferably at the points of lowest impedance vibration absorbers (X5) are used to remove the vibration energy. Where a sub-substructure is also included multi-axle acting vibration absorbers are used to produce simultaneous damping of the vibrations of the different structure hierarchies.

title: Substrate of thin film single crystal diamond
abstract:
PURPOSE: To enable a single crystal diamond to be epitaxially grown on a gallium arsenic substrate by laying a single crystal silicon carbide as an intermediate layer between the diamond and the gallium arsenic substrate.  
     CONSTITUTION: A single crystal SiC intermediate layer in film thickness of 2000 Å is formed on a single crystal GaAs substrate in diameter of 2" by plasma CVD process of SiH 4  at substrate temperature of 1000°C and vacuum degree of 2 torr. Next, H 2  containing 0.5% CH 4  is decomposed by microwave plasma CVD process at substrate temperature of 900°C and vacuum degree of 30 torr to form a diamond layer in film thickness of 3000 Å. The single crystal diamond layer thus formed is provided with spotty diffraction points. Through these procedures, the diamond can be epitaxially grown on a gallium arsenic substrate to form a thin film single crystal diamond substrate in large space at low cost. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR THE PRODUCTION OF FURNITURE OR HOUSING PARTS WITH CURVED CORNERS
abstract: In the method of producing furniture or housing parts with curved corners from a pressboard panel surface-treated at least on one surface, in particular coated with a film or veneered, the pressboard panel, in the area of the subsequent corners on the inside of the bend, is provided with recesses extending along the respective bending axis. The recesses in each bending area are formed by a multiplicity of impressions which narrow from the inside of the bend to the outside of the bend, extend right into the proximity of the outside of the bend and are staggered relative to one another in such a way that the pressboard spots remaining between the impressions are connected to one another by webs. Then a glue is applied in the bending area to the inside of the bend. The glue penetrates into the impressions, the pressboard spots and the webs and softens the pressboard panel. After it is softened in the bending area, the pressboard panel is brought to bear with its surface-treated side against a flexible supporting belt, is secured relative to the supporting belt in the longitudinal direction of the latter, and then the two panel parts adjoining a bending area are bent towards one another into the desired end position around a counterstay, bearing against the inside of the bend, for forming the round corner. In a device for carrying out this method, a multiplicity of punches (11) narrowing towards their free end are staggered with respect to one another on a common pressure plate (18). <IMAGE>

title: How to restore the farm
abstract: (57) [Summary] The main object of the present invention is to provide a method for restoring a field which is improved so as to prevent continuous cropping failure. SOLUTION: On a field, soil is repeatedly mixed with water to wash the soil. After soil washing, the aqueous solution collected in the field is drained by natural drainage. According to the invention,   Chemical fertilizers used in upland farming, residual components of pesticides, and components such as insecticides can be removed from the soil, reducing the residual concentration of chemical fertilizers and pesticides in the soil and preventing continuous cropping failure. Can be prevented.

title: Piezoelectric vibrator and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a piezoelectric vibrator which is used as a piezoelectric vibrator for a diaphragm, is thinner, has high reliability and is easy to manufacture, and a manufacturing method thereof.   A piezoelectric vibrator comprising a bimorph piezoelectric vibrator joined so that a shim material 2 is sandwiched between piezoelectric ceramic plates 1a and 1b, and moisture-proof sheets 3a and 3b joined to the outer surfaces of the piezoelectric ceramic plates 1a and 1b. The wire cores 5a, 5b, 5c, and 5d of the flat cable 4 are sandwiched between the piezoelectric ceramic plates 1a and 1b, the shim material 2, and the moisture-proof sheets 3a and 3b. A lead wire for drawing out the electrode is formed. In addition, a prepreg in which a fiber material is impregnated with a thermosetting resin is used for the production, and the shim material 2 is obtained by curing the prepreg.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Exhaust purification device for internal combustion engine
abstract: Provided is a technique capable of burning or not burning fuel injected by sub-injection in an exhaust gas purification device for an internal combustion engine.   An exhaust purification catalyst for an internal combustion engine, exhaust purification catalyst temperature detection means for detecting the temperature of the exhaust purification catalyst, a fuel injection valve for injecting fuel into a cylinder of the internal combustion engine, and a main injection from the fuel injection valve A sub-injection unit for injecting fuel from the fuel injection valve in a later expansion stroke or exhaust stroke, and when the temperature of the exhaust purification catalyst is lower than the activation temperature, the fuel injection timing by the sub-injection unit is advanced, and the exhaust gas is exhausted. Fuel injection timing changing means for delaying the fuel injection timing by the sub-injection means when the temperature of the purification catalyst is higher than the activation temperature.   [Selection diagram] FIG.

title: Running gear unit with adjustable wheel contact force
abstract: The present invention relates to a running gear unit for a rail vehicle, comprising at least one wheel unit (103.1, 103.2) and a magnetic circuit device (111) for a magnetic circuit arrangement (112), the at least one wheel unit (103.1, 103.2) being configured to contact a part of a rail (110.1) of a track to be travelled on with a contact force acting between the at least one wheel unit (103.1, 103.2) and the rail (110.1). The magnetic circuit arrangement (112) has an activated state and a deactivated state. The magnetic circuit device (111) is configured to participate in generating, in the activated state, a magnetic flux in a magnetic circuit (113; 213) of the magnetic circuit arrangement (112) to increase the contact force compared to the deactivated state. The magnetic circuit device (111) is configured such that at least a part of the at least one wheel unit (103.1, 103.2) and the part of the rail (110.1) contacted by the at least one wheel unit (103.1, 103.2), at least in the activated state, forms a part of the magnetic circuit (113).

title: Processing of semiconductor components with dense processing fluids and ultrasonic energy
abstract: Method for processing an article (363) with a dense processing fluid in a processing chamber (362) while applying ultrasonic energy during processing. The dense fluid may be generated in a separate pressurization vessel (303,305,309) and transferred to the processing chamber (362), or alternatively may be generated directly in the processing chamber (362). A processing agent may be added to the pressurization vessel (303,305,309), to the processing chamber (362), or to the dense fluid during transfer from the pressurization vessel to the processing chamber. The ultrasonic energy may be generated continuously at a constant frequency or at variable frequencies. Alternatively, the ultrasonic energy may be generated intermittently.
