title: Slotted channel
abstract: The slot channel comprises an inlet part (20) with side walls (21, 21 '), between which an inlet slot (22) is formed. At the lower edges of the side walls each support angle (23, 23 ') are attached. Below the inlet part (20), a channel element (40) can be attached in such a way that surface water or similar liquid can be conducted through the inlet part (20) into the channel element (40). It is proposed to mount the support brackets (23, 23 ') in such a way and to project beyond sidewalls (41, 41') of the channel element (40) such that a load acting on the inlet part (20) - in the installed state - acts from above a floor section (13) located next to the channel element (40) can be diverted. This compensates for setting the overall layout (including the floor) and increases the durability of the overall layout.

title: Nanostructures, systems, and methods for photocatalysis
abstract: The present invention generally relates to nanostructures and compositions comprising nanostructures, methods of making and using the nanostructures, and related systems. In some embodiments, a nanostructure comprises a first region and a second region, wherein a first photocatalytic reaction (e.g., an oxidation reaction) can be carried out at the first region and a second photocatalytic reaction (e.g., a reduction reaction) can be carried out at the second region. In some cases, the first photocatalytic reaction is the formation of oxygen gas from water and the second photocatalytic reaction is the formation of hydrogen gas from water. In some embodiments, a nanostructure comprises at least one semiconductor material, and, in some cases, at least one catalytic material and/or at least one photosensitizing agent.

title: Helmet
abstract: A helmet assembly includes an upper member, a lower member, and rigid or semi-rigid plates connected between the two members. The helmet may include a series of fluidly connected air compartments beneath the plates is disclosed. Embodiments of the helmet may dissipate impact energy in multiple ways including deformation of the plates, shifting of the plates, cushioning of the plates against a resilient compressible material present in the upper member, compression of air within the air compartments, movement of air within the air compartments, and/or expansion of air in non-impacted sections of the air compartments which causes the shifting of non-impacted plates. Springs with or without resilient, compressible inserts may be positioned between movable plates and a frame member. A spine including compressible material may extend along a top section of the helmet and connect plates on opposite sides of the helmet.

title: Scroll type hydraulic machine
abstract:
PURPOSE: To make abnormal wear and seizing damage trouble in a thrust bearing part preventable, by pumping up oil inside an oil sump by means of centrifugal action in a main shaft inner part, while feeding the thrust bearing part with a part of the oil fed to a crank hole.  
     CONSTITUTION: Oil inside a lubricating oil sump 909 is pumped up into an eccentric hole 401 by means of centrifugal pumping action produced by rotation of a main shaft 4 by way of an oil cap 12 and an oil passage 404 and lubricated to an eccentric bush 5. And, with an oil hole 405, lubrication takes place for a lower main bearing 702 while with an oil hole 406, for a lower thrust bearing 701, respectively. The oil that lubricated the eccentric bush lubricates an upper main bearing 602, then reaching to an upper thrust bearing 601, and afterward it is discharge to an Oldham's chamber 605. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1985,JPO&Japio

title: Electroconductive contact unit having compression spring with normally and coarsely wound segments
abstract: In an electroconductive contact unit including a pair of needle members projecting from either end of a holder arrangement, and an electroconductive compression coil spring interposed therebetween for resiliently urging the needle members away from each other, the compression coil spring comprises a normally wound segment and a coarsely wound segment. When the contact unit is applied to an object to be contacted, the adjacent turns of the coil wire of the normally wound segment are brought into contact with each other so that the electric path between the needle members is substantially straight along the length of the coil spring with the coarsely wound segment. Therefore, by selecting the number of turns and the coil pitch of the coarsely wound segment of the compression coil spring, it is possible to minimize the electric impedance and the electric resistance of the compression coil spring while meeting the requirements of the compression coil spring for providing a required resiliency to the needle members.

title: Insoluble pb alloy anode
abstract: PURPOSE:To further prolong the service life of an insoluble Pb alloy anode by limiting the amt. of Sn present as an inevitable impurity in the Pb alloy contg. prescribed percentages of In and Ag. CONSTITUTION:This insoluble Pb alloy anode is composed of 0.5-13wt.% In and the balance Pb with inevitable impurities or further contains 0.5-10wt.% Ag. The amt. of Sn among the impurities is limited to <=0.01wt.%. The anode has superior durability and the service life is further prolonged.

title: ARRANGEMENT FOR ROTATING THE POLARIZATIONAL LEVEL OF ELECTROMAGNETIC WAVES
abstract: A polarisation aperture, which operates as a secondary emitter and is inserted between two rectangular waveguides which are rotated about their common longitudinal axis is used for rotating the polarisation plane of electromagnetic waves which are propagating within waveguides. The polarisation plane of a power component of the electromagnetic wave which is incident from one waveguide is rotated by means of said polarisation aperture such that a predetermined power component of the electromagnetic wave is coupled into the other waveguide and can propagate there in the form of the desired mode.

title: Setting method of initial rolling reduction in cluster mill
abstract: PURPOSE:To perform the rolling of proper thickness from the initial stage of roll changing and to improve product yield, by starting the rolling, after deciding an initial rolling down pressure, based on the roll-diameter difference at the time of changing work rolls, within a range that the rolling down pressure is proportional to the rolling reduction of Sendzimir mill. CONSTITUTION:A rolling down pressure is proportional to a rolling reduction in a Sendzimir mill, except a small range. Accordingly, a rolling thickness coincides with the prescribed one from the initial stage, when the rolling is started after correcting the rolling down pressure based on the roll diameter difference at the time of changing the work rolls; then the product yield is remarkably improved, that is valuable in this field.

title: Balancer mechanism of rotating body
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a balancer mechanism for a rotating body, which has a simple structure and can effectively cancel an unbalanced couple with a small space requirement. SOLUTION: A non-rotating fixed gear wheel 10 having the same axis as the rotation center XX of the rotating body 1, directly meshing with the rotating gear wheel 10, and synchronizing with the rotation of the rotating body 1, the fixed gear wheel 10 Are provided with rotating gear wheels 8 and 9 that revolve around the periphery of the rotating gear wheel.   9, balance weights 11 and 12 are attached. The balance weights 11 and 12 are a primary balancer for canceling an unbalanced force generated in the rotating body 1, and an unbalanced couple generated in the rotating body 1 by rotating synchronously with the rotating body 1. Also serves as a secondary balancer to cancel out.

title: Methods and apparatus for increasing aerodynamic performance of projectiles
abstract: A method for enhancing an aerodynamic performance of an unmanned projectile. The method including at least one of the following: (a) morphing a cross-sectional shape of the projectile after launch thereof; (b) morphing a longitudinal shape of the projectile after launch thereof; (c) bleeding a fluid at a base of the projectile during flight thereof: (d) varying a base cone angle of the projectile as a function of speed thereof; (e) deploying at least one wing from a body of the projectile after launch thereof; and (f) deploying a fin from the body of the projectile after launch thereof.

title: Platform for immobilization and observation of subcellular processes
abstract: A method of immobilizing matter for imaging that includes providing an array of nanofibers and directing matter to the array of the nanofibers. The matter is immobilized when contacting at least three nanofibers of the array of nanofibers simultaneously. Adjacent nanofibers in the array of nanofibers may be separated by a pitch as great as 100 microns. The immobilized matter on the array of nanofibers may then be imaged. In some examples, the matter may be cell matter, such as protoplasts.

title: Method for adaptively improving image quality according to display device in mobile terminal
abstract: There is provided a method for adaptively improving an image quality according to the characteristic of a display device in a mobile terminal. In the method, a color matching table is set for an adaptive image compensation according to the characteristic of the display device in the mobile terminal. A color value of a decoded image signal is converted with reference to the color matching table, for displaying the converted image signal on the display device. The image signal, which is adaptively converted according to the characteristic of the display device, is displayed.

title: Liquid treatment appts for fibrous materials
abstract: A receiver has a device to carry the fibres matter to be treated which divides the receiver into two chambers, joined only through the fibrous matter. Through this, liquid is circulated and a vacuum pump is connected by its suction element to one chamber, where it creates a vacuum. This element is also connected to the other chamber of this or a similar receiver by a pipe. In the pipe is a condenser, while the first chamber is connected to a pipe which admits air or steam to dry the material. Used to dry textiles, such as fibres on cross-wound bobbins.

title: Porous ceramic sheet-holding table
abstract: A porous ceramics supporting platform comprises a base plate and a upper plate surface which are communicated with absorbing air source through an air duct; the upper plate surface is composed of a ceramic outer ring associated with a porous ceramic vacuum inner plate; the side ring face of the outer ring is adhered to the outer side face of the porous ceramic vacuum inner plate; the lower surface of the outer ring is closely connected to the upper surface of the base plate from top to bottom by a stay bolt; the lower surface of the porous ceramic vacuum inner plate is closely connected to the upper surface of the base plate from bottom to top by a lag bolt; the porous ceramics supporting platform can avoid uneven load on wafer, concavo-convex distortion, information distortion so as to guarantee precision of wafer processing and greatly improve finished product rate, which meets requirement of online test device in semiconductor special equipment. The porous ceramics supporting platform can be widely applied in semiconductor special equipment industry for wafer reduction and polishing technique.

abstract: Provided is a technique advantageous for increasing the effect of preventing deterioration of an organic EL element when a drying member is disposed in a recess provided on one main surface of a sealing substrate.   An organic EL display device according to the present invention includes a support substrate SUB, an organic EL element supported on one main surface of the support substrate SUB, a plurality of organic EL elements facing each other and communicating with each other through a groove TC. Are provided on the main surface facing the organic EL element, a sealing substrate CS that forms a hollow body with the support substrate SUB, and a plurality of drying units each containing a desiccant and disposed in the recess RC. title: Ophthalmic apparatus
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain the best data concerned, by detecting the degree of alignment between an eye to be examined and a measuring apparatus at the time of the measurement using an ophthalmic machinery and selecting the optimum value from the range of a plurality of permissible errors corresponding to the detected degree.  
     CONSTITUTION: In an alignment detection mechanism, the alignment beam emitted from an LED 5 is reflected by a mirror 6 and a half mirror 7 to further transmit through the half mirror 7 and an image forming lens 8 and subsequently reflected by a mirror 9 to be received by a beam detector 10 and formed into an image thereon. Setting devices 21a, 21b, 21c set allowance error ranges for automatic measurement of the alignment accuracy of an eye E to be examined and the mechanism. Further, the output signals of pulse counters 22a, 22b and the output signal of a comparator 20C are inputted to an AND circuit 23. The AND circuit 23 is connected to a trigger generator 24 and, when either one of the output signals of the pulse counters 22a, 22b and the comparator 20c become an H-level of a high output signal, automatic measurement is started. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Bleed airflow balancing control using simplified sensing
abstract: A simplified air bleed balancing control system for a pair of aircraft gas turbine engines reduces the number of pressure transducers and differential pressure transducers. Advantages include lower weight, less expensive system, better total system MTBF (mean time before failure), acceptable differential pressure transducer drift identification and compensation by the digital controller, and fewer maintenance tasks.

title: Induction heating roller apparatus
abstract: The induction heating winding component 5 is placed in the hollow drum 1, and both ends of said drum are closed by flanges 2A and 2B, and the driving shafts 4A and 4B which have a coaxial boring and form a whole body with the flanges can be rotatively supported, and both sides of the winding component 5 are supported by supporting rods 9A and 9B, and the supporting rods are supported in the coaxial boring of the driving shafts by means of bearings 10A and 10B. The drum 1 and flanges 2A and 2B are tihtly combined together by using conical fitting mode. When the drum 1 is removed from flanges, the driving shafts and supporting rods are temporarily tightened, and the driving shaft 4B is supported by using cantilevered mode, and when assembling and removing, the drum 1 is mounted on its conveying mechanism.

title: Upward flowing water type packed tower type water treatment equipment
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] To feed raw water to a particle packed bed by a raw water pump in an upward flow, insolubilize and remove ions to be removed from the raw water, and discharge treated water from the upper part of the packed bed. In addition, a circulation pump is not required in the upward flowing water type packed tower type water treatment apparatus in which a part of the treated water is circulated to the lower part of the packed bed. The quality of the treated water is stabilized by sufficiently developing the particles of the packed bed to form a stable and uniform fluidized bed. SOLUTION: An upward flowing water type packed tower type water treatment apparatus in which a part of treated water is circulated upstream of a raw water pump 3.   The raw water pump 3 can supply the raw water and circulate the circulating water with the raw water pump 3, and the circulating pump becomes unnecessary. By supplying raw water and circulating water through the same water supply line, the water flow below the packed bed is made uniform. For this reason, a fluidized bed with good particle expandability and uniformity is formed, and the quality of the treated water is stabilized.

title: Anti-explosion grab crane
abstract: The utility model discloses an anti-explosion grab crane which comprises a cart, a trolley and a grab bucket, wherein wheels are arranged at the bottoms of two ends of the cart; the trolley is arranged on the cart; the grab bucket is connected with a winding drum of the trolley through a steel wire rope. The anti-explosion grab crane is characterized in that anti-explosion limiters are respectively arranged at two ends of routes of the cart and the trolley; a three-in-one speed reducing motor is arranged on the cart; a motor of the three-in-one speed reducing motor is connected with a speed reducer through a two-layer protection coupler. Compared with the prior art, the anti-explosion grab crane is characterized in that the anti-explosion limiters are respectively arranged at two ends of routes of the cart and the trolley, so that the cart and the trolley are controlled to not collide with the ends of the routes in high-speed operation to cause spark, thereby avoiding the explosion products and improving the safety of the operation.

title: Manufacturing process for a refractory material, protective coating that can be obtained with this process and uses of this process and this coating
abstract: This invention relates to a process for manufacturing a refractory material, a protective coating, and uses of this process and this coating. The process comprises the following steps: a) deposit on the surface of a substrate or in a mould a first dispersion containing at least one metallic compound chosen from among borides, carbides and borocarbides containing at least one transition metal, in powder form, and a resin with a coke mass content equal to at least 30% after carbonization; b) dry the resulting deposit; c) cross-link the resin; d) carbonize the resin under an inert atmosphere; e) cover the deposit with a second dispersion containing Si in powder form and a binder; f) heat the deposit to a temperature greater than or equal to the melting temperature of Si, under an inert atmosphere. Applications: manufacture of propulsion parts and fuselage and wing elements for aerospace and aeronautical applications; manufacture of heat exchangers for thermal power stations; metallurgy; chemical industry; etc.

title: Hybrid control device for position and force for direct movement multi-freedom robot
abstract:
PURPOSE: To attain a force control of a robot in an advancing direction by setting the restoring force restored to a designated path and a viscous force returned to a designated speed in response to a deviation when an external force is eliminated and a robot is restored to the designated path and the designated speed.  
     CONSTITUTION: A deviation between an object position R (s)  and a position C (s)  of an end effector of a robot is taken and the deviation is used for an input to a controller of a transfer function G (s)  expressed in equation I, where (k) is a spring constant (the spring force is active as a restoration force), (m) is a mass constant, C is a viscous constant, k v , N, Km represent constants being values of the hardware and Km/S(1+ TmS) is a transfer function of a motor. In using a controller having the transfer function G (s)  above, a force proportional to the deviation between the object position R (s)  and the end effector position C (s)  is exerted as a restoration force restoring the robot to the object position and in exerting an external force F (s)  to the robot, the robot is operated in the direction and a force proportional to the speed of the robot is exerted as the viscous force in the opposite direction. Thus, the force control is applied in a direction in parallel with the advancing direction and also in the advancing direction at the same time. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Flexible tubing occlusion assembly
abstract: An occlusion assembly for compressing at least one tube, e.g. a pair of side-by-side flexible tubes, that comprises an occluding member for each tube placed within the assembly. Each occluding member is pressed into an occluding position by an element that is movable, e.g. in a space between the occluding members, to cause a tube-contacting portion of each occluding member to translate toward its associated tubing to compress it. In an embodiment, the element is a spreader that is positioned between two occluding members and acts to spread the distal ends of the occluding members away from each other as they press against their respective tubes. A main spring may be included that urges the spreader toward the distal ends of the occluding elements into an occluding position. The spreader may be moved against the biasing force of the main spring to move the occluding members into a non-occluding position near the proximal ends of the occluding elements, for example manually through a button and linkage assembly coupled to the spreading element, or by control of a controller activating an actuator that is also coupled to the spreader.

title: Wireless transmission of sports venue-based data including video to hand held devices operating in a casino
abstract: Venue-based data including video from cameras located at a sports venue can be provided to hand held devices operating in a casino. A casino patron hand held device enables the view sporting events provided to a hand held device from a server and placement of wagers. Venue-based data including video and statistics are received from server including camera views captured as video by at least one camera located within at least one sports venue. Venue-based data is processed at server for display on a display associated with at least one hand held device operating within a casino. Venue-based data is displayed on hand held devices, enabling casino patrons to view event video moving about the casino. Casino patrons can also gamble using said hand held device while viewing selected sporting events within the casino.

title: Special high voltage module power supply for positive output of subminiature auto-excitation type photomultiplier
abstract: The utility model relates to a special high voltage module power supply for positive output of a subminiature auto-excitation type photomultiplier, which comprises a power circuit encapsulated in a shell and welded with a plurality of lead needles, wherein the power circuit comprises an auxiliary circuit, a reference circuit, a protective circuit, an oscillating circuit and a filter circuit as well as a voltage-doubling rectifying circuit, a voltage feedback circuit and a voltage sampling circuit, wherein the auxiliary circuit is connected with the oscillating circuit, the reference circuit is connected with the oscillating circuit through the protective circuit, the oscillating circuit is connected with the filter circuit through the voltage-doubling rectifying circuit, the voltage sampling circuit is connected with the oscillating circuit through the voltage feedback circuit, and the filter circuit is connected with the voltage sampling circuit. The high voltage module power supply has the benefits of high stability, very lower EMI and output ripple, wide input voltage range, low temperature drift, good long-term stability, small size, light weight and easy installation.

title: Agriculture environment monitoring control system
abstract: The invention discloses an agriculture environment monitoring control system. The system comprises sensing nodes, control nodes, wireless transmission nodes, a wireless central transmission node, a monitoring system server, a display module, a wireless communication module, a mobile terminal device and a network data server. The wireless central node transmits data acquired by each sensing node of the system to the monitoring system server through the wireless transmission nodes and sends the control instruction of the monitoring system server to the corresponding control modes through the wireless transmission nodes. The display module displays the state and the parameter value of each node. The monitoring system server transmits the state and the parameter value of each node to the mobile terminal device through the wireless communication module, receives the control instruction of the mobile terminal device, and sends the control instruction to the corresponding control modes through the wireless transmission nodes. The monitoring system server and the network data server share information of the whole system. According to the invention, the growth environment of crops is monitored and controlled in real time, and a guarantee is provided for scientific plantation.

title: Internet of Things intelligent household system based on ZigBee wireless communication protocol
abstract: The utility model discloses an internet of Things intelligent household system based on ZigBee wireless communication protocol, which comprises a plurality of household equipment, an intelligent household gateway, a wireless forward module, a security and protection system module, a light system module, a curtain control module, an environmental monitoring system module and an audio-video system module; the intelligent household gateway receives a control command from a terminal and forms a command with ZigBee data frame format, then the command is emitted through a ZigBee radio frequency module, and each control module receives the control command or receives the control command through the wireless forwarding form the terminal to control the domestic electric appliance. The control modules can serve as routes with one another, thereby the network connection stability can be greatly increased. The internet of Things intelligent household system based on ZigBee wireless communication protocol has the advantages of complete wireless bidirectional communication, large scale network, visible state, strong compatibility, stable performance, convenient upgrading and safety.

title: RADAR ABSORBER
abstract: The radar absorber comprises alternate layers of highly conductive film (F) of combined fibre material without filling and layers of lower conductivity (intermediate layers 2) comprising either a core material, or part core material part fibre. The core material may be a plastic honeycomb or matrix or synthetic foam with a filler of balls or short fibres of glass, ceramic, carbon or plastic which may be filled or hollow. The dielectric properties may also be varied by conductive layering of the filling material of the honeycomb.

abstract: A method and apparatus for recovering leakage energy during DC power to AC power conversion. The apparatus comprises a leakage energy recovery circuit for storing leakage energy from a transformer and selectively coupling stored leakage energy to an input of the transformer.

title: Method of playing a card game
abstract: A method of playing a card game is provided which includes the steps of providing a set of card hand locations, betting at least one credit at each of the card hand locations, dealing a first hand of cards at a first of the card hand locations from a deck of cards, determining a mathematical value for the first hand of cards, dealing hands of cards at all remaining card hand locations, each hand having a mathematical value about equal to the mathematical value of the first hand, and crediting in accordance with a pay table associated with the value of each hand played.

title: Systems and methods for enhancing and optimizing a user's experience on an electronic device
abstract: Certain embodiments are systems and methods for intelligently managing applications, hardware, connection access, and user requirements on electronic devices and systems. One aspect includes a resource manager functionality that takes into account parameters associated with some or all of multiple communications options, applications and platform, and uses those parameters to optimize the user experience in that context based on externalities and on certain information which indicates or suggests what the user prefers. Another aspect of the present invention is a method of controlling system resources on a client device. This may involve determining application requirements for applications currently in use on the client device, determining client device resource requirements based on the application requirements, and adjusting resource settings based on the resource requirements. Another aspect of the present invention is a connection module.

title: Semiconductor device and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] To prevent outgassing from the exposed surface, which is the side surface of the hole in the interlayer insulating film, in the process involving heat treatment. [Structure] First wiring layer 2 formed on semiconductor substrate 1   Second interlayer insulating film 4 interposed between the second wiring layer 7 and the second wiring layer 7.   The exposed surface including the inner wall of the via hole 5 formed in the above is covered with the nitride film 13. When the conductive layer 6 that electrically connects the first wiring layer 3 and the second wiring layer 7 is formed by embedding a conductive material by the selective CVD growth method, the nitride film 13 is removed from the second interlayer insulating film 4. It is possible to prevent the growth failure of the conductive material due to degassing.

title: Sluice valve oil-saving device
abstract: The utility model relates to a sluice valve oil-saving device which is arranged between a carburetor and an air inlet manifold. The device is composed of a casing, a central shaft, an elliptical valve plate, an operating rod, a spacing plate and a return spring. The opening degree of the valve plate is fixed at 70 DEG by the spacing plate. The inclined surface of the valve plate can be impacted by mixed gas, so that the mixed gas enters an air cylinder for burning after the secondary atomization; consequently, the fuel oil action is fully brought out, and the purposes of saving oil and eliminating air pollution are realized. The device has the advantages of good adaptability, no effect on the power of the engine and the driving safety, obvious oil saving effect and ensuring the original idle speed of the engine. The gross fuel saving ratio can reach more than 30 percent in the automobile running. The utility model has good economic and social benefits.

title: Sealing assembly for a centrifuge
abstract: In a sealed arrangement for a centrifugal basket (1), the basket (1) is set rotatablely around a rotating shaft (6) and is fixed rotatablely by a basket hub (2) and a hang (21) of the basket (1) and connected to a drive shaft (3). title: Method and machine for recycling discarded carpets
abstract: A method and machine are disclosed for using a cold dry abrasion step for separating segments of discarded carpet into pile material (usually nylon) and backing layers (usually polypropylene) for recycling. A preferred method of abrasion uses dry ice pellets (made of frozen carbon dioxide) which are ejected at high speed from a set of nozzles that shoot the pellets directly into an abrasion zone, as a segment of discarded carpet on a conveyor system is being stripped apart and disassembled. The dry ice pellets "freeze" the binder material (usually latex) by lowering it to a temperature that makes the binder brittle and easy to break apart. The pellets also serve as abrasive agents, in a manner comparable to sand-blasting; however, unlike sandblasting or liquid (steam or chemical) systems, the dry ice pellets evaporate (sublimate) directly into gas without going through a liquid phase, and without leaving any liquid or gritty residue. This eliminates the need for a drying operation, which saves time and energy and avoids a potential air pollution problem; it also renders the recyclable output material free of unwanted liquid residues, grit, or other materials that would decrease the value of the output material. This invention also discloses other processing methods which use cold dry abrasion, such as the use of freezing to render the latex binder brittle, coupled with the use of pellets made of a compatible material (such as nylon pellets, for carpets with nylone piles) as abrasive agents that can be mixed with the pile fibers that are recovered from a carpet without decreasing the value of the reclaimed pile material.

title: Biomass furnace with triple-combustion-supporting structure
abstract: A biomass furnace with a triple-combustion-supporting structure comprises a furnace body, a furnace cavity in the furnace body and an ash hopper, the lower portion of the furnace cavity serves as a combustion chamber, the ash hopper is placed below the combustion chamber, a second-time combustion-supporting liner is installed on the lower portion of the furnace cavity, a third combustion-supporting device is arranged at the upper end of the furnace cavity, an air outlet of an air blower placed below the exterior of the furnace body is divided into two paths, one path leads to the upper portion of the ash hopper through a first-time combustion-supporting air channel, the other path leads to the third-time combustion-supporting device through a second-time combustion-supporting air channel, and meanwhile, the second-time combustion-supporting air channel is communicated with the second-time combustion-supporting liner through a liner air duct. Due to the multi-stage combustion-supporting structure, combustible gas and granular black carbon which are generated by direct combustion of coal or biomass solid fuel can burn completely step by step, black smoke can be eliminated, the heat energy conversion rate of the fuel is improved, and the biomass furnace with the triple-combustion-supporting structure has the advantages of saving fuel cost, protecting the environment and the like.

title: Hot wire tig welding method
abstract:
PURPOSE: To increase a deposition quantity and to improve welding efficiency by melting the wire by controlling the magnetic blow of an arc as well as using plural hot wires.  
     CONSTITUTION: An arc 4 is generated between the lower end of a tungsten electrode 1 and the surface of a base metal 2 by connecting the lower end of the electrode 1 and base metal 2 to TIG welding power source 3 via lead wires 3a, 3b respectively. In this case a deposited metal 7 is formed on the surface of the base metal 2 by melting two pieces of wires 5, 5' with the arc 4 with heating them by wire power sources 6, 6' as well as covering the arc part 4 with the spouting of an inert gas from the lower end of the torch 1a. The magnetic blow phenomenon is completely controlled because the wires 5, 5' approach into the molten metal from the opposite direction to the electrode 1 within the same vertical face. Consequently the arc 4 is stabilized and due to plural hot wires being used the deposition quantity is increased and the welding efficiency improved.

title: Device and method for stabilising the flow through a chamber
abstract: The invention relates to a device (1) with at least one electrode (8) for generating an electrical field in a chamber (7), at least comprising at least one input channel (6) for introducing a fluid into the chamber (7), and at least one output channel (11) for discharging the fluid from the chamber (7). The invention also relates to a method for stabilising the flow of a fluid through a chamber (7) in which an electrical field is generated and which has at least one input channel (6) for introducing the fluid into the chamber (7) and at least one output channel (11) for discharging the fluid from the chamber (8). In order to avoid the unwanted effect of the fluid flowing back on grounds of gas formation, the average inside diameter of the input channel (6) is smaller than the average inside diameter of the output channel (11) of device (1) according to the invention.

title: Anti-ballistic body armour
abstract: A trauma attenuation pack 1 for use in flexible body armour comprises a plastics panel 3 (eg. of polypropylene) having on at least one side thereof a layer 4, 5 of a ballistic fabric securely affixed to the panel. A ballistic projectile impacting on the flexible body armour causes deformation of the panel 3 as well as possible breakage of the fibres of the ballistic fabric resulting in absorption of energy thereby reducing the deformation (or bulging) on the side of the armour adjacent the body. The layers may be united by stitching, preferably in a spiral pattern or by spot bonding. <IMAGE>

title: Coating machine active trimming knife device
abstract: This utility model is related to a kind of coating machine active trimming knife device, slide block is slidably fitted with support, slide block realizes linear reciprocating motion by first driving means, tumbler is installed with slide block, active round cutting-off tool is installed with tumbler, tumbler drives the rotation of active round cutting-off tool, second driving means and the 3rd driving means are provided with slide block, 3rd driving means drive the second driving means to realize linear reciprocating motion, second driving means and first driving means be arranged in parallel, passive round cutting-off tool is installed with the second driving means, the cutting edge of passive round cutting-off tool is fitted with the cutting edge of active round cutting-off tool.This utility model extends the service life of cutter；Meet thickness woven cloth in the face of the different needs of cutting clearance requirement；It is uniformly distributed deviation and the scale error brought using the abrasion of process that stage clip can be repaired in installation process between active round cutting-off tool and knife rest；Whole active edge-neatening apparatus are enabled with the on-line tuning of position.

title: Power system intelligent low-frequency low-voltage load reduction method based on intelligent household electrical appliance
abstract: The invention relates to a power system intelligent low-frequency low-voltage load reduction method based on an intelligent household electrical appliance. The method comprises the following steps: when large disturbance in a system is monitored, determining whether the frequency and the voltages of the system are decreased to preset load reduction motion values, and once the frequency and the voltages reach the load reduction motion values, obtaining power shortage in the system and determining a load capacity which should be cut from the system; starting an intelligent household electrical appliance load reduction module; starting low-frequency low-voltage load reduction; and if intelligent household electrical appliance load reduction cannot enable the system frequency and voltages to restore to normal operation scopes and the frequency and voltages are continuously decreased to preset values of the low-frequency low-voltage load reduction, starting the low-frequency low-voltage load reduction, according to a residual load reduction amount, successively starting a basic round and a special round of low-frequency load reduction for cutting off loads until the frequency is restored to the normal operation scope, and embedding one low-voltage load reduction module in each round of low-frequency load cutting. According to the invention, after a power system is disturbed, the frequency and voltages can be effectively and rapidly inhibited from dropping and even collapsing, the load cutting amount is small, and the economic loss is small.

abstract: The invention relates to method for videoconferencing, where videoconferencing signals are received as inputs of each including video- and audio streams in a plurality of downlink ports presenting participants' images and their speaking, where one participant is a speaker in turn; videoconferencing signal as an output is transmitted in an uplink port the signal including a video stream with a frame and an audio stream; participant's speaking is detected using a voice activity detection (VAD) for each communication channel; the video streams of the participants are combined into the frame according to the VAD.

The advantage of this invention is low cost. Carbon fibers refined from petroleum can be used in large amount to replace the import woods.

title: Reverse building method for lifting-type bucket-shaped underground garage
abstract: The invention discloses a reverse building method for a lifting-type bucket-shaped underground garage. The method comprises the following steps of: 1), constructing a bucket-shaped enclosure wall, and constructing an inner ring upright column pile, an elevator shaft and an engineering pile between stairs at the same time; 2), constructing a coping ring beam on the top of the bucket-shaped enclosure wall; 3) constructing an annular floor, namely a garage circular ring top plate; 4), dipping downwards from the middle area of the annular floor to the bottom surface of a lower layer of annular floor, pouring the lower layer of annular floor, and digging layers by layers to the bottom of the underground garage; and 5), building the outer wall of the underground garage layers by layers from bottom to top, and completing the construction of the inner ring upright column pile and elevator shaft as well as from the inter-stairs to the ground. By the reverse building method, the layered construction is performed from top to bottom, and the inner ring upright column pile, the enclosure wall and the annular floor are connected into a whole to be commonly used as a support structure, so that the project proceed is quickened, and the cost is saved, and the method has the advantages of simple construction, economy, good stress performance and the like.

title: Liquid crystal display device and backlight module thereof
abstract: The invention provides a liquid crystal display device, which comprises a liquid crystal display panel and a backlight module. The backlight module is arranged on one side of the liquid crystal display panel; the backlight module comprises a light source, an optical plate, a plurality of optical diaphragms and a back frame. The light source, the optical plate and the optical diaphragms are all arranged in the back frame, wherein the optical plate is positioned on one side of the light source; and a plurality of optical diaphragms are positioned on the optical plate. At least one side of each optical diaphragm is provided with at least one positioning part, and the back frame has a plurality of positioning holes, wherein the positioning holes are staggered mutually; and the positioning part is correspondingly arranged in the positioning holes.

title: Control apparatus for internal combustion engine
abstract: Provided is a control apparatus for an internal combustion engine, capable of improving a response characteristic of a PID feedback control, including: an oil pressure regulating valve having a solenoid; a variable cam phase mechanism for changing a cam phase; and an ECU for controlling the oil pressure regulating valve. The ECU includes: an actual cam phase detecting unit for detecting the cam phase; a target cam phase setting unit for setting a target cam phase; an output duty calculating unit for calculating an output duty; a feedback control unit for controlling the cam phase via the output duty calculating unit with PID feedback control; a coil temperature detecting unit for detecting a temperature of a coil; a circuit resistance calculating unit for calculating a resistance of an electric circuit by correcting a resistance of the coil based upon the temperature of the coil; and an integral term initial value calculating unit for calculating a holding output duty based upon the resistance of the electric circuit. When an integral term is initialized, the feedback control unit sets the holding output duty as the integral term.

abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent screw goods shelf. The intelligent screw goods shelf comprises a supporting frame comprising a vertical supporting frame body and a transverse supporting frame body perpendicular to the vertical supporting frame body. The intelligent screw goods shelf further comprises a containing device and a conveying device, the containing device is clamped on the transverse supporting frame body and can make parts fall off, and the conveying device is arranged at the lower end of the containing device; the containing device is further composed of partition parts, unit bottom boards, rotating parts, sensors, driving parts and controllers, wherein the partition parts are fixed to the supporting frame, each unit bottom board is arranged between every two connection partition parts, and the rotating parts are connected between the partition parts and the unit bottom boards; the sensors are arranged on the partition parts and used for sensing the partition parts, the driving parts are connected to the rotating parts, and the controllers are connected with the driving parts and the sensors. The intelligent screw goods shelf can automatically convey screws to a production line, solve the problem that the screws are not suitable for being conveyed by a mechanical arm because of the cylindrical shape, and automatically report the number and positions of the parts on the goods shelf. In addition, the intelligent screw goods shelf can also be suitable for other parts in special model, save labor and improve production efficiency.

title: Automatically adjusting device of wind shift
abstract: PURPOSE:To enable to perform the silent and smooth oscillating motion of vanes by a compact mechanism wherein an actuator utilizing a shape memory alloy means of Cu-Zn-Al base, Ti-Ni base or the like material is employed. CONSTITUTION:The actuator 50 consists of an operating member 60, which slides within a cylindrical outer tube 54 equipped with both bottoms and both the surfaces of which serves as the spring seats of an ordinary coiled spring 56 and a coiled spring 58 made of a shape memory alloy such as Cu-Zn-Al base metal, Ti-Ni base metal or the like, both springs being installed opposing to each other with the operating member 60 therebetween. Both the ends of the coiled spring 58 are connected to a drive control circuit 66 in order to easily control the voltage applied across both the ends of the coiled spring 58. When electric current is supplied to the coiled spring 58, said spring 58 is heated up to a high temperature state, which results to shift the operating member 60 to the right end side of a notch 52 by the shape memory effect and the energizing of the coiled spring 58 is stopped with the shifting movement of the operating member 60 and the temperature of the coiled spring 58 is left to lower so that the operating member 60 is shifted to the left end side of the notch 52 by the action of the coiled spring 56 serving as a bias coil in order to restore the initial state enabling the shape memory alloy to actuate its shape changing action again. Accordingly, neither motor nor air pressure source becomes necessary, resulting in enabling to realize very quiet operation and compact construction.

title: Transmission for vehicle
abstract: A transmission for a vehicle which can be applied to a shift mechanism where a shaft itself is rotated and having a simple configuration and axial miniaturization. A transmission for a vehicle in which a plurality of transmission shafts are provided each of which supports a plurality of transmission gears in a row and are arranged in parallel so that mutually corresponding transmission gears are engaged and transmission gears rotating in synchronization with the hollow shaft are selectively switched. Every transmission shaft is provided with a clutch mechanism provided between the hollow shaft and each transmission gear for fitting the hollow shaft and each transmission gear or releasing the fitting and a clutch actuator housed in the hollow shaft and the clutch mechanism selectively fits any transmission gear to the hollow shaft according to the axial position of the clutch actuator.

title: Sound generator
abstract:
The present invention relates to an apparatus for generating sound, comprising: a housing having an internal space of a predetermined size; A magnetic circuit part for placing a yoke in an inner space of the housing and disposing a magnet member on an upper surface of the yoke; and a thin vibration plate having a voice coil attached to a lower surface corresponding to an upper portion of the magnet member; It consists of a diaphragm assembly consisting of a support ring that the lower surface is integrally attached to the upper peripheral edge of the plate is assembled to the upper end of the housing.
   
   
    According to the present invention, when the diaphragm assembly having a thin thickness is mounted on the housing, it is easy to handle and prevents damage during handling, thereby preventing the deterioration of characteristics, and the diaphragm assembly having a thin thickness can be placed in the correct position of the housing. title: Sports helmet
abstract: A safe protective sports helmet is provided which includes a hat body, the hat body is provided therein with a circle of a head encircling element, and is provided rotatably thereon with a rotatable adjusting button. The head encircling elements and the rotatable adjusting button are movably connected with each other. By rotating the rotatable adjusting button, the head encircling elements can be adjusted to fit the head size of a user.

title: Tilt detection sensor
abstract: (57) 【Abstract】 PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To obtain an inclination detection sensor capable of surely detecting the inclination of an object to be detected while having a simple structure. According to the present invention, a light emitting unit that emits light, a light receiving unit that receives light from the light emitting unit, and the light emitting unit and the light receiving unit are sealed so that an inclined surface is formed above them. An inclination detection sensor comprising: a base; a lid mounted on the base to cover the inclined surface; and a sphere movable on the inclined surface between the lid and the inclined surface. The inclined surface is provided with two groove portions respectively accommodating the light emitting portion and the light receiving portion, respectively, with a spacing dimension smaller than the diameter dimension of the spherical body and contacting the spherical body on the inclined surface. The inclination detecting sensor is characterized in that possible barrier portions are provided upright between the groove portions.

title: Prism sheet and backlight module adopting same
abstract: The utility model provides a prism sheet and a backlight module adopting the same. The prism sheet comprises a base, a plurality of first light collecting structural portions and a plurality of second light collecting structural portions, wherein the first light collecting structural portions and the second light collecting structural portions are arranged on the same surface of the base, each first light collecting structural portion comprises a plurality of closely and parallelly arranged first prism columns extending along the first direction, each second light collecting structural portion comprises a plurality of closely and parallelly arranged second prism columns extending along the second direction, the first direction is different from the second direction, and the first light collecting structural portions and the second light collecting structural portions are arranged at intervals. The single prism sheet can realize horizontal and perpendicular light collection and can substitute for two prism sheets adopted by a backlight module in the prior art, so that the thickness of the backlight module adopting the prism sheet is decreased, and cost is reduced.

title: Process for preparing aromatic polyamides of high hydrolysis resistance with controlled water content of diamine
abstract: There is described a process for preparing aromatic polyamides of high hydrolysis resistance by reacting aromatic diamines in a conventional organic solvent and in the presence or absence of inorganic salts wherein the diamine, which has a water content of up to 25% by weight, is dissolved in the organic solvent, which may likewise contain water, and the solution is subjected to a vacuum distillation until the water content of the bottom product is <100 ppm and subsequently the inorganic salts if necessary and then the dicarbonyl dichloride are added in a conventional manner and the condensation reaction is performed and concluded in a conventional manner.

title: Method and device for simulation design of differential transformer displacement transducer
abstract: The invention discloses a method and a device for simulation design of a differential transformer displacement transducer. The method comprises the following steps: collecting every output signal through a programmable processor, using the collected output signal as the current output signal, inputting the current output signal into an input end, and continuing to obtain a next output signal till the calculated phase difference between an output signal and an excitation signal is zero; outputting a next output signal obtained from calculation by adopting the output signal when the phase difference between the output signal and the excitation signal is zero. The method and the device adopt the programmable processor to achieve simulation design of the differential transformer displacement transducer, therefore, in a function simulation process of the differential transformer displacement transducer, changes of simulation-design connection modes and working modes can be achieved by programming and correcting a control algorithm of the programmable processor without adding a novel processor; hence, the complexity and the hardware cost of circuit design can be reduced.

title: Hybrid line coding method and apparatus using 4B/3T encoding for payload bits and 1B/1T encoding for framing information
abstract: Existing infrastructures such as DS1 or E1 are used at currently accepted rates to carry a third more information by using a hybrid encoding technique wherein a 4B3T encoding is done for the payload bits, while a 1B1T encoding technique is used for framing information. In this way, for example, a DS1 can be used at 1.54 Mbit per second to carry 2.058 Mbits of binary payload, while respecting the 8 kilobits of framing expected by DS1 hardware. Similarly, for example, an E1 infrastructure can be used at the accepted 2.048 Mbit per second rate to carry 2.560 Mbits of binary payload plus 128 kilobits of binary framing/CRC without having to change the accepted E1 framing techniques.

title: Bathtub accessory device and method
abstract: Provided is bathtub accessory product and installation method. The bathtub accessory product is designed to be secured to a bathtub wall and have a universal end that permits the attachment of any number of bath accessories such as a grab bar or swivel seat. The bathtub accessory may be installed within the inner cavity of a bathtub to ensure a secure fit while also allowing ideal placement of a bath accessory for use by a bather.

title: Battery pack and power supply system with the same
abstract: A power supply system includes a battery pack and an electronic device. The battery pack includes a battery, a voltage conversion circuit, and a first power port. The electronic device includes a second power port. When the battery pack is connected to the electronic device via the first power port and the second power port, the connection between the battery and the voltage conversion circuit is established, the voltage conversion circuit converts a voltage of the battery to a predetermined voltage and power the electronic device via the first power port and the second power port; when the battery pack does not connect to the electronic device, the connection between the battery and the voltage conversion circuit is cut off.

title: Drug use warning information processing method
abstract: The invention relates to a drug use warning information processing method. The method is characterized by comprising the steps of 1, receiving drug use medical order information generated by a first terminal; 2, extracting drug use information and disease condition information from the drug use medical order information; 3, querying a reasonable drug use rule library by utilizing the drug use information and the disease condition information, and when the drug use information does not conform to the reasonable drug use rule library, executing the step 4; and 4, generating a drug use unreasonable rule data set according to the reasonable drug use rule library, wherein the drug use unreasonable rule data set contains a drug use unreasonableness value; and 5, generating drug use warning information, wherein the drug use unreasonableness value is marked in the drug use warning information. According to the drug use warning information processing method provided by the invention, the unreasonable drug use situation can be avoided, so that the drug use safety of patients is improved.

title: Method of playing a wagering game
abstract: A method of playing a wagering game 20 between a plurality of players includes dealing four-card hands from a standard 52 card deck to each player, including a player-banker. The cards have numerical values, ace equals one, face cards equal ten, and two through ten equal their respective face values. The players are afforded the opportunity to (a) draw one additional card, or (b) stand with the dealt cards. The object of the game 20 is to have three cards which total to one of ten, twenty, or thirty. The winning hand is then determined by either (a) the fourth card with the highest numerical value, or (b) the least significant digit of the total of the fourth and fifth cards with the highest numerical value. If neither player has three cards which total to one of ten, twenty, or thirty, then the hand is a push and no wager 500 is won by either player.

title: Improvements in or relating to paper punches and the like
abstract: 401,620. Punching paper. COLLEY, A. S., and WILLMOTT, F. L., 17, Bishops Road, Cambridge Heath, London. July 12, 1933, No. 19754. [Class 31 (ii).] A paper punch for perforating loose sheets for insertion in a binder and of the kind consisting of a body 1 and a screwed punch 2, is mounted on a guide rod 5 provided with slots or depressions 6 which are engaged by a spring- pressed ball 7 to position the punch on the rod 5. Abutments 11, 12 at one end of the rod position the sheets of paper. On turning the rod 5, the ball 7 is pushed up into the cavity 8 ; the punch can then be moved opposite to a fresh slot, and is secured therein by turning the rod back.

title: A combined steamer
abstract: The utility model relates to a combined steamer. Outward bulging margo plicatus are formed on the upper end of a water containing pot and a pot dish, and concave inlaying slots are provided on the margo picatus. The pot dish provides air vent holes on the pot wall inside the concave inlaying slots to match with the concave inlaying slots. A barrel shape bridging pot is of horn shape on the upper and lower portion thus can be bridged between the water containing port and the pot dish or between the pot dishes with help of the concave inlaying slots, is also beneficial to sealing. And a pot lid which can be opened upward is installed on the top to cover. The utility model provides such virtues as capable of elastic combination and compact storage size, able to increase the production efficiency and reduce the production cost etc.

title: Fluorocarbon-containing compounds and method of imparting oil-and water-repellency to textiles,paper,leather and the like
abstract: The compounds of formula (I) may be obtained by different processes depending upon the different nature of the starting chemical intermediates. Obviously, the molecule as represented by formule (I) is formed by:   WHEREIN: X is bonded to an alkylene group and is selected from the group consisting of -H, -OCH3, -OC2H5, -OC3H7 and -OCH(CH3)2; Y is bonded to an N atom and is selected from the group consisting of -H, -CH3, -C2H5, -C3H7 and -CH(CH3)2; Rf is a perfluorinated hydrocarbon chain -CzF2z 1 in which z is an integer from 5 to 11; a, b and c are integers from 2 to 10; n is an integer from 1 to 10, preferably from 3 to 10; m is an integer from 1 to 10; p is an integer from 1 to 5; g is an integer from 0 to 5; ( Sigma ) is a polyester- or a polyether-polyurethane chain carrying the number p of the NCO groups indicated in the formula; the number-average molecular weight (international symbol Mn; Encyclopedia of Polymer Science and Technology, VOL. 3 page 653 and Vol. 9 page 182) of the compound not exceeding 60,000. This invention also covers precursors of the compounds as defined above, wherein the NCO groups are temporarily blocked by phenol or other suitable blocking agents. Advantageously, the number-average molecular weight of the compounds according to this invention amounts to at least 3,500. When, in the formula (I), q is zero, the compound will be a straight chain polymer, in which the n segments containing the perfluoroalkyl group Rf and the m segments containing the polyurethane chain will be distributed in the polymer chain in any order, with X radical being attached to one of the m segments and the Y radical being attached to one of the n segments. Typically, however, q will amount at least to 1, whereby the compound of formula (I) will be a branched chain polymer, having for example one of the following structures:   COMPRISING A PERFLUORINATED HYDROCARBON CHAIN Rf and a polyester- or polyether urethane chain ( Sigma ) carrying free NCO groups; and precursors of said compounds, wherein the -NCO groups are temporarily blocked by phenol or another suitable blocking agent. This invention relates to the art of imparting oil-and waterrepellency properties to substrates such as textiles, paper, leather and the like by treating such substrates with compounds comprising perfluoroalkyl chains. More particularly, the invention relates to compounds wherein a perfluoroalkyl chain is affixed to an active part of the molecule capable of providing for a possibly durable bond between the said chain and the substrate. Representative examples of such compounds, known in the art, are perfluoroacyl-aziridines, perfluoroacyl-polyamines and certain fluorocarbon urethanes, the latter being obtained by reacting an organic isocyanate with a compound containing a sulphonomide group, a perfluoroalkyl terminal group and a group containing an active hydrogen. A drawback of hitherto known compounds of the character just set forth above resides in that they are insoluble in organic solvents (actually, most of them are used in the form of aqueous emulsions) or are soluble in special solvents or specific mixtures of solvents only, which are either expensive and difficult to recover (e.g., fluorinated solvents) or inflammable or strongly poisonous. It is therefore an object of this invention to provide perfluoroacyl compounds capable of durably imparting oil- and water-repellency properties to substrates, said compounds being soluble in chlorinated hydrocarbon solvents common in the art, such as tetrachloroethylene and trichloroethylene, and said properties being practically unaffected for long time by rubbing, washing, dry-cleaning and similar treatments of fabrics treated with these compounds. A further drawback of prior art compounds resides in that relatively high amounts thereof are necessary to provide effective oil- and water-repellent coatings on a substrate, while a still further drawback resides in that the said compounds are unable to impart to woollens (e.g., woollen- and part-woollen yarn and knitted were) true shrink-proofness properties, the latter being here understood in the sense established by International Wool Secretariat (area shrinkage not exceeding 4 percent). Thus, a further object of this invention is to provide perfluoracyl compounds capable of imparting both oil- and waterrepellency and shrink-proofness to wollens. Further objects and advantages will become evident to those skilled in the art from the following description. title: Prediction calculation device, prediction calculation program and prediction calculation method for traffic situation
abstract: [PROBLEMS] To improve the accuracy of prediction of traffic conditions.   A traffic condition prediction calculation device is configured to calculate the number of vehicles flowing from the entrance for each entrance as the number of inflow vehicles based on the observed traffic information, and to disturb the movement of the vehicle. Estimated exits that the vehicle can select based on hindrance information indicating possible events, and conversion rates generated based on the estimated exits in standard start / end information indicating standard movement conditions from entrance to exit A sudden event response unit that generates corrected start / end point information by multiplying by, a base simulation unit that calculates the movement status of the vehicle for each link based on the corrected start / end point information, and the calculated number of inflowing vehicles And a prediction simulation unit that calculates a traffic situation to a destination where the vehicle moves by a predetermined time based on the movement situation.   [Selection] Figure 2

title: A kind of screw impregnation equipment
abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of screw impregnation equipment, comprise impregnation sleeve, be linked in the impregnation axle of impregnation sleeve inner and be arranged on the gum-injecting port of impregnation sleeve the same side, tow import and tow outlet, described tow import and tow outlet lay respectively at the two ends, left and right of impregnation sleeve.Described impregnation axle is screw impregnation axle, and the reach of impregnation axle is less than the length of impregnation sleeve.Glue is poured into from gum-injecting port, the size of tow import and tow outlet can be adjusted by regulating block and fastening bolt, be neat one by guaranteeing to enter the tow of impregnation sleeve to the adjustment of tow import size, by controlling the gel content from impregnation sleeve fiber out after impregnation to the adjustment of tow outlet size.The utility model is closed impregnation equipment, and glue does not contact with ambient atmosphere, pollution-free; Adopt screw impregnation, tow all enters in glue, long for time of contact with glue, and impregnation is abundant, and impregnation is effective.

title: Packing structure for sliding nozzle hole by packing material
abstract: PURPOSE:To decrease the influence of a non-metallic inclusion in a molten steel by maintaining the prompt hole openability of the titled structure obtd. by using particles consisting essentially of silica as a packing material for an upper layer and particles consisting essentially of carbonate of alkaline earth metal as a packing material for a lower layer. CONSTITUTION:Particles consisting essentially of carbonate of alkaline earth metal are used as a packing material for a lower layer with respect to a packing material for an upper layer of a sliding hole composed of particles conssiting essentially of silica. Then the packing material for the lower layer is easily decomposed to generate gaseous carbon dioxide when heated by a molten steel; at the same time, the packing material falls immediately on account of shrinkage of the particles themselves. The virtrified packing material for the upper layer remaining by virtrification is easily broken by the head pressure of the molten steel by which a hole is instantaneously opened. Since the packing material for the upper layer is vitrified in this case, the material falls in the form of a relatively large lump into the molten steel and floats easily on the molten steel owing to a difference in specific gravity. The floating material is absorbed in the slag layer on the surface of the molten metal without forming a harmful non-metallic inclusion.

title: Catalyst for producing carbon nanotubes by means of the decomposition of gaseous carbon compounds on a heterogeneous catalyst
abstract: The present invention relates to a process for the production of carbon nanotubes, in particular those having a diameter of 3-150 nm and an aspect ratio of length:diameter (L:D)>100, by decomposition of hydrocarbons on a heterogeneous catalyst which comprises Mn, Co, preferably also molybdenum, and an inert support material, and the catalyst and the carbon nanotubes themselves and the use thereof.

title: Environmental sanitation operation stream media network video monitoring system
abstract: The invention provides an environmental sanitation operation stream media network video monitoring system. Through a video acquisition device, acquired video information, after being coded by a data transmission module, is streamed to a video server through a network for storage and is streamed to a monitoring end for playing or real-time live broadcasting. The environmental sanitation operation stream media network video monitoring system performs accompanying monitoring on collecting vehicles in sanitation work so as to deal with problems timely and avoid expansion of harmful effects when the collecting vehicles have problems. The environmental sanitation operation stream media network video monitoring system employs stream transmission so as to alleviate the burden of network transmission, reduce caching requirement for a monitoring end, can realize "playing while downloading, and implementing monitoring", and reduces the waiting time of monitoring people. Since the volume of a stream media file is quite small, the network transmission is quite fast, the obtaining is convenient and time-saving, and the network cost is also saved.

abstract: 405,447. Ticket punches. GRIFFITHS, T. L., Beacon Works, Bradford Street, Birmingham. Dec. 22, 1932, No. 36276. [Class 31 (ii).] In a ticket or like punch, the body 5 and the bed 6 are formed integrally from a single length of bar or rod by cutting a slot 7 for the. ticket &c., the bore for the plunger 11 extending through the bed and the body. The plunger is raised by a spring 15 and depressed by a knob 20, rotation being prevented by a pin 16 on a collar 14 engaging a slot 17 in the body. The bracket 24 engages grooves 23 in the body and is formed with a supporting lug 5. Screws 26 secure the bracket to a conductor's strap or other support. In a modification, the knob 20 is replaced by a finger lever hinged to the body and engaging the end of the plunger.

title: High power microwave system having low duty cycle
abstract: A microwave system is disclosed wherein a microwave module is capable of providing a high power pulse of short duration with long off-duty periods. Standby means which may include a separate power source are provided to cause the electron discharge device powering the module to conduct during the off-duty periods. In a preferred embodiment, switching means to disconnect the power source from the electron discharge device during the duty cycle are also provided.

title: Compact furnace rear arrangement of 1000 MW ultra-supercritical unit
abstract: The utility model discloses a compact furnace rear arrangement of a 1000 MW ultra-supercritical unit. The arrangement comprises four electrostatic dust collectors longitudinally arranged into a row, front flues and rear flues of the electrostatic dust collectors, two absorption towers and a chimney between the two absorption towers, wherein the electrostatic dust collectors sequentially penetrate through the rear flues, induced draft fans are connected onto the absorption towers, the induced draft fans and booster fans are combined together, the induced draft fans, the booster fans and low-temperature economizers are jointly arranged below the rear flue, and the low-temperature economizers directly face outlets of the induced draft fans. The compact furnace rear arrangement has the benefits as follows: the arrangement is more compact, floor space can be effectively reduced, the use amount of steel is reduced, and the economic effects are obvious.

title: Totally-sealed equipment for continuously fermenting and processing sludge compost
abstract: The utility model discloses totally-sealed equipment for continuously fermenting and processing sludge compost. The totally-sealed equipment for continuously fermenting and processing the sludge compost is characterized by comprising a machine frame, a fermenting barrel which is arranged on the machine frame, a feed hopper and a discharge hopper which are arranged at the two ends of the fermenting barrel, and a control system, wherein the fermenting barrel is connected with a power device for driving the fermenting barrel to turn over around the axial direction. The fixed feed hopper and the fixed discharge hopper are adopted, so that the totally-sealed equipment for continuously fermenting and processing the sludge compost is compact in structure and intelligent in control; the processing amount by a piece of equipment is large; the sludge compost fermenting cycle is short; the obtained compost is stable in quality and does not cause odor pollution to surroundings; the discharged compost is aged and processed into a commercial fertilizer, and the commercial fertilizer is sold, so that the sludge is reduced and recycled and the harm of the sludge is eliminated; and the totally-sealed equipment for continuously fermenting and processing the sludge compost has a wide market prospect.

title: A kind of preparation of ceramic tile of stone multiaspect and laying method
abstract: A kind of preparation of ceramic tile of stone multiaspect and laying method, comprise the following steps：(1) preparing surface has the adobe of Z-Correct bump mapping Z-correct, carries out spraying ground-coat enamel successively on the surface of adobe using rotary glaze spraying cabinet and spray peels off glaze, carry out high-temperature firing, obtain the ceramic tile with Z-Correct bump mapping Z-correct；(2) plane adobe is prepared, using rotary glaze spraying cabinet after the surface of adobe spray ground-coat enamel, according to pre-designed stripping texture, spray peels off ink on the surface of adobe, and the arranged direction for peeling off ink is parallel with the Z-Correct bump mapping Z-correct；Glaze is being peeled off with the adobe surface spray for peeling off ink using rotary glaze spraying cabinet again, high-temperature firing is being carried out, obtains with the flat tile for peeling off texture；(3) by the ceramic tile with Z-Correct bump mapping Z-correct and with the flat tile for peeling off texture, interlaced interval laying；The preparation of the ceramic tile of stone multiaspect proposed by the present invention and laying method, not only third dimension is stronger for its brick face effect obtained, and grain effect is more rich and varied, good antiskid effect.

title: Recycled plastic automatic interlocking molding method and its equipment
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] The present invention is directed to a single heating plastic extrusion device 1.   It is an object of the present invention to continuously produce recycled plastic products having different shapes by a plurality of molds 5 and 5'having different shapes connected to each other. A heating plastic supply pipe 2 is connected to a heating plastic extrusion device 1, a plurality of rising pipes 3 are provided in the supplying pipe 2, an opening / closing shutter 4 is provided in the rising pipe 3, and the rising pipe 3 communicates with the upper end of the rising pipe 3. A pressing machine 6 for pressing both molds 5 and 5 ′ through a lower mold 5 ′ and an upper mold 5 is provided, and a cooling water jacket 7 is provided inside the both molds 5 and 5 ′. In a recycled plastic molding apparatus provided with a plurality of molding units u, the operation of self-holding the state in which the upper and lower molds 5, 5'are in contact with each other, and the operation of the supply pipe 2   The units u connected in parallel with each other operate individually, and each unit u repeatedly operates by satisfying irregular molding conditions such as different shapes and different heating plastic filling times, cooling times, etc. This is a molding method for molding.

title: A kind of distribution transformer fuel tank locating pin jig of adjustable dimension
abstract: The distribution transformer fuel tank locating pin jig of adjustable dimension of the present utility model, comprise the horizontal steel plate of two block length bar shapeds and the longitudinal steel plate of two block length bar shapeds, horizontal steel plate is arranged to groined type with longitudinal steel plate is mutually vertical, and be fixed on together by bolt, it is characterized in that: horizontal steel plate and longitudinal steel plate are respectively equipped with the strip slide opening along its length direction, bolt is through the slide opening on horizontal steel plate and longitudinal steel plate and by nut check; Two pieces of horizontal plate sizes are identical, and two pieces of longitudinal plate sizes are identical.The beneficial effects of the utility model are, applicability is strong, the distribution transforming locating pin jig of same capacity can be general, distribution transforming fuel tank locating pin location dimension change be not very greatly in, the steel plate need not changing cross direction can be general, and mould demand is few, save material, reduce man hour of labour, production cost is low, enhances productivity.When drawing is changed, the distribution transforming jig between different capabilities is all general.

title: Implant device for in-body blood flow control
abstract: An implantable blood flow control system has an open passageway defined inside a radially inner wall, behind which is a closed passageway. The radially inner wall comprises electroactive polymer actuator members for providing a variable flow restriction. The flow restriction has an undulating shape so that the volume of the closed passageway may remain constant during actuation of the electroactive polymer actuator members. In this way, the chamber behind the actuator members does not impede free movement of the actuator members. The undulating pattern presents no sharp edges, where blood coagulation could otherwise occur.
