title: Organic-inorganic complex for removing volatile organic compounds, method of preparation thereof, and the use of the same
abstract:
The present invention relates to an organic-inorganic complex, a method for preparing the same, and a use thereof for removing volatile organic compounds, and more particularly, to an organic-inorganic composite according to the present invention and a volatile organic compound such as formaldehyde in a silica molecular structure. It contains a thiol group (-SH) that can react directly, effectively removing volatile organic compounds that cause sick house syndrome or new car syndrome through chemical bonding.

title: Electrochemical system and methods for control thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to an electrochemical device. The device features an anode constructed of materials such that the device can be chemically recharged. In addition, the device is capable of switching between operating as a fuel cell or as a battery. In certain aspects of the invention, the device includes a liquid anode and is capable of operating at a temperature of less than 1000° C. Other aspects feature a control system and a fuel delivery system for the electrochemical system.

title: Electrochemical gas sensor
abstract: 1511203 Electro-chemical gas sensor GENERAL ELECTRIC CO 26 Nov 1976 [4 Dec 1975] 49335/76 Heading G1N An electro-chemical gas detector comprises a catalytic sensing electrode 15 and a catalytic reference electrode 18 on opposite sides of ion transport electrolyte 11, means 21 applying a voltage between the electrodes sufficient to oxidize the gas component to be detected at the sensing electrode,and thereby produce hydrogen ions which cross the electrolyte and are discharged at the reference electrode and means 19, 10, to store the hydrogen produced adjacent the reference electrode and thus maintain a substantially constant reference hydrogen potential. The hydrogen storage is preferably perforated palladium foil 19 which, with the reference electrode 18 is contained in sealed chamber 10. The electrolyte may be a solid polymer ion exchange membrane or an aqueous electrolyte absorbed in a matrix.

title: Method for preparing coumarin and derivatives thereof.
abstract: The present invention relates to a process for preparing coumarin and substituted coumarin starting from substituted hexahydrocoumarin or substituted dihydrocoumarin. The process of the present invention comprises a dehydrogenation reaction in the presence of at least one easily reducible organic compound in the presence of a catalyst consisting essentially of a Group VIII metal of the Periodic Table of the Elements. According to the present invention, an exceptionally high yield can be obtained without recycling hexahydrocoumarin or dihydrocoumarin present at the end of the reaction, and highly selective and easy purification can be achieved.

title: Nanostructures
abstract: The present invention relates to nanotubes and in particular to a process and apparatus for the preparation of nanotubes. In particular, the present invention relates to nanotubes which are made from materials other than carbon or nanotubes containing carbon but which would not ordinarily be classed as carbon nanotubes on account of their low carbon content. The nanostructures of the present invention have a number of applications such as: ionic conductors/battery components, hydrogen storage, templating nanowires, electrical devices, catalysis and synthesis, flat screen technology, and mechanical applications.

title: The preparation method of high specific energy porous silicon charcoal composite negative pole material
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of preparation methods of high specific energy porous silicon charcoal composite negative pole material, and the preparation method comprises the following steps: the polycrystalline silicon powder of deposition silver is prepared in S1.；S2. porous silica material is prepared；S3. the porous silica material prepared in step S2 is placed in ball mill together with polystyrene-divinylbenzene, polyaniline solutions and carries out ball milling, mixed slurry is prepared；S4. the mixed slurry prepared in step S3 is attached on copper foil electrode collector, polyaniline/polystyrene-divinylbenzene cladding porous silica material electrode is prepared；S5. the polyaniline/polystyrene prepared in step S4-divinylbenzene cladding porous silica material electrode is placed in vacuum drying oven and is sintered, prepare high specific energy porous silicon charcoal composite negative pole material.The present invention solves the silicon carbon composite that preparation method in the prior art is prepared, when being applied to lithium ion battery negative material, existing buffer capacity deficiency and the undesirable problem of silicon charcoal binding force.

title: Zeolitic molecular sieve, process for its production and its use
abstract: A zeolitic molecular sieve is described, the cavities of which are partially blocked. This partial blocking essentially concerns the beta  cages which are preferably 50 to 100 % blocked. Preferred blocking agents are alkali metal and/or alkaline-earth metal salts with mono- or bivalent anions. The incorporation of these salts for partially blocking the cavities of the molecular sieve takes place during or after the synthesis of the zeolite. The zeolitic molecular sieve according to the invention is suitable for separating components from gases, in particular for purifying gases such as for example for desulphurizing natural gas.

title: Producing method of tungsten-rhenium alloy galvanic couple filament
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for manufacturing a high-precision alloy filament by metal powder, which is mainly suitable for manufacturing a galvanic couple wire of W-Re alloy. The method comprises the steps: firstly, raw material powder is separated in a separator before materials are mixed; the material mixing operation is carried out in a high-efficiency material mixer, and the secondary material mixing operation is carried out after reduction treatment; the three-stage reduction treatment is carried out under the protection of hydrogen gas; after the materials are pressed into blank strips, the blank strips are vertically fused and sintered at the high temperature of 2600 to 3000 DEG C under the protection of hydrogen gas.

title: Conductive laminated body and method for preparing the same
abstract: Disclosed is a conductive laminated body, and a method for preparing the same, wherein the conductive laminated body including: a substrate; a zinc oxide-based thin film doped with an element M; and an interlayer including an oxide M'2O3, which is interposed between the substrate and the zinc oxide-based thin film. The disclosed conductive laminated body includes a metal oxide interlayer of an oxidation number +3, between a substrate and a zinc oxide layer. Therefore, it is possible to improve electrical properties of a transparent conductive thin film, especially, a resistivity property, and to minimize the unevenness in electrical properties between a middle portion and a circumferential portion on the surface of the thin film in sputtering deposition. Also, in deposition of a zinc oxide film, in addition to inert gas such as argon gas, the use of hydrogen gas can improve the concentration of electrons, and herein, the interposition of an interlayer including a metal oxide, between the substrate and the zinc oxide-based transparent conductive film, allows the heat- resistance/moisture-resistance stability and the uniformity of electrical properties.

title: Methanol partial oxidation reformer
abstract: A partial oxidation reformer comprising a longitudinally extending chamber having a methanol, water and an air inlet and an outlet. An igniter mechanism is near the inlets for igniting a mixture of methanol and air, while a partial oxidation catalyst in the chamber is spaced from the inlets and converts methanol and oxygen to carbon dioxide and hydrogen. Controlling the oxygen to methanol mole ratio provides continuous slightly exothermic partial oxidation reactions of methanol and air producing hydrogen gas. The liquid is preferably injected in droplets having diameters less than 100 micrometers. The reformer is useful in a propulsion system for a vehicle which supplies a hydrogen-containing gas to the negative electrode of a fuel cell.

abstract: Water is decomposed by an electrolytic cell with a number of electrodes. The gas mixture generated is used to exert pressure on electrolyte. title: Lithium sulphur battery electrode material and lithium-sulfur cell is prepared using this kind of electrode material
abstract: Lithium-sulfur cell is prepared the present invention relates to a kind of lithium sulphur battery electrode material and using this kind of electrode material, wherein negative electrode material is made of in terms of mass fraction following feedstock composition: 5-10 parts of stable state lithium powder, 3-7 parts of carbon materials, 1 part of binder and solvent.The present invention has especially selected stable state lithium powder and carbon nanospheres, carbon nanotube and mesoporous carbon to prepare cathode mixed slurry as the carbon material in cathode for the mixture that 5:2:1 is mixed according to mass ratio, so that the lithium-sulfur cell negative electrode material has superior performance, battery made from preparation method of the invention shows lesser impedance, shuttle effect and the dendritic growth in continuous charge and discharge process can effectively be weakened, show better cycle performance and high rate performance than common metal lithium foil.

title: Method for preparing hydrocarbons by using underground natural rocks
abstract: Pressurizing a carbon dioxide mixture containing carbon dioxide into a natural rock reactor; Pressurizing a water mixture comprising water and introducing it into a natural rock reactor; The solid acid in the natural rock reactor reacts with the introduced water to produce oxygen and hydrogen; And producing hydrogen by reacting with the introduced carbon dioxide to produce a hydrocarbon.

title: Liquid level detector
abstract: The utility model provides a liquid level detector which comprises a nut cap, a nut, probes and an anti-spattering cover, wherein a peripheral device is composed of an electrolyte tank, electrolyte, a wire and a control circuit, the anti-spattering sleeve is an uncovered cylindrical structure, the inner wall of the upper opening of the anti-spattering cover is provided with screw threads, the circumferences of the lower portion of the screw thread and the lower portion of the anti-spattering sleeve are both provided with more than one row of small holes, the upper end and the lower end of the nut are both provided with screw threads, and the middle portion of the nut is a step, a counter bore is arranged in the middle of the step, three through small holes are arranged in the counter bore, a long probe, a medium probe and a short probe are provided, a through-hole is arranged on the middle portion of the nut cap, the probes are inserted in the three small holes of the nut according to the length in turn, the lower end of the nut is tightly screwed with the anti-spattering sleeve, the upper end of the nut is matched with the nut cap, the three probes are respectively connected with the wire, the wire is connected with the control circuit through the through-hole on the nut cap, and the liquid level detector is integrally installed on the electrolyte tank containing electrolyte. The liquid level detector solves the problem of detection accuracy of a traditional liquid level detector, and has the characteristics of low production cost and simple structure.

title: An adsorbent for removal of hydrogen sulfide using float derived from tailing and method for preparing the same
abstract: The present invention provides an adsorbent for removing hydrogen sulfide using floats generated after flotation treatment using tailings containing a large amount of divalent cations excellent in adsorption to hydrogen sulfide as raw materials and a method for manufacturing the same. More specifically, the present invention provides a method for manufacturing an adsorbent for removing hydrogen sulfide including floats derived from tailings, comprising the steps of: treating the tailings by flotation; and recovering and drying the floats suspended during the flotation.

title: Formaldehyde decomposition deodorant
abstract: The invention relates to the field of formaldehyde treatment, in particular to a formaldehyde decomposition deodorant, which comprises the following components in parts by mass: 22 to 37 percent of carbamido compound, 2 to 6 percent of diatomite extract, 0.1 to 2.1 percent of chitosan, 1.5 to 4.8 percent of bactericide, 0.5 to 1.2 percent of ionic surfactant and 49 to 73.9 percent of purified water. The carbamido compound has strong reduction effect on formaldehyde, the diatomite can effectively absorb the formaldehyde, the ionic surfactant can promote the reaction of the carbamido compound, the chitosan and the formaldehyde, the physical and chemical double effects are realized, the components have synergistic effect, the formaldehyde and the indoor peculiar smell can be effectively removed, the indoor formaldehyde content is effectively reduced, the operation is simple and convenient, the use effect is good, and the secondary pollution can not be caused.

title: Reliquefaction system, and fuel gas supply system
abstract: A re-liquefaction system and a fuel gas supply system. The re-liquefaction system according to an embodiment of the present invention includes a first storage tank for storing a first liquefied gas; A second storage tank for storing a second liquefied gas having a higher liquefaction point than the first liquefied gas; And a heat exchange unit for performing heat exchange between the first liquefied gas evaporated gas supplied from the first storage tank and the second liquefied gas evaporated gas supplied from the second storage tank.

title: Device for comprehensively utilizing tail gas of MOCVD (Metal-Organic Chemical Vapor Deposition) equipment
abstract: The invention provides a device for comprehensively utilizing tail gas of MOCVD (Metal-Organic Chemical Vapor Deposition) equipment. The tail gas of MOCVD enters a low-pressure buffer tank by virtue of a pipeline, and the low-pressure buffer tank is connected with a high-pressure buffer tank; the high-pressure buffer tank is connected to a precooling exchanger by virtue of a pipeline, and the lower end of the precooling exchanger is connected with a lower-temperature condenser by virtue of a pipeline; the lower part of the lower-temperature condenser is connected with a gas-liquid separator by virtue of a pipeline, the lower end of the gas-liquid separator is connected with a liquid ammonia storage tank by virtue of a liquid ammonia pump, and the top end of the gas-liquid separator is connected to a molecular sieve absorption column; the upper end of the molecular sieve absorption column is connected to a pressure-swing absorption column, and the pressure-swing absorption column is connected with a hydrogen storage tank by virtue of a pipeline. The device has a simple structure and can be used for effectively separating the tail gas of the MOCVD, liquid ammonia and hydrogen are recycled and can be directly applied to other industries, and nitrogen can be directly discharged. The rate of multipurpose utilization is high, and the purposes of safety and environmental friendliness are realized.

title: Hydrogen ion-dissolved compound production system
abstract: A system for producing a dissolved hydrogen ion compound capable of delaying fuel depletion by reducing the amount of fuel used is provided. A hydrogen ion-dissolved compound production system 10A includes a pure water generator 11 that purifies water to produce pure, a hydrogen gas generator 12 that electrolyzes pure water to generate hydrogen gas, and a minus The negative power unit 13 for generating the negatively charged charged water from which the negative charge is removed by combining the negative charge of electricity and the positive charge contained in the pure water, and pressurizing the hydrogen gas and the negatively charged charged water to a predetermined pressure. In this state, the vortex turbomixer 15 is prepared by dissolving hydrogen gas in negatively charged charged water to form a high concentration hydrogen ion solution, and a predetermined fuel is added to the high concentration hydrogen ion solution to add the high concentration hydrogen ion solution and the fuel. Is formed from a stirring and mixing device 17 that mixes and stirs under pressure at a predetermined pressure and electronically bonds a high concentration hydrogen ion solution and fuel to form a hydrogen ion dissolved compound. title: Manufacture of silicon thin film
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To manufacture a high-quality silicon thin film by effectively removing residual oxygen in a processing atmosphere in a laser ablation method. SOLUTION: In a vacuum chamber 4, laser beam 1 is cast on a silicon target 8 and the material of the target 8 is emitted by the energy of the laser beam 1 and is deposited on a substrate 5 to form a silicon thin film 5. In this case, the inside of the vacuum chamber 1 is set to a silane gas atmosphere or a mixed gas atmosphere of silane gas and hydrogen gas.

title: Sealing device wide in temperature domain and resistant to various mediums
abstract: The utility model relates to a sealing device wide in temperature domain and resistant to various mediums. The compound sealing part is applied to sealing of carrying system elastic body structures such as storage boxes, pipelines, valves and other sealing parts and the relevant specified field of other civilian industrial products such as ultra-low temperature, high temperature and special mediums, and belongs to the technical field of sealing. A rubber and metal compound sealing part mode is adopted for the sealing device, fluororubber is selected as sealing mediums of the compound sealing part under the conditions of normal temperature and high temperature, and therefore the sealing device is resistant to oil, liquid oxygen impact and liquid hydrogen, is used as static sealing materials within the range from normal temperature to +250 DEG C,and the sealing device has high sealing reliability.

title: Secondary battery
abstract: A non-aqueous electrolyte secondary battery (10) proposed herein includes an electrode assembly (40), an electrolyte solution (80), and a battery case (20). The battery case (20) accommodates the electrode assembly (40) and the electrolyte solution (80). A membrane (201) capable of selectively releasing a hydrogen gas is provided on a portion of the battery case (20) so as to separate the interior and the exterior of the battery case (20).

title: Pipe joint member for high-pressure fluid
abstract: A pipe joint member for high-pressure fluid such as liquefied hydrogen includes a seal ring having a highly effective sealing function to prevent leakage of the fluid.  The seal ring (72) is set in a seal ring setting space (39) defined by a second radial surface (36) and a seal ring setting surface (38) of a first tubular member (20), a forward end surface of a second tubular member (22), and the outer peripheral surface of a valve seat member (24).  A forward end portion of the second tubular member (22) is provided with a communication hole (84) radially penetrating the forward end portion.  The pressure of the high-pressure fluid on the downstream side of a valve seat surface (52) causes a fluid path in the second tubular member to be communicated with the sealing ring setting surface (39) via the communication hole (84) and via a gap between the seal ring setting surface (38) and the outer peripheral surface of the forward end portion of the second tubular member.

title: Soft magnetism FeCoNiBCP high entropy amorphous alloy and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of FeCoNiBCP high entropy amorphous alloy of soft magnet performance, atomic percent group becomes Fe a Co b Ni c B d C e P f , wherein 30 < a≤45,10≤b≤25,15≤c≤30,0≤d≤20,0 < e≤20,0 < f≤20,15≤d+e+f≤30.The invention also discloses the preparation methods of the high entropy amorphous alloy.Compared with prior art, the invention has the advantages that with high saturation induction density Bs, (most alloy Bs are greater than 1.0T, it can reach 1.24T), extremely low coercivity (can reach 0.5A/m), good thermal stability, it therefore is a kind of excellent soft magnetic materials, the application in magnetic function device has excellent prospect.

title: Activating method for metallic hydride
abstract:
PURPOSE: To simplify the structure of a practical container holding metallic hydride (MH) and to stably utilize heat from the container by putting the container in other container withstanding pressure during activation and simultaneously pressurizing the inside and outside of the practical container to activate the MH.  
     CONSTITUTION: A container 1 holding MH is put in a pressure resistant container 2. after evacuating the containers 1, 2, valves V 1 WV 4  are opened, a valve V 5  is closed, and the pressure of gaseous H 2  necessary for activation is set with a reducing valve RV. Gaseous H 2  is introduced into the containers 1, 2 to the prescribed pressure, the valves V 2 , V 3  are closed, and the containers 1, 2 are allowed to stand until the MH is activated. At this time, the MH may be heated, and the internal pressure of the container 1 is always kept equal to that of the container 2. After finishing the activation, the valve V 5  is opened to release gaseous H 2  from a vent pipe 9, and when the internal pressure of the containers 1, 2 is reduced to pressure in practical use, the valve V 4  is closed. The valve V 5  is kept open, and when the internal pressure of the container 2 is reduced to atmospheric pressure, the container 1 is taken out, attached to a practical apparatus, and put to practical use. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1982,JPO&Japio

title: Ni-base superalloy having nickel interlayer for diffusion barrier and method of manufacturing the same
abstract: PURPOSE: A nickel based alloy having a diffusion barrier nickel layer and a manufacturing method thereof are provided to improve a high temperature stability and a high temperature characteristic by suppressing a vulnerable secondary reaction zone (SRZ) generated inside a super resisting alloy surface. CONSTITUTION: A method of manufacturing a nickel based alloy having a diffusion barrier nickel layer comprises the following steps: a nickel based super alloy (10, 20) comprised of a mono-crystal is prepared for; the nickel based alloy is solution-processed; a diffusion barrier nickel layer (22) is formed on a surface of the solution-processed nickel based alloy; a thermal barrier coating layer (24) is formed on the nickel based alloy in which the diffusion barrier nickel layer is formed; and an aging treatment is performed in the thermal barrier coated nickel based alloy.

title: Process and apparatus for the storage and transportation of liquefied gases
abstract: There is disclosed a vessel having a plurality of cryogenic tanks for the storage of liquefied gases wherein the cryogenic tanks are provided with conduit means and a heat exchange means whereby the unavoidable boil-off from a lower boiling liquefied gas stored in a first cryogenic tank means, is passed in indirect heat transfer relationship with the unavoidable boil-off from a higher boiling liquefied gas stored in a second cryogenic tank means, to re-liquefy the vapors of the higher boiling liquefied gas. Additional conduit means are provided to permit alteration of the gaseous atmosphere in the second cryogenic tank means (after un-loading its content) to the atmosphere of the liquefied gas to be subsequently stored and transported therein.

title: Manufacture of silicon solar battery
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve the characteristics of a solar battery by continuously supplying a purging gas to each buffer changer which is provided between independent reaction chambers, thereby preventing the gas between the chambers from moving upon movement of a flexible film. CONSTITUTION:Reaction chambers 15a-15c for forming by a plasma reaction an n type layer, an i type layer and a p type layer are sequentially provided. The movement of the gas upon movement of a flexible substrate 1 is controlled by the gas which is made of at least one of silane gas, disilane gas, hydrogen gas, argon gas, helium gas, nitrogen gas and ammonia gas which are introduced into the respective chambers 27a-27d between a feeding chamber 13 and the first reaction chamber 15a, between the first chamber 15a and the second reaction chamber 15b, between the second chamber 15b and the third reaction chamber 15c, and between the third chamber 15c and a winding chamber 18, thereby maintaining the purity of gas for producing in the chambers 15a-15c.

title: Power supply
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To prolong the outdoor-use period of a power supply by improving the generation capacity of its fuel cell. SOLUTION: An electric power unit, which comprises a fuel bomb connection part 3 and an attaching/detaching unit 4 both for detachably connecting a fuel bomb 2 charged with hydrocarbon fuel to a power supply body 1, reforms the hydrocarbon fuel into fuel gas including hydrogen with a reformer 5 and supplies it to a fuel cell part 6. The reform of the hydrocarbon fuel into fuel gas including hydrogen increases the volume of the fuel gas supplied to the fuel cell part 6. Which permits operation of the electric power unit for a longer period as well as fuel supply by the pressure of the hydrocarbon fuel in the fuel bomb 2, and dispenses with complicate gas passages and a temperature control part for the hydrogen storage alloy bomb.

title: Recycle and treatment method for waste produced by sawing and grinding silicon wafer and equipment thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a recycle and treatment method for waste produced by sawing and grinding silicon wafer, which includes: mixing water with dehydrated sludge cake to dilute a sludge cake as a working liquid; reacting the silicon in the sludge cake with water to produce silicon dioxide and hydrogen gas; pumping and recycling the hydrogen gas; using water to carry out specific gravity separation of silicon carbide and silicon particle for convenient classification and recycle; then carrying out solid-liquid separation to obtain solid state silicon dioxide and a liquid state water and polyethylene glycol (PEG); and finally separating water and polyethylene glycol (PEG). Therefore, this invention can recycle useful silicon particles, silicon carbide, silicon dioxide and PEG from the sludge cake to reduce total amount of waste and additionally produce hydrogen gas with commercial value to promote value added usage.

title: Fuel gas generation system and generation method thereof
abstract: A metal hydride (CH) is supplied into a reactor (23) while being converted into fine particles. By injecting water from an injector(3), the metal hydride(CH) is hydrolyzed to generate hydrogen. The water supplied to the reactor(23) is water generated by a fuel cell(1). This allows omission or a size reduction of a water tank for the hydrolysis, and therefore allows a size reduction of the system as a whole.

title: High pressure gas container and its manufacturing method
abstract: [PROBLEMS] For a resin-made high-pressure gas, which realizes a reduction in weight and an improvement in the degree of freedom in shape, exhibits sufficient gas barrier properties even for a gas having a low molecular weight such as hydrogen gas, and has excellent low-temperature impact resistance. Provide a container.   A container body of a high pressure gas container made of a resin, in which a regulation layer is formed on an outer layer, comprises: a gas barrier layer that blocks transmission of a high pressure gas filled into a hollow interior to a hollow exterior using EVOH as a material; It is formed so as to have a multilayer part including a cover resin layer formed on the inner layer and / or the outer layer of the gas barrier layer and ensuring the low-temperature impact resistance of the container body. title: Micro reformer and micro fuel cell having the same
abstract: The invention relates to a micro reformer using a liquid fuel like methanol, and a micro fuel cell having the same. The invention provides a micro reformer including a cylindrical tube having an inlet for receiving a liquid fuel and an outlet for emitting hydrogen gas. The micro reformer also includes a heater disposed in the tube for providing a heat source, and a catalyst disposed in the tube for producing hydrogen gas from hydrocarbon-based fuel. According to the invention, the micro reformer and the micro fuel cell can be integrated using a wire type for various purposes, allowing obtainment of a miniaturized fuel cell using methanol liquid fuel.

title: Combustible fuel and apparatus and process for creating the same
abstract: Features for an aqueous reactor include a field generator. The field generator includes a series of parallel conductive plates including a series of intermediate neutral plates. The intermediate neutral plates are arranged in interleaved sets between an anode and a cathode. Other features of the aqueous reactor may include a sealed reaction vessel, fluid circulation manifold, electrical power modulator, vacuum port, and barrier membrane. Methods of using the field generator include immersion in an electrolyte solution and application of an external voltage and vacuum to generate hydrogen and oxygen gases. The reactor and related components can be arranged to produce gaseous fuel or liquid fuel. In one use, a mixture of a carbon based material and a liquid hydrocarbon is added. The preferred carbon based material is powdered coal.

title: Low-temperature plasma device and method for decomposing hydrogen sulfide
abstract: The invention relates to the field of plasma chemistry, and discloses a low-temperature plasma device and a method for decomposing hydrogen sulfide, wherein the device comprises: the structure comprises a first cavity (1), a second cavity (2), a third cavity (7), an inner electrode (3), an outer electrode (4) and a blocking medium (6), wherein the inner electrode (3) and the outer electrode (4) are solid electrodes, and the shapes of the inner electrode and the outer electrode are matched with each other to form an equal-diameter structure. The low-temperature plasma reaction device provided by the invention can realize continuous and stable hydrogen sulfide decomposition process under obviously higher hydrogen sulfide conversion rate, and can realize long-period operation.

title: Method of adsorbing organic carboxylic acid having 1-3 carbon atom
abstract: PURPOSE: To obtain an adsorbent usable for adsorbing an organic carboxylic acid having several C atoms substitutable with several halogen atoms by using rubber. CONSTITUTION: By using rubber, an organic carboxylic acid having 1 to 3C atoms substitutable with 1 to 5 halogen atoms is adsorbed. This applying method can be used for adsorbing the carboxylic acid from a wasted and concentrated (though there is a difference in the degree) soln. such as waste water. Accidentally, the carboxylic acid such as trifluoro-carboxylic acid infiltrates into the waste water in the range of the producing process. Such accident is caused by the spilling of the carboxylic acid, contamination in the producing place or its infiltration into the water or the waste water. To such emergencies, after its discharge, rubber extremely satisfactorily suits.

title: Molybdenum trioxide (tungsten) regulated binary metal phosphide, preparation method and application
abstract: The invention relates to a binary metal regulated and controlled by molybdenum trioxide (tungsten)Phosphide, a preparation method and application. The invention adopts the foam nickel as a matrix, firstly prepares a columnar precursor by a hydrothermal method, and then forms MoO by a low-temperature phosphorization method 3‑x The surface porous column array structure is regulated and controlled. The structure has amorphous MoO 3‑x And CoP/Ni 5 P 4 And the heterojunction is beneficial to the activation of water molecules and the precipitation of hydrogen. In addition, the vertical porous columnar array structure can accelerate the permeation of electrolyte, expose more electrochemically active area and facilitate the desorption of gas from the catalyst surface. The structure has very large potential application value in the field of electrocatalysis.

title: Multipurpose reversible electrochemical system
abstract: A reversible electrochemical system adapted to operate between a fuel cell mode, an electrolysis mode, and an electrolysis and fuel cell alternating mode(energy storage mode), operating on a fuel gas mixture and an oxygen-containing gas mixture. In the fuel cell mode, a current of electrons is delivered to an oxygen electrode where their charge is transferred to a plurality of oxygen ions which are passed through an electrolyte to a fuel electrode where the charge is transferred back to the electrode. In the electrolysis mode, a current of electrons is sent to a fuel electrode where the charge is transferred to a plurality of oxygen ions formed by the decomposition of steam. The oxygen ions pass through an electrolyte to an oxygen electrode where the charge is transferred back to the electrons.

title: The device and method of softening copper wire for coaxial cable
abstract: The present invention relates to a copper wire softening device for a triple insulated wire and a method thereof, and includes a softening furnace having a softening chamber for maintaining a temperature for softening the copper wire in a predetermined space, and forming hydrogen gas on one side of the softening furnace. Gas supply unit for supplying to fill the inside of the softening chamber by supplying the gas, forming an input unit for supplying copper wire to one side of the softening furnace, and forming a discharge part for discharging copper wire to the other side of the softening furnace. And a softening part formed to soften the copper wire at a constant temperature while being reduced by reacting with hydrogen gas, and a leaking part that leaks a predetermined amount of hydrogen gas filled in the softening chamber to one side of the discharge part on the other side of the softening part by a leak valve operation. And ignition that ignites the hydrogen gas that leaks constantly from the leaking part so that a ignition flame is directed toward the discharge part where the copper wire is discharged. Including a combustion unit formed on one side and the softened copper wire from the inside of the softening furnace is discharged to the discharge portion, the combustion gas formed to ignite the gas leaked from the leaking portion by the ignition means to burn foreign matter on the surface of the copper wire. It provides a softening method of softening the copper wire while reducing and burning the foreign matter on the outside of the copper wire by the ignition flame formed in the discharge portion.

title: Rapid detecting device of heavy metal arsenic
abstract: The invention provides a rapid detecting device of heavy metal arsenic. The rapid detecting device comprises a first pre-treatment module, a second pre-treatment module, a color developing module and a comparative analysis module, wherein pentavalent arsenic is reduced into trivalent arsenic in the first pre-treatment module under an acidic condition by using a reducing agent; the trivalent arsenic is reduced into arsenide hydrogen gas by using a reducing agent in the second pre-treatment module; the arsenide hydrogen gas is enabled to be in contact with test paper dipped by mercury bromide in the color developing module so as to display brown color spots; the comparative analysis module is used for comparing by utilizing a photometer so as to complete detection. The rapid detecting device provided by the invention is high in sensitivity, small in error and strong in anti-jamming capability.

title: Self-Healing Catalysts: CO3O4 Nanorods for Fischer-Tropsch Synthesis
abstract: A self-healing reaction process for a chemical reaction is provided by exposing a catalyst a reaction mixture that includes carbon monoxide and hydrogen gas such that hydrocarbons are produced. The catalyst includes Co 3 O 4  nanorods having both Co 2+  and Co 3+  exposed thereon. The Co 3 O 4  nanorods can have a spinel crystal structure such that the Co 3 O 4  nanorods define a {110} facet having both Co 2+  and Co 3+  exposed thereon. During reaction conditions, water can oxidize portions of the catalyst, while the exposed Co 3+  can reduce any oxidized portions of the catalyst such that the catalyst is self-healing during reaction conditions, especially when the reaction mixture further comprises water.

title: Integrated solid oxide fuel cell mechanization and method of using for transportation industry applications
abstract: A method of starting a solid oxide fuel cell system is disclosed. The method comprises pressurizing a main plenum to a first pressure. The main plenum comprises a first supply of fuel, blowers, and air control valves. The first supply of fuel and a first supply of air are directed to a preheated micro-reformer. A heated pre-reformate is created in the micro-reformer and discharged from the micro-reformer to a main reformer. The main reformer is preheated with the heated pre-reformate. A second supply of fuel and a second supply of air are introduced to the main reformer. A heated main reformate is created in the main reformer and directed to a waste energy recovery assembly. A cathode supply is heated in the waste energy recovery system and then directed to a solid oxide fuel cell stack in order to heat the solid oxide fuel cell stack. Methods of transitioning, operating, shutting down, and maintaining in standby mode are also disclosed. A solid oxide fuel cell mechanization for a transportation vehicle is also disclosed.

title: Organic liquid heating and heat-insulating device for organic liquid fuel cell automobile
abstract: The application provides an organic liquid heating and heat preserving device for an organic liquid fuel cell automobile. And the flow of the high-temperature organic liquid storage unit flowing to the fuel cell pipeline is adjusted, so that the matching of the generated energy of the fuel cell and the electric energy demand of the automobile is ensured. In order to ensure the mobility and the organic liquid dehydrogenation efficiency, the organic liquid needs to be heated to a higher temperature, the organic liquid is heated by the heating control unit, and the low-temperature organic liquid storage unit heats the organic liquid to a temperature higher than the melting point to ensure that the mobility of the organic liquid is not influenced; the high-temperature organic liquid storage unit heats the organic liquid to the optimal dehydrogenation reaction temperature of the organic liquid, so that the organic liquid enters the fuel cell to reach the optimal reaction temperature. The heating control unit monitors the temperature of the organic liquid in the low-temperature organic liquid storage unit and the temperature of the organic liquid in the high-temperature organic liquid storage unit respectively, adjusts the power of the electromagnetic heating device, and ensures that the mobility of the low-temperature organic liquid and the temperature accuracy of the high-temperature organic liquid are not influenced.

title: Reactant flow channels for electrolyzer applications
abstract: An electrolyzer or unitized regenerative fuel cell has a flow field comprising at least one channel, wherein the cross-sectional area of the channel varies along at least a portion of the channel length. In some embodiments the channel width decreases along at least a portion of the length of the channel according to a natural exponential function. The use of this type of improved flow field channel can improve performance and efficiency of operation of the electrolyzer device.

title: Manganese dioxide positive electrode for rechargeable cells, and cells containing the same
abstract: This invention teaches rechargeable manganese dioxide cells (10,40) having alkaline electrolytes, zinc negative electrodes (14) and manganese dioxide positive electrodes (18).  In keeping with the present invention, the positive electrode is essentially unconstrained - that is, no cage is used in the cell to confine the positive electrode.  During discharge of a rechargeable alkaline cell, the positive electrode may be inclined to contract or reduce its dimensions.  However, the positive electrode is dimensioned so as to substantially fill the entire space allotted for it within the cell, while allowing for a slight accomodation for height-wise or longitudinal expansion or growth in bobin cells.  The positive electrode may include additives such as carbon or graphite to increase its electrical conductivity, and hydrophobic agents such as PFTE, polyethylene or polypropylene to enhance the hydrogen permeability of the positive electrode and thereby lead to increased hydrogen recombination rates.  Moreover, the discharge capacity of the negative electrode may be established so as to be in the range of from about 60% to about 120% of the theoretical one electron discharge capacity of the positive MnO2 electrode.

title: Alkaline cell
abstract: PURPOSE:To prevent the blistering and leakage due to gas generating by forming the negative electrode sealing plate which is consisted of a tripple layered clad plate having its copper layer surface coated with deposite of different kind metals to maintain its higher hydrogen overvoltage so as to fill its internal portion with a negative electrode active material. CONSTITUTION:The sealing plate 4 of a button type alkaline cell, etc., which is used for filling a negative electrode active material 6 placed oppositely to a positive electrode agent 2 through a separator 7, is formed by using a tripple layered clad plate consisted of nickel-stainless steel-copper layer from outside and also, its copper layer surface is formed by using a vacuum evaporation method, etc., so as to have its coated deposite of 0.05-1mg per unit area, which is consisted of metals such as In, Cd, Pb, Sn, etc., to maintain its higher hydrogen voltage. Therefore, enabling the cell to control its hydrogen gas generating from the negative electrode active material 6 nearly perfectly after enclosing the cell, the blistering and leakage of the cell can be prevented.

title: Synthetic method for superparamagnetism porous carbon absorption material
abstract: The invention discloses a synthetic method for superparamagnetism porous carbon absorption material. The method comprises the steps of arranging waste newspaper, filter paper or corn straws into an inorganic salt liquid to be fully dipped and then dried, then baking for 6 hours at the temperature of 600-900 DEG C in a tubular furnace nitrogen atmosphere to obtain the superparamagnetism porous carbon absorption material. The method has very simple steps, is easy to be operated, is beneficial to industrial production, realizes to circle and reuse wastes, and is beneficial to environment protection. The arrangement of the metal iron load in the obtained superparamagnetism porous carbon absorption material is relatively uniform; excellent hydrogen storage performance is shown in charging and discharging test; the superparamagnetism porous carbon absorption material can be used as very good electrode material, and shows excellent absorption performance in the absorption tests of dyes; moreover, a hysteresis loop represents the superparamagnetism porous carbon absorption material is a very good superparamagnetism material.

title: Fuel-reforming device and fuel-reforming method
abstract: Provided is a fuel-reforming device comprising: an ammonia tank (4); a reformer (5) for reforming ammonia and generating high-concentration hydrogen gas having a hydrogen content of at least 99%; a mixing tank (7) for mixing ammonia and hydrogen for temporary storage; and a control means (10) for controlling the respective supply amounts of ammonia and high-concentration hydrogen gas that are supplied to the mixing tank (7).　The control means (10) calculates the combustion rate coefficient C of mixed gas with respect to a reference fuel on the basis of equation (1).　Equation (1): S0=SH×C＋SA×(1-C).　In equation (1), S0 is the combustion rate of the reference fuel, SH is the combustion rate of hydrogen, SA is the combustion rate of ammonia, and C is the combustion rate coefficient of mixed gas.　In addition, on the basis of equation (2), the control means (10) determines the volume fractions of ammonia and hydrogen that are supplied to the mixing tank.　Equation (2): C=1-exp(-A×MB).　In equation (2), M is the volume fraction of hydrogen in mixed gas, and A and B are constants.

title: A porous composite filter for simultaneous treatment of dust-co2 from flue gas
abstract: A dry particle phase adsorbent, adsorption filter structure, technology making a filter, and the filter are provided to improve adsorption performance in a high temperature zone of exhaust gas, and to improve selectivity about carbon dioxide in carbon dioxide. A dry particle phase adsorbent is manufactured by dipping an alkali metal and an alkaline earth metal on the surface of a dipping material or an adsorbent. The adsorption filter structure increases a contact area of the adsorption surface of carbon dioxide by applying powder of an adsorbent on a porous supporting body, and processing dust and gas at the same time by forming a minute pore between particles. A manufacturing method of the adsorbent includes the following steps of: mixing a dipping material in temperature of 60~70‹C, filtering mixed liquid; washing particle with ion exchanged water; drying the washed particle in 120‹C; and sintering the dried particle in 300~600‹C.

title: Water molecule low-voltage electrochemical separation device and water molecule low-voltage electrochemical separation method
abstract: The invention discloses a water molecule low-voltage electrochemical separation device and a water molecule low-voltage electrochemical separation method. Water molecule is separated to gas-state electrolyte quickly under the condition of specific voltage and current through an electrochemical reactor, then the gas-state electrolyte is separated to hydrogen and oxygen in low voltage environment through a low-voltage voltage-control centrifugal separator, the hydrogen and oxygen are mixed to store in a combustible gas storage tank, and the hydrogen and oxygen can be controlled to be output by a combustible gas output port to be used as fuel for combustion during use. The water molecule low-voltage electrochemical separation device is simple in structure, small in volume and low in power consumption, combustible hydrogen and comburent oxygen are generated with common water by utilizing electrochemical reaction and ultra-low voltage voltage-control centrifugal separation technology, the fuel is efficient gas-state fuel used after production and can not deflagrate in normal state, use is safe, any additive is not needed, product of produced hydrogen and oxygen after combustion only comprises water, any toxic substance can not be remained or released, and cleanliness and environment protection are realized really.

title: Mobile wet desorption device and organic solvent recovering method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a mobile wet desorption device and an organic solvent recovering method thereof. The mobile wet desorption device comprises an adsorption device (1) and a desorption device connected onto the adsorption device (1). The mobile wet desorption device is characterized in that the desorption device comprises a steam generator (2), a circulating fan (3) as well as a condenser (4), a vacuum pump (5), a layering tank (6) and an oil layer tank (7) which are connected sequentially through a pipeline. The device has emergency processing and alarming functions and guarantees safety of the whole desorption process. The device can recover and recycle organic solvents and water to save energy. The method combines the vacuum reduced-pressure desorption technology with the steam heating desorption technology and is more beneficial to adsorption control on waste gas containing organic components, emission reduction and up-to-standard emission purposes are achieved, the utilization rate of adsorption materials is increased, meanwhile, steam consumption can be reduced, energy consumption can be reduced, and the economic running cost can be reduced.

title: Nanomaterials fabricated using spark erosion and other particle fabrication processes
abstract: Methods, systems, and devices are disclosed for fabricating clean, oxidation-free nanoparticles of electrically conducting metals and alloys using spark erosion techniques. In one aspect, a method includes dispersing bulk pieces of an electrically conducting material in a dielectric fluid with mechanical vibrations within a container; generating an electric field using electrodes in the dielectric fluid using by an electric pulse, in which the electric field creates a plasma in a volume existing between the bulk pieces that locally heats the bulk pieces to form structures within the volume, the dielectric fluid quenching the structures to form nanoparticles, and filtering the nanoparticles through a screen including holes of a size allowing nanoparticles of the size or smaller to pass through the screen to a region in the container, in which the dielectric fluid inhibits oxidation of the surface of the nanoparticles.

title: Gas drying apparatus
abstract: PURPOSE:To allow common use of one drying agent regenerator to several hydrogen-cooled generators by separating a gas drying agent from the drying agent regenerator. CONSTITUTION:A hydrogen gas sealed into a hydrogen-cooled generator 1 returns to it via a high pressure side gas communicating pipe 2, a gas drying agent 4 and a low-pressure side communicating pipe 5. Then, with valves 6 and 7 closed, a valve 13 is opened to release a hydrogen gas in a closed box 3 into the air. Thereafter, valves 11 and 16 are opened to send a hot air into a gas drying agent 4 through a communicating pipe 15 until water is removed from the gas drying agent 4. After the regeneration of the gas drying agent 4, with the valves 11, 13 and 16 closed, the valves 6 and 7 are opened to circulate the hydrogen gas again. This enables common use of the drying agent regenerator 14.

title: Vacuum degassing and purifying device for inlet belt pressure type sealing oil
abstract: The utility model discloses an import belt pressure formula sealing oil vacuum degassing purifier, including setting up the partition valve that is in the closed condition when normal work on the sealed oil supply pipeline of hydrogen side, set up the secondary delivery valve on the oil inlet pipeline and the oil outlet pipeline at the both ends of partition valve respectively, set gradually the secondary inlet valve in the oil inlet valve exit, filter and vacuum degassing system in proper order, the oil extraction pump that is located the vacuum degassing system export, the export of oil extraction pump connects the flow matcher entry, the flow matcher export connects gradually the primary delivery valve and the secondary delivery valve, the secondary delivery valve export connects the sealed oil tank entry of hydrogen side, a port of flow matcher is connected to the oil inlet pipeline between secondary inlet valve and the filter; the oil flow at the outlet of the oil discharge pump is larger than the normal oil supplement amount of the hydrogen side sealed oil tank by the design and model selection of the oil discharge pump; the air dissolved in the hydrogen side seal oil in contact with the hydrogen gas of the generator and the hydrocarbon gas degraded and decomposed by the oil can be effectively removed.

title: Semiconductor manufacturing apparatus
abstract: PURPOSE:To reduce impurity mixing into a film, and to provide a high quality thin film, by introducing another substance reacting with the imprity when forming the film under a reduced pressure condition. CONSTITUTION:When an Si thin film is formed with an optical CVD method using a raw material gas of Si2H6, hydrogen is introduced into the vacuum vessel 5 from a hydrogen gas system 11, and active hydrogen is then produced by irradiating the interior of the vacuum vessel 5, using a light source 3 of a hydrogen discharge lamp with such a wavelength that hydrogen molecules can absorb light to decompose into atoms. In this state, ArF excimer laser light from an optical source 1 which is shaped into wide planar light by an optical system 2, is introduced into the vicinity of the entire surface of a wafer, while Si2H6 gas is introduced from a raw material gas system 10. The Si2H6 gas absorbs the ArF excimer laser light and is decomposed, forming an Si thin film on the substrate 6. Since oxygen remaining in the vessel would couple with active hydrogen atoms and is exhaused out of the vessel 5 by means of a vacuum exhausting system 8, oxygen in the resulted film can be reduced to about 1/20.

title: Manufacture of alkaline storage battery
abstract: PURPOSE:To simplify a manufacturing process as well as to aim at improvement in capacity and charging pressure characteristics, by adding a hydrogen storage alloy absorbing hydrogen in advance at the time of manufacture of a cadmium electrode. CONSTITUTION:A cadmium electrode, adding a hydrogen storage alloy absorbing hydrogen in a starting material of the cadmium electrode consisting of cadmium oxide of cadmium hydroxide or the like, is built in a battery. With this constitution, a checmical conversion process before battery assembling is omitted and simplified, and even if a charging product by chemical conversion is none, the hydrogen storage alloy prevents any capacity drop due to negative electrode, thus a discharge characteristic is improvable.

title: Power cycles based upon cyclical hydriding and dehydriding of a material
abstract: Improved power cycles for improving the production of power and refrigeration and for conserving thermal energy, utilizing as a common basic characteristic, a hydride-dehydride-hydrogen power cycle in which hydrogen is reversibly combined with a hydride-forming material at a relatively low temperature and pressure, the hydrided material is then heated at constant volume to chemically compress the hydrogen, and finally the material is dehydrided by further heating the material to release hydrogen gas at relatively high pressure and temperature. The pressurized high temperature hydrogen gas as thus developed is used in various ways for producing power and refrigeration, including functioning as a low temperature heat sink for certain auxiliary or ancillary power cycles, prior to recycling the hydrogen gas for reuse in the described hydride-dehydride-hydrogen cycle.

title: Rapid auto water electrolyzer
abstract: The utility model discloses a rapid and automatic water electrolyzer, which comprises two burettes (1, 2), a thistle tube (3), a cylinder body (4), a positive electrode plate (5) and a negative electrode plate (6), wherein both of the two burettes (1, 2) are inserted into the cylinder body (4) and are connected with the cylinder body (4) in a sealing mode, the thistle tube (3) is also inserted into the cylinder body (4) and is positioned between the two burettes (1, 2), the positive electrode plate (5) is traversed through the cylinder body (4) and is inserted into the burette (1), the negative electrode plate (6) is traversed through the cylinder body (4) and is inserted into the other burette (2), and the positive electrode plate (5) is electrically connected with the negative electrode plate (6). The utility model has the advantages of simple structure and rapid electrolyzing speed.

title: Method for adjusting hydrogen to carbon monoxide ratio in synthesis gas
abstract: A method for adjusting hydrogen to carbon monoxide ratio of syngas contaminated by sulfur impurities involving a water gas shift (WGS) reaction. In light of the presence of the sulfur impurities, the WGS can be implemented as a sour gas shift. WGS can provide good results by using a non-sulfided catalyst. Conditions can be employed which contribute to further enhanced CO-conversion in the reaction. The hydrocarbons or derivatives thereof obtainable from the method can further be refined and used for production of fuels or lubricants for combustion engines.

title: Liquefied gas reliquefaction apparatus using LNB fuel and liquefied gas carrier
abstract: The present invention is to re-liquefy an LNG fuel tank in which LNG for fuel of a liquefied gas carrier is stored, and an evaporated gas supplied through a gas pipe from a liquefied gas tank in which liquefied gas is stored by heat exchange with LNG discharged from the LNG fuel tank. A liquefied gas reliquefaction apparatus using LNG fuel including a heat exchanger to be supplied to the liquefied gas tank through a liquid pipe and a liquefied gas carrier having the same are provided.   According to the present invention, the use of NG as a fuel can reduce the emission of pollutants in the atmosphere, and furthermore, by utilizing the fuel LNG to control the pressure of the liquefied gas tank, the cost of the reliquefaction apparatus installed on the existing liquefied gas carrier Reduce the cost of CO2 emissions, simplify the operation, reduce CO2 emissions during reliquefaction operations, and control the pressure of the LPG tanks using LNG to increase the thickness of the LPG tanks. LNG can be used to lower the temperature or pressure of liquefied gas, thus obtaining energy, thereby reducing the energy flowing through the carburetor for use as fuel, and reducing the cost and energy consumption by reducing the capacity of the carburetor. Can be.

title: Method for producing olefin
abstract: To provide a method for producing an olefin in a short reaction time with high yield in a dehydrogenation reaction of an aliphatic alcohol.SOLUTION: The present invention relates to a method for producing an olefin through a dehydrogenation reaction of an aliphatic alcohol having at least 6 carbon atoms in the presence of an aluminum oxide catalyst, wherein an average pore diameter of the aluminum oxide catalyst is 12.5 nm to 20.0 nm.SELECTED DRAWING: None

title: Process for the hydrogenation of a substrate
abstract: A process for the hydrogenation of a substrate, for example lipids or oxygen or other substrates, which can be hydrogenated with hydrogen gas in the presence of a catalyst in which hydrogen gas is mixed with the substrate in the presence of a catalyst and the reaction is carried out under selected pressure, time and temperature conditions. bringing the mixture into a supercritical or near-critical state and contacting the substantially homogeneous solution in a supercritical or near-critical state with a catalyst corresponding to the hydrogenation reaction, wherein the reaction products, i.e., hydrogenated substrates, form a solution component in the supercritical state or a condition close to the critical state

title: toilet
abstract:
The present invention is a wall (100) which is installed at the front door that allows the user to enter and exit; A toilet 200 having a dropping pipe 210 in which manure falls to a lower portion of the toilet bowl 200 or the toilet bowl 200, and a shutter 220 opened and closed by the dropping pipe 210; An agitating device (310) for agitating and storing the manure dropped from the toilet bowl (200); It relates to a toilet, characterized in that consisting of; incineration device (400) to the manure stored in the slurry in the stirring device (310). 
     Accordingly, the manure is treated by carbonization, so it is easy to treat by minimizing the volume and does not smell. In addition, since it can be treated with a small amount of water, water can be saved, and it is economical and has the effect that it can be used in areas where it is difficult to supply electricity by using solar power, hydrogen fuel cells, and wind power generation.

title: Metal Fluoride Electrode Protection Layer and Method of Making Same
abstract: Modifications to the surface of an electrode and/or the surfaces of the electrode material can improve battery performance. For example, the modifications can improve the capacity, rate capability and long cycle stability of the electrode and/or may minimize undesirable catalytic effects. In one instance, metal-ion batteries can have an anode that is coated, at least in part, with a metal fluoride protection layer. The protection layer is preferably less than 100 nm in thickness.

title: Hydronium (h.sub.30.sup. ) polycrystalline  superionic conductors and method (ion exchange) of  making same
abstract: TITLE               HYDRONIUM (H3O+) POLYCRYSTALLINE SUPERIONIC CONDUCTORS AND METHOD   (ION EXCHANGE) OF MAKING SAME                      INVENTORS                 Patrick Stephen NICHOLSON and Kimihiro YAMASHITA                          ABSTRACT      An  hydronium  polycrystalline  superionic  conductor, having the formula (H3O+,Na+)5(Re)Si4O12, where Re = Y or Gd, is  produced  from  precursor  material  being  Na5YSi4O12  or Na5GdSi4O12.  In order to accomplish the aforesaid a range of intermediate ceramics may be produced replacing part of the precursor ceramic sodium by ions of elements in 1A group of the Periodic Table that have an atomic weight above 32 and preferably ions of potassium, cesium, or mixtures of potassium and cesium.  To  produce  the  superionic  hydronium  polycrystalline ceramic conductor and the intermediate ceramic from the feed ceramics aforesaid, the feed ceramic is placed in a chloride melt wherein part of the sodium in the feed ceramic lattice is replaced by an appropriate cation from the melt such as potas-sium  and  cesium.    Subsequently,  a  field  assisted  ionic exchange takes place to now replace the interceded potassium and cesium ions with the hydronium (H3O+)  ion, whereby the aforesaid hydronium, superionic, solid polycrystalline ceramic conductor is achieved.
text: Hydronium (h.sub.30.sup. ) polycrystalline superionic conductors and method (ion exchange) of making same TITLE HYDRONIUM (H3O+) POLYCRYSTALLINE SUPERIONIC CONDUCTORS AND METHOD (ION EXCHANGE) OF MAKING SAME INVENTORS Patrick Stephen NICHOLSON and Kimihiro YAMASHITA ABSTRACT An hydronium polycrystalline superionic conductor, having the formula (H3O+,Na+)5(Re)Si4O12, where Re = Y or Gd, is produced from precursor material being Na5YSi4O12 or Na5GdSi4O12. In order to accomplish the aforesaid a range of intermediate ceramics may be produced replacing part of the precursor ceramic sodium by ions of elements in 1A group of the Periodic Table that have an atomic weight above 32 and preferably ions of potassium, cesium, or mixtures of potassium and cesium. To produce the superionic hydronium polycrystalline ceramic conductor and the intermediate ceramic from the feed ceramics aforesaid, the feed ceramic is placed in a chloride melt wherein part of the sodium in the feed ceramic lattice is replaced by an appropriate cation from the melt such as potas-sium and cesium. Subsequently, a field assisted ionic exchange takes place to now replace the interceded potassium and cesium ions with the hydronium (H3O+) ion, whereby the aforesaid hydronium, superionic, solid polycrystalline ceramic conductor is achieved.

title: Alkaline battery
abstract: PURPOSE:To increase high rate discharge performance without a decrease in filling accuracy by mixing flat-shaped zinc powder with spherical zinc particles containing a specified amount of particles whose ratio of the minor axis to the major axis is in a specified range, and using the mixture as a negative active material. CONSTITUTION:Flat-shaped zinc powder is mixed with spherical zinc particles containing 90% or more of zinc particles whose ratio of the minor axis to the major axis is 1.0-1.5, and the mixture is used as a negative active material. To increase filling accuracy, particle size of zinc particles whose content is 90% or more is limited to 48-40 mesh. The flat-shaped zinc powder whose particle surface is flat or zinc foil is used so that smooth surface contact with spherical zinc particles is maintained.

title: Fire extinguishing method
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an effective extinguishing method for, for example, a large-scale forest fire and a ship fire at sea, quite different from the conventional extinguishing method.  <P>SOLUTION: This fire extinguishing method extinguishes a fire in a fire site by emitting hydrogen from gaseous hydrogen or liquefied hydrogen sealed in a high pressure vessel or powder of hydrogen storage alloy sealed in a vessel by the heat of the fire to cause hydrogen explosion. In a more desirable implementation method, a plurality of vessels of hydrogen sources are linearly or planarly disposed at a predetermined interval, connected together with a netted material, and dropped onto the fire site such as a forest and the sea to cause the hydrogen explosion and extinguish the fire.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2005,JPO&NCIPI

title: A kind of scaling method and system of power-efficient point
abstract: The present invention provides the scaling method and system of a kind of power-efficient point, is applied to hydrogen cell automobile.This method is by when detecting plus when hydrogen commencing signal, obtain the current operating conditions parameter of automobile.Based on current hydrogen pressure value and present hydrogen bottle temperature, hydrogen consumption quality is calculated.Based on current driving mileage, electric quantity change value and hydrogen consumption quality, rate of consumption of hydrogen is calculated.If the difference of the peak efficiency of current hydrogen fuel cell and the difference and rate of consumption of hydrogen of calibration efficiency and calibration consumption rate outside preset range, determines the power-efficient point migration of hydrogen fuel cell.Based on peak efficiency, the quality of hydrogen consumption and runing time, determines the newest power-efficient point of hydrogen fuel cell and demarcated.By above-mentioned scaling method, do not need using the new power-efficient point of hydrogen fuel cell is re-scaled again after artificial Timing measurement, to realize the purpose for improving vehicle operation efficiency, reducing specific fuel consumption, reducing vehicle operating cost and maintenance cost.

title: Economizer of fuel-oil engine
abstract: The utility model discloses an oil economizer for fuel oil engines, which is composed of a housing body, rubber insulating materials, a stainless steel piece, a conducting wire, a conduit, etc. Electricity is supplied to the utility model by a vehicle generator. Electrolyzed oxyhydrogen gas is conveyed to a burning chamber by the conduit to generate catalytic burning action. The utility model improves the power of a fuel oil engine, reduces oil consumption, and decreases burned gas.

title: Pre-lithiation of battery cells
abstract: A battery cell may be formed to include a surplus lithium. The surplus lithium may be disposed inside a cavity formed by winding a separator, a positive electrode, and a negative electrode to form a jelly roll of the battery cell. The surplus lithium may be discharged in order to pre-lithiate the battery cell. For example, the surplus lithium may be coupled with the positive electrode and discharged while the battery cell is at least partially charged. Alternatively, the surplus lithium may be coupled with the negative electrode and discharged while the battery cell is at least partially discharged. Moreover, the surplus lithium may be coupled with a negative current collector of the battery cell in order to prevent one or more chemical reactions triggered by an over discharge of the battery cell from corroding the negative current collector of the battery cell.

title: Oxygen evolution electrode material containing FeOOH and preparation method thereof
abstract: The present invention provides an oxygen evolution electrode material containing FeOOH and a preparation method thereof. The oxygen evolution electrode material containing FeOOH is composed of metal nickel and FeOOH. The preparation method comprises the following steps of: preparing FeOOH by using a chemical precipitation method, a hydrothermal method, an electrodeposition method, a plasma chemical deposition method, a ferrous oxidation method or a forced hydrolysis method; and compounding metal nickel and FeOOH to obtain the oxygen evolution electrode. The invention has the advantages that: FeOOH is used as an oxygen evolution electrode and has excellent performance; FeOOH is inexpensive and widely available; the electrode is easy to prepare, can be prepared by a method for industrial preparation of DSA (dimensionally stable anode), and has strong practicality; and Fe is environmentally-friendly, thus reducing the environmental pollution caused by cobalt oxides.

title: Gaschromatograph
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To prevent leakage of expensive carrier gas effectively and to prevent from bringing about occurrence of secondary disaster caused by the leakage of the carrier gas.SOLUTION: A flow check-valve with a valve mechanism which can limit a carrier gas flow mechanically is arranged in upstream of a sample introduction part 1 of a carrier gas passage 11 separately from a flow control valve 6 controlling the carrier gas flow introduced into the sample introduction part and an analysis column by a signal from a control unit 8. For an excessive carrier gas flow with more than a constant flow caused by leaks of the carrier gas, the flow check-valve 9 limits the flow to a flow set in advance mechanically. In this way, gas leakage of the carrier gas such as helium gas is prevented effectively, and the occurrence of secondary accident caused by the leakage of carrier gas such as hydrogen gas is prevented.

abstract: There are provided methods and systems for an electrochemical cell including an anode and a cathode where the anode is contacted with a metal ion that converts the metal ion from a lower oxidation state to a higher oxidation state. title: Solid oxide fuel cell with internal reforming member
abstract: A solid oxide fuel cell module includes a fuel cell tube defining a fuel cell tube inner chamber. The fuel cell tube includes a fuel cell tube inlet, a fuel cell tube outlet, and an active portion comprising an anode layer, a cathode layer, and an electrolyte layer. The active portion is configured to react an oxidizing fluid and a reducing fluid to generate an electromotive force. The solid oxide fuel cell module further includes an internal reforming member disposed within the fuel cell tube, the internal reforming member being configured to receive raw fuel and convert raw fuel to reformed fuel. The solid fuel cell tube further includes an anode current collector disposed within the fuel cell tube, the anode current collector connected to the anode layer of the anode current collector and providing support to the internal reforming member such that the internal reforming member retains a desired position within the fuel cell tube.

The solid fuel cell tube further includes an anode current collector disposed within the fuel cell tube, the anode current collector connected to the anode layer of the anode current collector and providing support to the internal reforming member such that the internal reforming member retains a desired position within the fuel cell tube.

title: Ship comprising engine and method for reliquefying boil-off gas
abstract: A ship including an engine and a boil-off gas reliquefaction method. The ship comprises: a first self-heating exchanger for heat-exchanging the boil-off gas discharged from the storage tank; a multi-stage compressor for compressing the boil-off gas, which has passed through the first self-circulating heat exchanger after being discharged from the storage tank, in a plurality of stages; a first decompressor for expanding a portion of the boil-off gas that has passed through the first self-heating exchanger after being compressed by the multi-stage compressor; a second decompressor for expanding the other part of the boil-off gas having passed through the first self-heat exchanger after being compressed by the multi-stage compressor; and a second self heat exchanger for exchanging heat and cooling a portion of the evaporation gas, which has been compressed by the multi-stage compressor, by using the fluid, which has been expanded by the first decompressor, as a refrigerant, wherein the first self heat exchanger cools the other portion of the evaporation gas, which has been compressed by the multi-stage compressor, by using the evaporation gas, which is discharged from the storage tank, as the refrigerant.

title: Method for producing special lubricating oil base oil
abstract: The present invention discloses a method for producing special lubricating oil base oil. According to the method of the present invention, a wax oil raw material and hydrogen gas are mixed and then sequentially pass through at least two hydrogenation reaction zones connected in series, wherein each hydrogenation reaction zone sequentially comprises a refining dewaxing catalyst composite bed layer filled with a hydrodewaxing catalyst and a hydrorefining catalyst in a mixed manner and a hydrodewaxing catalyst bed layer according to the material flowing direction, and the reaction effluent obtained from the last hydrogenation reaction zone is subjected to separation and fractionation to obtain the lubricating oil base oil, the white oil and other products. With the method of the present invention, the temperature decrease during the hydrodewaxing process and the temperature increase during the hydrogenation process are subjected to reasonable combination utilization, such that the low freezing point lubricating oil base oil is produced while the hot spot temperature of the device is reduced and the operation period is prolonged; and the cold hydrogen consumption or the heating furnace fuel gas loss is reduced, and the operating cost is saved.

title: Method for evaluating electrochemical performance of AB5 hydrogen occluding alloy powder
abstract: The invention provides a method used for evaluating the electrochemical properties of AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder, which comprises the steps as follows: (A) an X-ray powder diffraction method is adopted to measure the parameter value of an AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder crystal; (B) the parameter value range of the AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder crystal is set; and (C) whether the parameter value of the AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder crystal is arranged within the set parameter value range is judged; when the parameter value of the measured AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder crystal is arranged within the corresponding set parameter value range, the electrochemical properties of the AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder can meet the requirement of the battery. The method provided by the invention simplifies the operation steps of evaluating the electrochemical properties of the AB5 hydrogen storage alloy powder and shortens the detection time.

title: Process for producing hydrocarbon oil, and synthesis reaction system
abstract: Disclosed is a method for producing a hydrocarbon oil, wherein a hydrocarbon oil is obtained from a gas that contains a carbon monoxide gas and a hydrogen gas by a Fischer-Tropsch synthesis reaction. The method for producing a hydrocarbon oil comprises: a hydrocarbon synthesis step in which the carbon monoxide gas and the hydrogen gas contained in the starting material gas are caused to react with each other in a slurry that fills a reaction container and contains catalyst particles, thereby synthesizing a hydrocarbon; a powdered particle removal step in which the slurry is drawn out from the upper part of a slurry bed within the reaction container and filtered, so that powdered particles that are formed by the powdering of the catalyst particles are captured and separated, thereby obtaining a liquid hydrocarbon; a catalyst particle capturing step in which the slurry is drawn out from a position lower than the upper part of the slurry bed and filtered, so that the catalyst particles are captured and separated, thereby obtaining a liquid hydrocarbon; and a catalyst particle returning step in which the catalyst particles captured in the catalyst particle capturing step are returned to the reaction container.

title: Water electrolysis system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a water electrolysis system capable of regulating the voltage required for electrolysis of water for reduction of surplus power.SOLUTION: The water electrolysis system 10 breaks down an electrolyte aqueous solution into hydrogen and oxygen using light. The invention comprises: a plurality of photoelectric conversion units 12 which include at least one photoelectric conversion element 30 and generate power by receiving light; and a plurality of electrolytic cells 14 in which hydrogen gas and oxygen gas are generated by electrolyzing the electrolyte aqueous solution using the power obtained by the photoelectric conversion units. The photoelectric conversion units 12 and the electrolytic cells 14 are electrically connected to each other in series. The electrolytic cells 14 are arranged between the photoelectric conversion units 12, and the photoelectric conversion units 12 or electrolytic cells 14 located at each end in the arrangement are electrically connected.

title: Hydrogen water producing device using hydrogen gas bomb and gas charging delivery system to hydrogen gas bomb used in the same device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To construct a system in which hydrogen water can be easily generated as a simple structural device by using a small-sized hydrogen gas cylinder, and a task such as replacement of the hydrogen gas cylinder can be performed safely and efficiently by a professional company. Hydrogen water can be instantly generated at home for use in beverages, and it is possible to easily generate hydrogen-dissolved water of a prescribed concentration without the need to store it like conventional hydrogen water and storage equipment. A hydrogen water generator is provided. A gas valve unit is integrally connected and fixed to a tip of a nozzle of a hydrogen gas cylinder, and a base end of a gas supply pipe is detachably connected to a gas delivery end located on a lower side of a gas flow control valve in the gas valve unit. It was decided that the tip of the gas supply pipe was connected in series with a hydrogen water production tank having an enclosed space inside, and the hydrogen water production tank was provided with a hydrogen discharge unit. [Selection diagram] Fig. 16
